### Schema:
CREATE TABLE IDXS (   INDEX_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   CREATE_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   DEFERRED_REBUILD Boolean NOT NULL,   INDEX_HANDLER_CLASS TEXT NOT NULL,   INDEX_NAME TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   INDEX_TBL_ID BigInt NOT NULL,   LAST_ACCESS_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   ORIG_TBL_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   SD_ID BigInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE INDEX_PARAMS (   INDEX_ID BigInt NOT NULL,   PARAM_KEY TEXT NOT NULL,   PARAM_VALUE TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE DATABASE_PARAMS (   DB_ID BigInt NOT NULL,   PARAM_KEY TEXT NOT NULL,   PARAM_VALUE TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE ROLES (   ROLE_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   CREATE_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   OWNER_NAME TEXT NOT NULL,   ROLE_NAME TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE ROLE_MAP (   ROLE_GRANT_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   ADD_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   GRANT_OPTION SmallInt NOT NULL,   GRANTOR TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   GRANTOR_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   PRINCIPAL_NAME TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   PRINCIPAL_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL,   ROLE_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE GLOBAL_PRIVS (   USER_GRANT_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   CREATE_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   GRANT_OPTION SmallInt NOT NULL,   GRANTOR TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   GRANTOR_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   PRINCIPAL_NAME TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   PRINCIPAL_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   USER_PRIV TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE DB_PRIVS (   DB_GRANT_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   CREATE_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   DB_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   GRANT_OPTION SmallInt NOT NULL,   GRANTOR TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   GRANTOR_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   PRINCIPAL_NAME TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   PRINCIPAL_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   DB_PRIV TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE TBL_PRIVS (   TBL_GRANT_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   CREATE_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   GRANT_OPTION SmallInt NOT NULL,   GRANTOR TEXT NOT NULL,   GRANTOR_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL,   PRINCIPAL_NAME TEXT NOT NULL,   PRINCIPAL_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL,   TBL_PRIV TEXT NOT NULL,   TBL_ID BigInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE TBL_COL_PRIVS (   TBL_COLUMN_GRANT_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   COLUMN_NAME TEXT NOT NULL,   CREATE_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   GRANT_OPTION SmallInt NOT NULL,   GRANTOR TEXT NOT NULL,   GRANTOR_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL,   PRINCIPAL_NAME TEXT NOT NULL,   PRINCIPAL_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL,   TBL_COL_PRIV TEXT NOT NULL,   TBL_ID BigInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE PART_PRIVS (   PART_GRANT_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   CREATE_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   GRANT_OPTION SmallInt NOT NULL,   GRANTOR TEXT NOT NULL,   GRANTOR_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL,   PART_ID BigInt NOT NULL,   PRINCIPAL_NAME TEXT NOT NULL,   PRINCIPAL_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL,   PART_PRIV TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE PART_COL_PRIVS (   PART_COLUMN_GRANT_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   COLUMN_NAME TEXT NOT NULL,   CREATE_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   GRANT_OPTION SmallInt NOT NULL,   GRANTOR TEXT NOT NULL,   GRANTOR_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL,   PART_ID BigInt NOT NULL,   PRINCIPAL_NAME TEXT NOT NULL,   PRINCIPAL_TYPE TEXT NOT NULL,   PART_COL_PRIV TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE TASK_LOGS (   TASK_ID BigInt NOT NULL,   TASK_NAME TEXT NOT NULL,   START_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   END_TIME BigInt,   STATUS TEXT NOT NULL,   ERROR_MESSAGE TEXT );  CREATE TABLE FUNCTIONS (   FUNCTION_ID BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   FUNCTION_NAME TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   CREATE_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   MOD_TIME BigInt NOT NULL );

### Question:
What is the total count of global privileges granted to users versus roles, and what is the percentage distribution of these grants by principal type?

WITH counts AS (   SELECT      SUM(CASE WHEN PRINCIPAL_TYPE = 'USER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS user_count,     SUM(CASE WHEN PRINCIPAL_TYPE = 'ROLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS role_count   FROM GLOBAL_PRIVS ) SELECT    user_count,   role_count,   (user_count * 100.0) / (user_count + role_count) AS user_percent,   (role_count * 100.0) / (user_count + role_count) AS role_percent FROM counts;

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE mydb_customers (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar,   address Varchar,   card Varchar,   created_at Datetime,   updated_at Datetime );  CREATE TABLE mydb_products (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar,   description Varchar,   price Real,   stock Int,   created_at Datetime,   updated_at Datetime );  CREATE TABLE mydb_order_items (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   order_id Int,   product_id Int,   quantity Int,   price Real,   created_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES mydb_customer_orders(id),   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES mydb_products(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_payments (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   order_id Int,   payment_date Datetime,   amount Real,   payment_method Varchar,   status Varchar,   created_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES mydb_customer_orders(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_shipments (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   order_id Int,   shipment_date Datetime,   tracking_number Varchar,   status Varchar,   destination_address Varchar,   created_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES mydb_customer_orders(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_customer_addresses (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   customer_id Int,   address_type Varchar,   address_line Varchar,   city Varchar,   state Varchar,   zip_code Varchar,   created_at Datetime,   updated_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES mydb_customers(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_customer_phones (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   customer_id Int,   phone_type Varchar,   number Varchar,   is_primary Int,   created_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES mydb_customers(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_customer_emails (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   customer_id Int,   email Varchar,   is_primary Int,   created_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES mydb_customers(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_customer_preferences (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   customer_id Int,   preference_key Varchar,   preference_value Varchar,   created_at Datetime,   updated_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES mydb_customers(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_customer_feedback (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   customer_id Int,   feedback_text Varchar,   rating Int,   created_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES mydb_customers(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_service_tickets (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   customer_id Int,   subject Varchar,   priority Varchar,   status Varchar,   opened_at Datetime,   closed_at Datetime,   created_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES mydb_customers(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_ticket_comments (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   ticket_id Int,   user_id Int,   comment Varchar,   created_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (ticket_id) REFERENCES mydb_service_tickets(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_customer_subscriptions (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   customer_id Int,   subscription_plan Varchar,   start_date Datetime,   end_date Datetime,   status Varchar,   created_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES mydb_customers(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_invoice_details (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   order_id Int,   invoice_number Varchar,   amount_due Real,   due_date Datetime,   paid_date Datetime,   status Varchar,   created_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES mydb_customer_orders(id) );  CREATE TABLE mydb_discount_coupons (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   customer_id Int,   coupon_code Varchar,   discount_amount Real,   expires_at Datetime,   is_used Int,   created_at Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES mydb_customers(id) );

### Question:
Calculate the average price of all products that have a stock level below 10 units.
SELECT AVG(price) FROM mydb_products WHERE stock < 10;

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE cameras (   id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   location Text NOT NULL,   resolution_x Integer NOT NULL,   resolution_y Integer NOT NULL,   fps Integer NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE spots (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   camera_id Integer NOT NULL,   location TEXT NOT NULL,   is_occupied Boolean NOT NULL,   occupied_time Time NOT NULL,   is_overtime Boolean NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (camera_id) REFERENCES cameras (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE users (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   username TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   email TEXT NOT NULL,   password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,   created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );  CREATE TABLE roles (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   role_name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE user_roles (   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   role_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, role_id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),   FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES roles(id) );  CREATE TABLE camera_settings (   camera_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   exposure INTEGER,   white_balance TEXT,   brightness INTEGER,   contrast INTEGER,   PRIMARY KEY (camera_id),   FOREIGN KEY (camera_id) REFERENCES cameras(id) );  CREATE TABLE camera_maintenance (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   camera_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   maintenance_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   description TEXT,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   technician TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (camera_id) REFERENCES cameras(id) );  CREATE TABLE camera_calibration (   camera_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   horizontal_angle REAL,   vertical_angle REAL,   last_calibrated TIMESTAMP,   PRIMARY KEY (camera_id),   FOREIGN KEY (camera_id) REFERENCES cameras(id) );  CREATE TABLE camera_events (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   camera_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   event_type TEXT NOT NULL,   timestamp TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   metadata TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (camera_id) REFERENCES cameras(id) );  CREATE TABLE access_logs (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   camera_id INTEGER,   access_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   action TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),   FOREIGN KEY (camera_id) REFERENCES cameras(id) );  CREATE TABLE vehicle_types (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   type_name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   max_duration_minutes INTEGER );  CREATE TABLE parking_sessions (   spot_id TEXT NOT NULL,   vehicle_id TEXT,   entry_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   exit_time TIMESTAMP,   PRIMARY KEY (spot_id),   FOREIGN KEY (spot_id) REFERENCES spots(id) );  CREATE TABLE parking_payments (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   session_id TEXT NOT NULL,   amount REAL NOT NULL,   payment_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   method TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES parking_sessions(spot_id) );  CREATE TABLE overtime_penalties (   spot_id TEXT NOT NULL,   penalty_amount REAL NOT NULL,   issued TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   paid BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,   FOREIGN KEY (spot_id) REFERENCES spots(id) );  CREATE TABLE notification_logs (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   message TEXT NOT NULL,   sent_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   read BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE notification_preferences (   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   event_type TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, event_type),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE camera_groups (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   group_name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   description TEXT );  CREATE TABLE group_cameras (   group_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   camera_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (group_id, camera_id),   FOREIGN KEY (group_id) REFERENCES camera_groups(id),   FOREIGN KEY (camera_id) REFERENCES cameras(id) );  CREATE TABLE camera_zones (   camera_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   zone_name TEXT NOT NULL,   coordinates TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (camera_id, zone_name),   FOREIGN KEY (camera_id) REFERENCES cameras(id) );  CREATE TABLE maintenance_requests (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   camera_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   requested_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',   request_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   FOREIGN KEY (camera_id) REFERENCES cameras(id),   FOREIGN KEY (requested_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE system_updates (   version TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   release_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   description TEXT );  CREATE TABLE firmware_versions (   camera_model TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   firmware_version TEXT NOT NULL,   update_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE spot_sensors (   spot_id TEXT NOT NULL,   sensor_type TEXT NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',   last_reading TIMESTAMP,   PRIMARY KEY (spot_id),   FOREIGN KEY (spot_id) REFERENCES spots(id) );  CREATE INDEX idx_camera_events_camera on camera_events(camera_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_parking_sessions_spot on parking_sessions(spot_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_overtime_penalties_spot on overtime_penalties(spot_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_camera_zones_camera on camera_zones(camera_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_maintenance_requests_camera on maintenance_requests(camera_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_spot_sensors_spot on spot_sensors(spot_id);

### Question:
What are the usernames of the users who have accessed cameras with a resolution higher than 1920x1080 at least once?

SELECT DISTINCT users.username FROM users JOIN access_logs ON users.id = access_logs.user_id JOIN cameras ON access_logs.camera_id = cameras.id WHERE cameras.resolution_x > 1920 AND cameras.resolution_y > 1080;

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE estados (   uf Char NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nome Varchar NOT NULL,   regiao Char NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE cidades (   cod_cidade Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nome Varchar NOT NULL,   uf Char NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (uf) REFERENCES estados (uf) );  CREATE TABLE clientes (   cod_cliente Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nome Varchar NOT NULL,   data_cadastro Date NOT NULL,   tipo Char NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE pessoas_juridicas (   cod_cliente Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   razao_social Varchar NOT NULL,   cnpj Char NOT NULL UNIQUE,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cliente) REFERENCES clientes (cod_cliente) );  CREATE TABLE pessoas_fisicas (   cod_cliente Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   cpf Char NOT NULL UNIQUE,   genero Char NOT NULL,   data_nascimento Date NOT NULL,   cod_empresa Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cliente) REFERENCES clientes (cod_cliente) );  CREATE TABLE categorias (   cod_categoria Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nome Varchar NOT NULL,   cod_categoria_pai Numeric NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE produtos (   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nome Varchar NOT NULL,   data_lancamento Date NOT NULL,   importado Char NOT NULL,   preco Numeric NOT NULL,   prazo_entrega Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_categoria Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_categoria) REFERENCES categorias (cod_categoria) );  CREATE TABLE pedidos (   num_pedido Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   data_emissao Date NOT NULL,   cod_cliente Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cliente) REFERENCES clientes (cod_cliente) );  CREATE TABLE itens_pedidos (   num_pedido Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   quantidade Numeric NOT NULL,   valor_unitario Numeric NOT NULL,   num_entrega Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (num_pedido) REFERENCES pedidos (num_pedido),   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES produtos (cod_produto) );  CREATE TABLE entregas (   num_entrega Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   data Date NOT NULL,   placa Char NOT NULL,   mot_cnh Numeric NOT NULL,   mot_nome Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE enderecos (   cod_cliente Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_endereco Numeric NOT NULL,   rua Varchar NOT NULL,   numero Numeric NOT NULL,   complemento Varchar NOT NULL,   cep Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_cidade Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cliente) REFERENCES clientes (cod_cliente),   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cidade) REFERENCES cidades (cod_cidade) );  CREATE TABLE telefones (   id_telefone Char NOT NULL UNIQUE,   ddd Numeric NOT NULL,   numero Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_cliente Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cliente) REFERENCES clientes (cod_cliente) );  CREATE TABLE pecas (   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nome Varchar NOT NULL,   preco Numeric NOT NULL,   peso Numeric NOT NULL,   estoque Numeric NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE movimento_pecas (   num_movimentacao Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   data Date NOT NULL,   quantidade_movimentada Numeric NOT NULL,   tipo Char NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES pecas (cod_produto) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE fornecedores (   cod_fornecedor Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nome_fornecedor Varchar NOT NULL,   cnpj Char NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cnpj) REFERENCES pessoas_juridicas (cnpj) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE produtos_fornecedores (   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_fornecedor Numeric NOT NULL,   data_inicio Date NOT NULL,   data_fim Date,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES produtos (cod_produto),   FOREIGN KEY (cod_fornecedor) REFERENCES fornecedores (cod_fornecedor) );  CREATE TABLE formas_pagamento (   num_pedido Numeric NOT NULL,   tipo Char NOT NULL,   valor_total Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (num_pedido) REFERENCES pedidos (num_pedido) );  CREATE TABLE estoque_cidades (   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_cidade Numeric NOT NULL,   quantidade_atual Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES produtos (cod_produto),   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cidade) REFERENCES cidades (cod_cidade) );  CREATE TABLE avaliacoes_produtos (   cod_cliente Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   nota Numeric NOT NULL,   comentario Varchar,   data_criacao Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cliente) REFERENCES clientes (cod_cliente),   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES produtos (cod_produto) );  CREATE TABLE promocoes (   cod_promocao Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nome Varchar NOT NULL,   data_inicio Date NOT NULL,   data_fim Date NOT NULL,   desconto_percentual Numeric NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (cod_promocao) );  CREATE TABLE produtos_promocoes (   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_promocao Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES produtos (cod_produto),   FOREIGN KEY (cod_promocao) REFERENCES promocoes (cod_promocao) );  CREATE TABLE garantias_produtos (   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   data_inicio Date NOT NULL,   data_fim Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES produtos (cod_produto) );  CREATE TABLE tickets_suporte_cliente (   cod_ticket Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   cod_cliente Numeric NOT NULL,   data_abertura Date NOT NULL,   status Char NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cliente) REFERENCES clientes (cod_cliente) );  CREATE TABLE transferencias_estoque (   num_transferencia Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_cidade_origem Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_cidade_destino Numeric NOT NULL,   quantidade Numeric NOT NULL,   data_transferencia Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES produtos (cod_produto),   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cidade_origem) REFERENCES cidades (cod_cidade),   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cidade_destino) REFERENCES cidades (cod_cidade) );  CREATE TABLE desempenho_fornecedores (   cod_fornecedor Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   pontuacao Numeric NOT NULL,   comentario Varchar,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_fornecedor) REFERENCES fornecedores (cod_fornecedor),   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES produtos (cod_produto) );  CREATE TABLE programa_fidelidade (   cod_cliente Numeric NOT NULL,   pontos_acumulados Numeric NOT NULL,   data_inicio Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cliente) REFERENCES clientes (cod_cliente) );  CREATE TABLE devolucoes_produtos (   cod_devolucao Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   quantidade_devolvida Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_devolucao) REFERENCES solicitacoes_devolucao (cod_devolucao),   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES produtos (cod_produto) );  CREATE TABLE cartoes_presente (   cod_cartao Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   cod_cliente Numeric NOT NULL,   valor Numeric NOT NULL,   data_validade Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cliente) REFERENCES clientes (cod_cliente) );  CREATE TABLE estoque_reserva_regional (   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   cod_cidade Numeric NOT NULL,   quantidade_reservada Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES produtos (cod_produto),   FOREIGN KEY (cod_cidade) REFERENCES cidades (cod_cidade) );  CREATE TABLE servicos_manutencao (   cod_servico_manutencao Numeric NOT NULL UNIQUE,   cod_produto Numeric NOT NULL,   descricao Varchar NOT NULL,   custo Servico,   FOREIGN KEY (cod_produto) REFERENCES produtos (cod_produto) );

### Question:
Identify the customers who purchased the 'Wireless Headphones' between 2022-01-01 and 2022-12-31 and have a 'gold' status in the loyalty program.

SELECT p.cod_cliente FROM pedidos p JOIN itens_pedidos i ON p.num_pedido = i.num_pedido JOIN produtos pro ON i.cod_produto = pro.cod_produto JOIN programa_fidelidade f ON p.cod_cliente = f.cod_cliente WHERE pro.nome = 'Wireless Headphones'   AND p.data_emissao BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31';

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE colaborador (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   data_criacao Timestamp NOT NULL,   data_alteracao Timestamp NOT NULL,   matricula Varchar NOT NULL,   data_cadastro Date NOT NULL,   data_admissao Date NOT NULL,   data_demissao Date NOT NULL,   observacao Text NOT NULL,   pessoa_id BigInt NOT NULL );

### Question:
What is the average number of days between data_criacao and data_alteracao for collaborators with an observation text containing 'pending'?
SELECT    AVG(     COALESCE(JULIANDAY(data_alteracao) - JULIANDAY(data_criacao), 0)    ) AS average_days FROM colaborador WHERE observacao LIKE '%pending%';

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_district (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   code Varchar NOT NULL,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   updated Datetime NOT NULL,   city_fk BigInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_city (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   state_fk BigInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_state (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   country_fk BigInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_country (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_postalcode (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   code Varchar NOT NULL,   district_fk BigInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_address (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   street Varchar NOT NULL,   house_number Varchar NOT NULL,   remark Varchar,   postalcode_fk BigInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_link (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   url Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_staff (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   since Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_category (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_language (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_film (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   description Text,   created Datetime NOT NULL,   modified Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_filmactor (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   film_fk BigInt NOT NULL,   actor_fk BigInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_filmdirector (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   film_fk BigInt NOT NULL,   director_fk BigInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_filmcategory (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   film_fk BigInt NOT NULL,   category_fk BigInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE moviestore_db_filmcopy (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   price Decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,   last_rent Datetime,   inventory_number Varchar NOT NULL,   film_fk BigInt NOT NULL,   store_fk BigInt NOT NULL ); ### Question:
What is the total number of sacks in each rice lot by type of rice, and what is the corresponding producer's name for the lot with the highest number of sacks?

WITH TypeTotals AS (     SELECT          t.nombre AS tipo_arroz,         SUM(a.numero_sacos) AS total_sacos     FROM lote_arroz a     JOIN tipo_arroz t ON a.tipo_arroz_id = t.tipo_arroz_id     GROUP BY t.nombre ), MaxSackLot AS (     SELECT          a.productor_id,         a.numero_sacos     FROM lote_arroz a     ORDER BY a.numero_sacos DESC     LIMIT 1 ) SELECT      tt.tipo_arroz,     tt.total_sacos,     (p.nombre || ' ' || p.apellido_paterno || ' ' || p.apellido_materno) AS productor_nombre FROM MaxSackLot m JOIN productor p ON m.productor_id = p.productor_id CROSS JOIN TypeTotals tt;

### Question:
What is the total approved expense amount for each program staff member's assigned tasks, grouped by department and compared to the allocated budget?

SELECT      d.dept_name,     SUM(pe.amount) AS total_approved_expense,     COALESCE(SUM(ab.allocated_amount), 0) AS total_allocated_budget FROM      program_expenses pe JOIN program_staff ps ON pe.program_staff_id = ps.program_staff_id JOIN employees e ON ps.program_admin = e.emp_no JOIN dept_emp de ON e.emp_no = de.emp_no JOIN departments d ON CAST(de.dept_no AS INTEGER) = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN activities a ON a.dept_no = de.dept_no LEFT JOIN activity_budget ab ON a.activity_id = ab.activity_id WHERE      pe.approved = 1 GROUP BY      d.dept_name;

### Question:
Retrieve the names of students who voted for a candidate with the slogan "Unity and Progress".
SELECT p.nama_pemilih FROM voting v JOIN kandidat k ON v.id_kandidat = k.id_kandidat JOIN pemilih p ON v.id_pemilih = p.id_pemilih WHERE k.slogan = "Unity and Progress";

### Question:
What is the total number of lab_results per test_name for patients who have a vital_trend of 'Fever' in the 'Medical' room type and were assigned a visit_schedule with a 'Nurse Sarah Lee' before their discharge_date, grouped by the month of the admission_date?

SELECT      strftime('%m', pa.admission_date) AS admission_month,     lr.test_name,     COUNT(*) AS total_lab_results FROM lab_results lr JOIN patient_admissions pa ON lr.admission_id = pa.id JOIN rooms r ON pa.room_id = r.id JOIN vital_trends vt ON vt.admission_id = pa.id AND vt.patient = pa.patient JOIN visit_schedules vs ON vs.patient = pa.patient JOIN nurses n ON vs.nurse_id = n.id WHERE r.type = 'Medical'     AND vt.trend_type = 'Fever'     AND n.name = 'Sarah Lee'     AND vs.visit_date < pa.discharge_date GROUP BY admission_month, lr.test_name ORDER BY admission_month, lr.test_name;

 CREATE TABLE applicationdefinition_customBackends_configVariables (   applicationdefinition_entid TEXT NOT NULL,   backendmodel_entid TEXT NOT NULL,   key TEXT NOT NULL,   entid TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY );  CREATE TABLE applicationdefinition_eventHooks (   applicationdefinition_entid TEXT NOT NULL,   eventmodel_entid TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE applicationdefinition_eventHooks_webhookURLs (   applicationdefinition_entid TEXT NOT NULL,   eventmodel_entid TEXT NOT NULL,   webhook TEXT NOT NULL );

### Question:
List all application instances that have at least 3 exposed service resources and 2 backend configurations with 'API_KEY' in their config key. For each, show the count of associated webhook URLs and the number of access rules with 'write' conditions in their relation bindings, requiring joins through backends, event hooks, bindings, and access rules.

WITH qualified_app_instances AS (     SELECT applicationinstance_entid     FROM appinstance_exposedServices     GROUP BY applicationinstance_entid     HAVING COUNT(resources_entid) >= 3 ), qualified_backends AS (     SELECT ab.applicationdefinition_entid     FROM applicationdefinition_customBackends ab     JOIN applicationdefinition_customBackends_configVariables abcv         ON ab.applicationdefinition_entid = abcv.applicationdefinition_entid         AND ab.backendmodel_entid = abcv.backendmodel_entid     WHERE abcv.key = 'API_KEY'     GROUP BY ab.applicationdefinition_entid     HAVING COUNT(abcv.entid) >= 2 ), webhook_counts AS (     SELECT eh.applicationdefinition_entid, COUNT(wh.webhook) AS webhook_count     FROM applicationdefinition_eventHooks eh     JOIN applicationdefinition_eventHooks_webhookURLs wh         ON eh.applicationdefinition_entid = wh.applicationdefinition_entid         AND eh.eventmodel_entid = wh.eventmodel_entid     GROUP BY eh.applicationdefinition_entid ), access_rule_counts AS (     SELECT rb.relationbindingmodel_entid, COUNT(*) AS write_condition_count     FROM relationbinding_customAccessRules_conditions rb     WHERE rb.condition = 'write'     GROUP BY rb.relationbindingmodel_entid ) SELECT a.applicationinstance_entid,         COALESCE(w.webhook_count, 0) AS webhook_count,        COALESCE(ar.write_condition_count, 0) AS write_condition_count FROM qualified_app_instances a JOIN applicationinstance_bindings b ON a.applicationinstance_entid = b.applicationinstance_entid JOIN relationbinding_customAccessRules r ON b.bindingmodel_entid = r.relationbindingmodel_entid JOIN access_rule_counts ar ON r.relationbindingmodel_entid = ar.relationbindingmodel_entid JOIN applicationdefinition_customBackends ab ON b.applicationinstance_entid = ab.applicationdefinition_entid JOIN qualified_backends q ON ab.applicationdefinition_entid = q.applicationdefinition_entid LEFT JOIN webhook_counts w ON ab.applicationdefinition_entid = w.applicationdefinition_entid GROUP BY a.applicationinstance_entid, w.webhook_count, ar.write_condition_count HAVING w.webhook_count IS NOT NULL;

CREATE TABLE statistics_schedule (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   time_to_update Datetime NOT NULL,   repository_id BigInt NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id) );

### Question:
Which repositories had their schedule statistics updated in consecutive days, and what is the total count of such consecutive update sequences over the past year?

WITH   daily_updates AS (     SELECT        repository_id,       DATE(time_to_update) AS update_date     FROM statistics_schedule     WHERE time_to_update >= DATE('now', '-1 year')   ),   ranked_updates AS (     SELECT        repository_id,       update_date,       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY repository_id ORDER BY update_date) AS rn     FROM daily_updates   ),   grouped_sequences AS (     SELECT        repository_id,       update_date - rn AS grp,       COUNT(*) AS seq_length     FROM ranked_updates     GROUP BY repository_id, grp   ),   valid_sequences AS (     SELECT        repository_id     FROM grouped_sequences     WHERE seq_length >= 2     GROUP BY repository_id   ),   total_sequences AS (     SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_seq_count     FROM grouped_sequences     WHERE seq_length >= 2   ) SELECT    repository_id,   (SELECT total_seq_count FROM total_sequences) AS total_sequences FROM valid_sequences ORDER BY repository_id;

CREATE TABLE canton (   id SmallInt NOT NULL,   nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   siglas Varchar NOT NULL,   id_provincia SmallInt NOT NULL,   activo TinyInt NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',   FOREIGN KEY (id_provincia) REFERENCES provincia (id) );  CREATE TABLE entidad (   id SmallInt NOT NULL,   nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   siglas Varchar NOT NULL,   id_parroquia SmallInt NOT NULL,   activo TinyInt NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',   fecha_ingreso Timestamp NOT NULL,   fecha_edicion Timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',   FOREIGN KEY (id_parroquia) REFERENCES parroquia (id) );  CREATE TABLE pais (   id SmallInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   siglas Varchar NOT NULL,   activo TinyInt NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',   fecha_ingreso Timestamp,   fecha_edicion Timestamp,   PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE parroquia (   id SmallInt NOT NULL,   nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   siglas Varchar NOT NULL,   id_canton SmallInt NOT NULL,   activo TinyInt NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',   fecha_ingreso Timestamp,   fecha_edicion Timestamp,   FOREIGN KEY (id_canton) REFERENCES canton (id) );  CREATE TABLE provincia (   id SmallInt NOT NULL,   nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   siglas Varchar NOT NULL,   id_pais SmallInt NOT NULL,   activo TinyInt NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',   fecha_ingreso Timestamp,   fecha_edicion Timestamp,   FOREIGN KEY (id_pais) REFERENCES pais (id) );  CREATE TABLE unidad (   id SmallInt NOT NULL,   nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   siglas Varchar NOT NULL,   activo TinyInt NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',   fecha_ingreso Timestamp NOT NULL,   fecha_edicion Timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',   id_entidad SmallInt NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_entidad) REFERENCES unidad (id) );

### Question:
What is the difference between the maximum and minimum values of the active unit-to-entity ratio across all cantons, excluding those with fewer than 5 active entities and only including cantons in provinces of countries with more than 5 provinces and at least 10 parishes?

WITH eligible_countries AS (     SELECT p.id AS pais_id     FROM pais p     JOIN provincia pr ON p.id = pr.id_pais     JOIN canton c ON pr.id = c.id_provincia     JOIN parroquia pa ON c.id = pa.id_canton     GROUP BY p.id     HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) > 5     AND COUNT(DISTINCT pa.id) >= 10 ), eligible_provinces AS (     SELECT pr.id AS provincia_id     FROM provincia pr     JOIN eligible_countries ec ON pr.id_pais = ec.pais_id ), eligible_cantons AS (     SELECT c.id AS canton_id     FROM canton c     JOIN eligible_provinces ep ON c.id_provincia = ep.provincia_id ), active_entities_per_canton AS (     SELECT c.id AS canton_id, COUNT(e.id) AS active_entities     FROM canton c     JOIN parroquia pa ON c.id = pa.id_canton     JOIN entidad e ON pa.id = e.id_parroquia     WHERE e.activo = 1     AND c.id IN (SELECT canton_id FROM eligible_cantons)     GROUP BY c.id     HAVING COUNT(e.id) >= 5 ), active_units_per_canton AS (     SELECT c.id AS canton_id, COUNT(u.id) AS active_units     FROM canton c     JOIN parroquia pa ON c.id = pa.id_canton     JOIN entidad e ON pa.id = e.id_parroquia     JOIN unidad u ON e.id = u.id_entidad     WHERE e.activo = 1 AND u.activo = 1     AND c.id IN (SELECT canton_id FROM eligible_cantons)     GROUP BY c.id ), ratios AS (     SELECT          ae.canton_id,         ae.active_entities,         au.active_units,         CAST(au.active_units AS REAL) / ae.active_entities AS ratio     FROM active_entities_per_canton ae     JOIN active_units_per_canton au ON ae.canton_id = au.canton_id ) SELECT MAX(ratio) - MIN(ratio) AS difference FROM ratios;

quantidade INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (cart_id) REFERENCES carrinho_usuario(id),   FOREIGN KEY (produto_id) REFERENCES registros(id) );  CREATE TABLE pedidos (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   cart_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   data_pedido TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES usuarios_registro(id),   FOREIGN KEY (cart_id) REFERENCES carrinho_usuario(id) );  CREATE TABLE comentarios_registro (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   registro_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   comentario TEXT NOT NULL,   data_comentario TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   FOREIGN KEY (registro_id) REFERENCES registros(id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES usuarios_registro(id) );  CREATE TABLE pedido_status (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   pedido_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   status VARCHAR NOT NULL,   data_status TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   FOREIGN KEY (pedido_id) REFERENCES pedidos(id) );  CREATE TABLE eventos (   event_id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   title VARCHAR NOT NULL,   date_event TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE evento_details (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   event_id TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   location VARCHAR NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES eventos(event_id) );  CREATE TABLE registro_tags (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   registro_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   tag TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (registro_id) REFERENCES registros(id) );  CREATE TABLE usuario_following (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   follower_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   following_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (follower_id) REFERENCES usuarios_registro(id),   FOREIGN KEY (following_id) REFERENCES usuarios_registro(id) );  CREATE TABLE imagem_registro (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   registro_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   url_imagem TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (registro_id) REFERENCES registros(id) );  CREATE TABLE usuario_analytics (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   total_logins INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   last_login TIMESTAMP,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES usuarios_registro(id) ); ### Question:
Compile a detailed report that includes the titles and images of all registered items, the number of times each has been viewed, the average rating given by users, and the bios of the top three reviewers for each item. Include only items that have at least one saved entry and have been purchased within the last 12 months.

WITH ranked_reviewers AS (     SELECT         a.registro_id,         a.user_id,         AVG(a.nota) AS avg_rating,         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.registro_id ORDER BY AVG(a.nota) DESC) AS rn     FROM avaliacoes_registro a     GROUP BY a.registro_id, a.user_id ) SELECT     r.titulo,     GROUP_CONCAT(i.url_imagem) AS images,     COUNT(v.id) AS view_count,     ROUND(AVG(a.nota), 2) AS average_rating,     GROUP_CONCAT(u.bio) AS top_reviewers_bios FROM registros r JOIN imagem_registro i ON r.id = i.registro_id LEFT JOIN registro_views v ON r.id = v.registro_id LEFT JOIN avaliacoes_registro a ON r.id = a.registro_id LEFT JOIN ranked_reviewers rr ON r.id = rr.registro_id AND rr.rn <= 3 LEFT JOIN usuario_profile u ON rr.user_id = u.user_id WHERE EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM usuario_salvos s         WHERE s.registro_id = r.id     )     AND EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM pedidos p         JOIN carrinho_itens ci ON p.cart_id = ci.cart_id         JOIN pagamento pa ON p.id = pa.pedido_id         WHERE pa.status = 'completed'             AND ci.produto_id = r.id             AND p.data_pedido >= date('now', '-12 months')     ) GROUP BY r.id, r.titulo ORDER BY r.id;

### Question:
Find the users who have reviewed a meal with a rating of 5 stars and also have a message thread with the user who created that meal.

WITH FiveStarReviewers AS (   SELECT mr.user_id, mr.meal_id   FROM public_meal_reviews mr   WHERE mr.rating = 5 ), MealCreators AS (   SELECT m.id AS meal_id, m.created_by   FROM public_meals m ) SELECT DISTINCT fsr.user_id FROM FiveStarReviewers fsr JOIN MealCreators mc ON fsr.meal_id = mc.meal_id JOIN public_message_threads mt   ON (mt.sender_id = fsr.user_id AND mt.receiver_id = mc.created_by)      OR (mt.sender_id = mc.created_by AND mt.receiver_id = fsr.user_id);

### Question:
Which categories have the highest number of models with a version greater than the average version across all models? Show the category names and counts.

WITH category_counts AS (     SELECT CATEGORY_, COUNT(*) AS cnt     FROM ACT_RE_MODEL     WHERE VERSION_ > (SELECT AVG(VERSION_) FROM ACT_RE_MODEL)     GROUP BY CATEGORY_ ) SELECT CATEGORY_, cnt FROM category_counts WHERE cnt = (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM category_counts);

### Question:
What is the total revenue generated by products from the brand that has the highest average selling price?

SELECT * FROM (     SELECT SUM(b.harga_jual) AS total_revenue     FROM barang b     WHERE b.id_merek = (         SELECT m.id_merek         FROM barang m         GROUP BY m.id_merek         ORDER BY AVG(m.harga_jual) DESC         LIMIT 1     ) );

### Question:
How many customers have made a reservation for a vehicle in the last 30 days?

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM (     SELECT DISTINCT D.CLI_NUM     FROM CL_DEMANDE D     WHERE D.DEM_NUMRESA IN (         SELECT R.DEM_NUMRESA         FROM CL_RESERVATION R         WHERE R.RES_DATECONF >= DATE('now', '-30 days')     ) );

CREATE TABLE zts_store_certificates (   provider Varchar NOT NULL,   instanceId Varchar NOT NULL,   service Varchar NOT NULL,   currentSerial Varchar NOT NULL,   currentTime Datetime NOT NULL,   currentIP Varchar NOT NULL,   prevSerial Varchar NOT NULL,   prevTime Datetime NOT NULL,   prevIP Varchar NOT NULL,   clientCert TinyInt NOT NULL,   lastNotifiedTime Datetime,   lastNotifiedServer Varchar,   expiryTime Datetime,   hostName Varchar );  CREATE TABLE zts_store_ssh_certificates (   instanceId Varchar NOT NULL,   service Varchar NOT NULL,   principals Varchar NOT NULL,   clientIP Varchar NOT NULL,   privateIP Varchar NOT NULL,   issueTime Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE zts_store_workloads (   provider Varchar NOT NULL,   service Varchar NOT NULL,   ip Varchar NOT NULL,   instanceId Varchar NOT NULL,   hostname Varchar NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NA',   creationTime Datetime,   updateTime Datetime,   certExpiryTime Datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '1970-01-01 00:00:00.000' );  CREATE TABLE zts_audit_ssh_certificate (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     instanceId VARCHAR NOT NULL,     service VARCHAR NOT NULL,     action VARCHAR NOT NULL,     timestamp DATETIME NOT NULL,     modifiedBy VARCHAR,     FOREIGN KEY (instanceId, service) REFERENCES zts_store_ssh_certificates(instanceId, service) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE zts_audit_workload (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     provider VARCHAR NOT NULL,     service VARCHAR NOT NULL,     ip VARCHAR NOT NULL,     action VARCHAR NOT NULL,     timestamp DATETIME NOT NULL,     modifiedBy VARCHAR,     FOREIGN KEY (provider, service, ip) REFERENCES zts_store_workloads(provider, service, ip) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE zts_certificate_renewal (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     provider VARCHAR NOT NULL,     instanceId VARCHAR NOT NULL,     service VARCHAR NOT NULL,     renewalTime DATETIME NOT NULL,     isActive BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,     lastRenewal DATETIME,     FOREIGN KEY (provider, instanceId, service) REFERENCES zts_store_certificates(provider, instanceId, service) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE zts_ssh_cert_renewal (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     instanceId VARCHAR NOT NULL,     service VARCHAR NOT NULL,     renewalTime DATETIME NOT NULL,     isActive BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,     lastRenewal DATETIME,     FOREIGN KEY (instanceId, service) REFERENCES zts_store_ssh_certificates(instanceId, service) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE zts_crl_entries (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     provider VARCHAR NOT NULL,     instanceId VARCHAR NOT NULL,     service VARCHAR NOT NULL,     revocationTime DATETIME NOT NULL,     revocationReason VARCHAR,     isActive BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,     FOREIGN KEY (provider, instanceId, service) REFERENCES zts_store_certificates(provider, instanceId, service) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE zts_workload_status (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     provider VARCHAR NOT NULL,     service VARCHAR NOT NULL,     instanceId VARCHAR NOT NULL,     previousStatus VARCHAR NOT NULL,     newStatus VARCHAR NOT NULL,     statusChangeTime DATETIME NOT NULL,     FOREIGN KEY (provider, service, instanceId) REFERENCES zts_store_workloads(provider, service, instanceId) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE zts_certificate_request (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     provider VARCHAR NOT NULL,     instanceId VARCHAR NOT NULL,     service VARCHAR NOT NULL,     requestTime DATETIME NOT NULL,     status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',     approver VARCHAR,     approvalTime DATETIME,     FOREIGN KEY (provider, instanceId, service) REFERENCES zts_store_certificates(provider, instanceId, service) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE zts_ssh_certificate_request (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     instanceId VARCHAR NOT NULL,     service VARCHAR NOT NULL,     requestTime DATETIME NOT NULL,     status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',     approver VARCHAR,     approvalTime DATETIME,     FOREIGN KEY (instanceId, service) REFERENCES zts_store_ssh_certificates(instanceId, service) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE zts_provider_accounts (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     provider VARCHAR NOT NULL,     creationTime DATETIME NOT NULL,     lastModified DATETIME NOT NULL,     accountManager VARCHAR,     status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',     FOREIGN KEY (provider) REFERENCES zts_store_certificates(provider) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE zts_service_health (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     service VARCHAR NOT NULL,     instanceId VARCHAR NOT NULL,     checkTime DATETIME NOT NULL,     status VARCHAR,     healthDetails VARCHAR,     FOREIGN KEY (service, instanceId) REFERENCES zts_store_workloads(service, instanceId) );  CREATE INDEX idx_zts_audit_ssh_certificate_foreign ON zts_audit_ssh_certificate(instanceId, service);  CREATE INDEX idx_zts_audit_workload_foreign ON zts_audit_workload(provider, service, ip);  CREATE INDEX idx_zts_certificate_renewal_foreign ON zts_certificate_renewal(provider, instanceId, service);  CREATE INDEX idx_zts_ssh_cert_renewal_foreign ON zts_ssh_cert_renewal(instanceId, service);  CREATE INDEX idx_zts_crl_entries_foreign ON zts_crl_entries(provider, instanceId, service);  CREATE INDEX idx_zts_workload_status_foreign ON zts_workload_status(provider, service, instanceId);  CREATE INDEX idx_zts_certificate_request_foreign ON zts_certificate_request(provider, instanceId, service);  CREATE INDEX idx_zts_ssh_cert_req_foreign ON zts_ssh_certificate_request(instanceId, service);  CREATE INDEX idx_zts_provider_accounts_provider ON zts_provider_accounts(provider);

### Question:
What is the count of SSH certificate requests that have been approved after their corresponding certificate was last renewed?

SELECT COUNT(req.id)  FROM zts_ssh_certificate_request req JOIN zts_audit_ssh_certificate a      ON req.instanceId = a.instanceId      AND req.service = a.service      AND a.action = 'approve' JOIN zts_ssh_cert_renewal r      ON req.instanceId = r.instanceId      AND req.service = r.service  WHERE req.approvalTime > r.lastRenewal;

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE QUERY (   QueryKey Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   PoolKey Int NOT NULL,   DeviceKey Int NOT NULL,   DestinationPoolKey Int NOT NULL,   Status Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (QueryKey) );  CREATE TABLE QUERYITEM (   QueryItemKey Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   QueryKey Int NOT NULL,   Status Varchar NOT NULL,   PatientName Varchar NOT NULL,   PatientID Varchar NOT NULL,   AccessionNumber Varchar NOT NULL,   PatientBirthDate Varchar NOT NULL,   StudyDate Varchar NOT NULL,   ModalitiesInStudy Varchar NOT NULL,   StudyDescription Varchar NOT NULL,   AnonymizedName Varchar NOT NULL,   AnonymizedID Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (QueryItemKey),   FOREIGN KEY (QueryKey) REFERENCES QUERY (QueryKey) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE QUERYRESULT (   QueryResultKey Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   QueryItemKey Int NOT NULL,   Status Varchar NOT NULL,   DoFetch Char NOT NULL,   StudyInstanceUID Varchar NOT NULL,   PatientName Varchar NOT NULL,   PatientID Varchar NOT NULL,   AccessionNumber Varchar NOT NULL,   PatientBirthDate Varchar NOT NULL,   StudyDate Varchar NOT NULL,   ModalitiesInStudy Varchar NOT NULL,   StudyDescription Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (QueryResultKey),   FOREIGN KEY (QueryItemKey) REFERENCES QUERYITEM (QueryItemKey) ON DELETE CASCADE );

### Question:
How many query results have been marked as 'Completed' for each combination of source device and destination pool, and what is the average number of query items per query that resulted in at least one completed query result? Additionally, provide the total number of unique patients involved in these completed query results, categorized by their anonymized ID and birth date ranges.

WITH CompletedQueries AS (     SELECT          Q.DeviceKey,         Q.DestinationPoolKey,         QI.QueryItemKey     FROM QUERY Q     JOIN QUERYITEM QI ON Q.QueryKey = QI.QueryKey     JOIN QUERYRESULT QR ON QI.QueryItemKey = QR.QueryItemKey     WHERE QR.Status = 'Completed' ), QueryStats AS (     SELECT          AVG(ItemCount) AS AvgItemsPerQuery     FROM (         SELECT              COUNT(QI2.QueryItemKey) AS ItemCount         FROM QUERY Q2         JOIN QUERYITEM QI2 ON Q2.QueryKey = QI2.QueryKey         WHERE Q2.QueryKey IN (             SELECT DISTINCT Q3.QueryKey             FROM QUERY Q3             JOIN QUERYITEM QI3 ON Q3.QueryKey = QI3.QueryKey             JOIN QUERYRESULT QR3 ON QI3.QueryItemKey = QR3.QueryItemKey             WHERE QR3.Status = 'Completed'         )         GROUP BY Q2.QueryKey     ) ), UniquePatients AS (     SELECT          QI.PatientID,         QI.PatientBirthDate     FROM QUERY Q     JOIN QUERYITEM QI ON Q.QueryKey = QI.QueryKey     JOIN QUERYRESULT QR ON QI.QueryItemKey = QR.QueryItemKey     WHERE QR.Status = 'Completed'     GROUP BY QI.PatientID, QI.PatientBirthDate ) SELECT      C.DeviceKey,     C.DestinationPoolKey,     COUNT(*) AS CompletedCount,     (SELECT AvgItemsPerQuery FROM QueryStats) AS AvgItemsPerQuery,     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UniquePatients) AS UniquePatientCount,     P.PatientID,     P.PatientBirthDate FROM CompletedQueries C JOIN UniquePatients P ON 1=1 GROUP BY C.DeviceKey, C.DestinationPoolKey, P.PatientID, P.PatientBirthDate;

CREATE TABLE curso (   idcur TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nomecur Text NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE aluno (   idalu TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nomealu Text NOT NULL,   tipoalu TEXT NOT NULL,   idcurso Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idcurso) REFERENCES curso (idcur) );  CREATE TABLE disciplina (   iddis TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nomedis Text NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE pre_requisito (   iddis Int NOT NULL,   idpre Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (iddis) REFERENCES disciplina (iddis),   FOREIGN KEY (idpre) REFERENCES disciplina (iddis) );  CREATE TABLE professor (   idprof TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nomepro Text NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE turma (   idtur TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   iddis Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   ano Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   semestre Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   codtur Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   FOREIGN KEY (iddis) REFERENCES disciplina (iddis) );  CREATE TABLE turpro (   idtur Int NOT NULL,   idprof Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idtur) REFERENCES turma (idtur),   FOREIGN KEY (idprof) REFERENCES professor (idprof) );  CREATE TABLE historico (   idtur Int NOT NULL,   idalu Int NOT NULL,   nota Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idtur) REFERENCES turma (idtur),   FOREIGN KEY (idalu) REFERENCES aluno (idalu) );  CREATE TABLE documento_curso (   iddoc TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idcur TEXT NOT NULL,   descricao TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (idcur) REFERENCES curso(idcur) );  CREATE TABLE disciplina_documento (   iddocdis TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   iddis TEXT NOT NULL,   descricao TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (iddis) REFERENCES disciplina(iddis) );  CREATE TABLE aluno_documento (   iddocalu TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idalu TEXT NOT NULL,   tipo_documento TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idalu) REFERENCES aluno(idalu) );  CREATE TABLE professor_documento (   iddocpro TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idprof TEXT NOT NULL,   tipo_documento TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idprof) REFERENCES professor(idprof) );  CREATE TABLE matricula_aluno (   idmatalu TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idalu TEXT NOT NULL,   idcur TEXT NOT NULL,   ano_matricula INTEGER NOT NULL,   semestre_matricula INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idalu) REFERENCES aluno(idalu),   FOREIGN KEY (idcur) REFERENCES curso(idcur) );  CREATE TABLE turma_presenca (   idturpre TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idtur TEXT NOT NULL,   idalu TEXT NOT NULL,   data_presenca DATE NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idtur) REFERENCES turma(idtur),   FOREIGN KEY (idalu) REFERENCES aluno(idalu) );  CREATE TABLE disciplina_syllabus (   idsyllab TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   iddis TEXT NOT NULL,   content TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (iddis) REFERENCES disciplina(iddis) );  CREATE TABLE turma_exame (   idexame TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idtur TEXT NOT NULL,   data_exame DATE NOT NULL,   peso INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idtur) REFERENCES turma(idtur) );  CREATE TABLE aluno_avaliacao (   idavalalu TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idtur TEXT NOT NULL,   idalu TEXT NOT NULL,   avaliacao INTEGER,   comentarios TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (idtur) REFERENCES turma(idtur),   FOREIGN KEY (idalu) REFERENCES aluno(idalu) );  CREATE TABLE professor_avaliado (   idavalpro TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idprof TEXT NOT NULL,   idtur TEXT NOT NULL,   avaliacao INTEGER,   FOREIGN KEY (idprof) REFERENCES professor(idprof),   FOREIGN KEY (idtur) REFERENCES turma(idtur) );  CREATE TABLE historico_componentes (   idcomp TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idtur INT NOT NULL,   peso_componente INTEGER NOT NULL,   descricao TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idtur) REFERENCES turma(idtur) );  CREATE TABLE turma_agenda (   idagendatur TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idtur TEXT NOT NULL,   data_agenda DATE NOT NULL,   assunto TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idtur) REFERENCES turma(idtur) );  CREATE TABLE disciplina_recursos (   idrecdis TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   iddis TEXT NOT NULL,   tipo_recurso TEXT NOT NULL,   descricao TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (iddis) REFERENCES disciplina(iddis) );  CREATE TABLE aluno_notificacao (   idnotalu TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idalu TEXT NOT NULL,   mensagem TEXT NOT NULL,   lida BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (idalu) REFERENCES aluno(idalu) );  CREATE TABLE professor_notificacao (   idnotpro TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idprof TEXT NOT NULL,   mensagem TEXT NOT NULL,   lida BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (idprof) REFERENCES professor(idprof) );  CREATE TABLE aluno_registro_falta (   idfault TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idtur TEXT NOT NULL,   idalu TEXT NOT NULL,   data_falta DATE NOT NULL,   motivo TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (idtur) REFERENCES turma(idtur),   FOREIGN KEY (idalu) REFERENCES aluno(idalu) );  CREATE TABLE turma_local (   idlocal TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idtur TEXT NOT NULL,   nome_sala TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idtur) REFERENCES turma(idtur) );  CREATE TABLE aluno_observacao (   idobsalu TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idalu TEXT NOT NULL,   descricao TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idalu) REFERENCES aluno(idalu) );  CREATE TABLE curso_coordenador (   idcoorcur TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   idcur TEXT NOT NULL,   idprof TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (idcur) REFERENCES curso(idcur),   FOREIGN KEY (idprof) REFERENCES professor(idprof) ); ### Question:
Which level has the highest average content rating among players who have played it for more than 30 minutes?

SELECT cr.level_id FROM content_ratings cr JOIN (     SELECT DISTINCT level_id     FROM level_play_history     WHERE duration > 30 ) AS long_players ON cr.level_id = long_players.level_id GROUP BY cr.level_id ORDER BY AVG(cr.rating) DESC LIMIT 1;

CREATE TABLE seckill_user (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nickname Varchar NOT NULL,   password Varchar NOT NULL,   salt Varchar NOT NULL,   head Varchar NOT NULL,   register_date Datetime NOT NULL,   last_login_date Datetime NOT NULL,   login_count Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE item_category (   item_id Int NOT NULL,   category Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (item_id),   FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES item(item_id) );  CREATE TABLE seckill_order (   order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   item_id Int NOT NULL,   seckill_id Int NOT NULL,   order_time Datetime NOT NULL,   total_price numeric(10,2) NOT NULL,   status Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES seckill_user(id),   FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES item(item_id) );  CREATE TABLE order_detail (   order_id Int NOT NULL,   line_item Int NOT NULL,   item_id Int NOT NULL,   quantity Int NOT NULL,   price numeric(10,2) NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (order_id, line_item),   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES seckill_order(order_id),   FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES item(item_id) );  CREATE TABLE payment (   payment_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   order_id Int NOT NULL,   payment_time Datetime NOT NULL,   amount numeric(10,2) NOT NULL,   method Varchar NOT NULL,   status Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES seckill_order(order_id) );  CREATE TABLE shipping_address (   address_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   address_line Varchar NOT NULL,   city Varchar NOT NULL,   state Varchar,   zipcode Varchar NOT NULL,   country Varchar NOT NULL,   phone Varchar,   is_default Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES seckill_user(id) );  CREATE TABLE user_address_mapping (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   address_id Int NOT NULL,   is_primary Int NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, address_id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES seckill_user(id),   FOREIGN KEY (address_id) REFERENCES shipping_address(address_id) );  CREATE TABLE product_review (   review_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   item_id Int NOT NULL,   rating Int NOT NULL,   comment TEXT,   review_time Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES seckill_user(id),   FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES item(item_id) );  CREATE TABLE system_log (   log_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   user_id TEXT,   activity_type Varchar NOT NULL,   activity_message TEXT NOT NULL,   log_time Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES seckill_user(id) );  CREATE TABLE stock_log (   log_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   item_id Int NOT NULL,   old_count Int NOT NULL,   new_count Int NOT NULL,   change_time Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES item_stock(item_id) );  CREATE TABLE notification (   notification_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   message TEXT NOT NULL,   is_read Int NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES seckill_user(id) ); CREATE TABLE Message (   id Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   userId Text NOT NULL,   message Text NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Account (   id Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   userId Text NOT NULL,   providerType Text NOT NULL,   providerId Text NOT NULL,   providerAccountId Integer NOT NULL,   refreshToken Text NOT NULL,   accessToken Text NOT NULL,   accessTokenExpires Timestamp NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Session (   id Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   userId Text NOT NULL,   expires Timestamp NOT NULL,   sessionToken Text NOT NULL,   accessToken Text NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE User (   id Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL,   email Text NOT NULL,   emailVerified Timestamp NOT NULL,   image Text NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE VerificationRequest (   id Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   identifier Text NOT NULL,   token Text NOT NULL,   expires Timestamp NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE MessageReportResolution (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   reportId Text NOT NULL,   resolvedBy Text NOT NULL,   resolutionText Text NOT NULL,   resolutionDate Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (reportId) REFERENCES MessageReport (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE MessageReport (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   reportedBy Text NOT NULL,   messageId Text NOT NULL,   reason Text NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (reportedBy) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (messageId) REFERENCES Message (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE INDEX idx_messagereport_messageid ON MessageReport (messageId);

CREATE TABLE Species (   speciesId TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   species_name TEXT NOT NULL,   species_price TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE Animal (   animalId TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   animal_name TEXT NOT NULL,   species_Id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (species_Id) REFERENCES Species (speciesId) );  CREATE TABLE Customer (   custId TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   cust_name TEXT NOT NULL,   cust_email Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE Animal_Sale (   sale_date Date NOT NULL,   animal_Id TEXT NOT NULL,   cust_Id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (animal_Id) REFERENCES Animal (animalId),   FOREIGN KEY (cust_Id) REFERENCES Customer (custId) );  CREATE TABLE Sale_Detail (   detailId TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   sale_date DATE NOT NULL,   animal_id TEXT NOT NULL,   cust_id TEXT NOT NULL,   item_description TEXT NOT NULL,   item_price TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sale_date, animal_id, cust_id) REFERENCES Animal_Sale (sale_date, animal_id, cust_id) );  CREATE TABLE Inventory_Item (   item_id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   item_name TEXT NOT NULL,   category_id TEXT NOT NULL,   supplier_id TEXT NOT NULL,   price TEXT NOT NULL,   stock_quantity TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES Inventory_Category (category_id),   FOREIGN KEY (supplier_id) REFERENCES Inventory_Supplier (supplier_id) );  CREATE TABLE Inventory_Category (   category_id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   category_name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE Inventory_Supplier (   supplier_id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   supplier_name TEXT NOT NULL,   contact_info TEXT );  CREATE TABLE Returns (   return_id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   sale_date DATE NOT NULL,   animal_id TEXT NOT NULL,   cust_id TEXT NOT NULL,   return_date DATE NOT NULL,   reason_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sale_date, animal_id, cust_id) REFERENCES Animal_Sale (sale_date, animal_id, cust_id),   FOREIGN KEY (reason_id) REFERENCES Return_Reason (reason_id) );  CREATE TABLE Return_Reason (   reason_id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   reason_description TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE Warranty_Claim (   claim_id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   sale_date DATE NOT NULL,   animal_id TEXT NOT NULL,   cust_id TEXT NOT NULL,   claim_date DATE NOT NULL,   issue_description TEXT,   resolved BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sale_date, animal_id, cust_id) REFERENCES Animal_Sale (sale_date, animal_id, cust_id) );

CREATE TABLE applications (   id Varchar NOT NULL,   name Text NOT NULL,   app_secret Varchar NOT NULL,   logo Text NOT NULL,   date_created Int NOT NULL,   app_code Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE messages (   id Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   parent_id Varchar NOT NULL,   place_tag Varchar NOT NULL,   sender Varchar NOT NULL,   sender_number Varchar NOT NULL,   message Text NOT NULL,   date_created Int NOT NULL,   date_updated Int NOT NULL,   fb_post_link Varchar NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',   source Varchar NOT NULL,   source_type Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE user_organization_roles (   user_id Varchar NOT NULL,   organization_id Varchar NOT NULL,   role Varchar NOT NULL,   date_created Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id),   FOREIGN KEY(organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id) );  CREATE TABLE application_settings (   application_id Varchar NOT NULL,   key Varchar NOT NULL,   value Text,   date_created Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(application_id) REFERENCES applications(id) );  CREATE TABLE organization_settings (   organization_id Varchar NOT NULL,   key Varchar NOT NULL,   value Text,   date_created Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id) );  CREATE TABLE user_activities (   id Varchar NOT NULL,   user_id Varchar NOT NULL,   activity_type Varchar NOT NULL,   details Text,   date_created Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE message_likes (   user_id Varchar NOT NULL,   message_id Varchar NOT NULL,   date_created Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id),   FOREIGN KEY(message_id) REFERENCES messages(id),   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, message_id) );  CREATE TABLE device_locations (   device_id Varchar NOT NULL,   latitude Real NOT NULL,   longitude Real NOT NULL,   date_created Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(device_id) REFERENCES devices(id) );  CREATE INDEX user_organization_roles_user_id_idx ON user_organization_roles(user_id);  CREATE TABLE spam_reports (   reporter_id Varchar NOT NULL,   message_id Varchar NOT NULL,   reason Text NOT NULL,   date_reported Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(reporter_id) REFERENCES users(id),   FOREIGN KEY(message_id) REFERENCES messages(id),   PRIMARY KEY (reporter_id, message_id) );  CREATE TABLE message_views (   user_id Varchar NOT NULL,   message_id Varchar NOT NULL,   view_time Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id),   FOREIGN KEY(message_id) REFERENCES messages(id),   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, message_id) );  CREATE TABLE user_message_filters (   user_id Varchar NOT NULL,   filter_name Varchar NOT NULL,   tags Varchar NOT NULL,   exclude_tags Varchar NOT NULL,   is_active Int NOT NULL,   date_created Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id),   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, filter_name) );  CREATE TABLE backup_logs (   backup_id Varchar NOT NULL,   log_message Text NOT NULL,   date_created Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(backup_id) REFERENCES scheduled_backups(id),   PRIMARY KEY (backup_id, date_created) );  CREATE TABLE application_billing (   application_id Varchar NOT NULL,   product_name Varchar NOT NULL,   price Real NOT NULL,   currency Varchar NOT NULL,   date_updated Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(application_id) REFERENCES applications(id),   PRIMARY KEY (application_id, product_name) );  CREATE TABLE organization_invitations (   id Varchar NOT NULL,   organization_id Varchar NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   status Varchar NOT NULL,   date_created Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id),   PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE customers_rating (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   helper_user_id Int NOT NULL,   customer_user_id Int NOT NULL,   job_id Int NOT NULL,   rating Varchar NOT NULL,   status Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE escrow_payment (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   customer_user_id Int NOT NULL,   receiver_id Int NOT NULL,   profile_id Int NOT NULL,   job_id Int NOT NULL,   payment_amount Varchar NOT NULL,   payment_date Datetime NOT NULL,   transection_id Varchar NOT NULL,   status Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE helpers (   id Int NOT NULL,   user_id Int NOT NULL,   first_name Varchar NOT NULL,   last_name Varchar NOT NULL,   mobile Varchar NOT NULL,   gender Varchar NOT NULL,   location Varchar NOT NULL,   latitude Varchar NOT NULL,   longitude Varchar NOT NULL,   profile_image Varchar NOT NULL,   stripe_key Varchar NOT NULL,   status Int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE jobs (   id Int NOT NULL,   job_id Varchar NOT NULL,   customer_user_id Int NOT NULL,   short_description Varchar NOT NULL,   difficulty_level Varchar NOT NULL,   no_of_helper Varchar NOT NULL,   gender_preference Varchar NOT NULL,   duration Varchar NOT NULL,   monitary_compensation Varchar NOT NULL,   location Varchar NOT NULL,   latitude Varchar NOT NULL,   longitude Varchar NOT NULL,   posted_job_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   completed_job_date Datetime NOT NULL,   job_status Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_user_id) REFERENCES customer (user_id) );  CREATE TABLE job_images (   id Int NOT NULL,   job_id Int NOT NULL,   customer_user_id Int NOT NULL,   images Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES jobs (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE notification_list (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   customer_user_id Int NOT NULL,   helper_user_id Int NOT NULL,   job_id Int NOT NULL,   created_time Timestamp NOT NULL,   message Varchar NOT NULL,   status Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE payment_record (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   job_id Int NOT NULL,   customer_user_id Int NOT NULL,   helper_user_id Int NOT NULL,   transection_id Varchar NOT NULL,   job_payment Varchar NOT NULL,   tip Varchar NOT NULL,   booking_fees Varchar NOT NULL,   status Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE login_attempt (     id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,     user_id TEXT,     success BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,     ip_address TEXT NOT NULL,     user_agent TEXT,     created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE user_activity_log (     id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,     user_id TEXT NOT NULL,     action TEXT NOT NULL,     description TEXT,     ip_address TEXT,     user_agent TEXT,     created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE password_reset_token (     id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,     user_id TEXT NOT NULL,     token TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,     token_hash TEXT NOT NULL,     used BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,     expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,     created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );

### Question:
Calculate the number of distinct user agents associated with login attempts and user activities for users who have recovery tokens issued within the last 30 days.

WITH recent_users AS (     SELECT DISTINCT user_id     FROM recovery_token     WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-30 days') ) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_agent) AS distinct_user_agents_count FROM (     SELECT user_agent FROM login_attempt WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM recent_users)     UNION ALL     SELECT user_agent FROM user_activity_log WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM recent_users) );

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE Players (   Id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   Name Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   IsActive Integer NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE Games (   Id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   Name Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   Developer Text NOT NULL,   Platform Text NOT NULL,   ReleaseYear Integer NOT NULL,   IsActive Integer NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE MatchRecords (   Id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   GameId Integer NOT NULL,   Player1Id Integer NOT NULL,   Player2Id Integer NOT NULL,   WinnerId Integer NOT NULL,   Date Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (GameId) REFERENCES Games (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (Player1Id) REFERENCES Players (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (Player2Id) REFERENCES Players (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (WinnerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE PlayerProfiles (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   PlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   Bio TEXT,   BirthDate DATE,   Country TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE PlayerStatistics (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   PlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   TotalWins INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   TotalLosses INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   TotalMatches INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE Genres (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   Name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE GameGenres (   GameId INTEGER NOT NULL,   GenreId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (GameId) REFERENCES Games (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (GenreId) REFERENCES Genres (Id) );  CREATE TABLE GameRatings (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   GameId INTEGER NOT NULL,   PlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   Rating INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (Rating >= 1 AND Rating <= 5),   FOREIGN KEY (GameId) REFERENCES Games (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE Tournaments (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   GameId INTEGER NOT NULL,   Name TEXT NOT NULL,   StartDate DATE NOT NULL,   EndDate DATE,   CreatorPlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (GameId) REFERENCES Games (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (CreatorPlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE TournamentParticipants (   TournamentId INTEGER NOT NULL,   PlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (TournamentId) REFERENCES Tournaments (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id),   PRIMARY KEY (TournamentId, PlayerId) );  CREATE TABLE TournamentMatches (   TournamentId INTEGER NOT NULL,   MatchId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (TournamentId) REFERENCES Tournaments (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (MatchId) REFERENCES MatchRecords (Id),   PRIMARY KEY (TournamentId, MatchId) );  CREATE TABLE MatchScores (   MatchId INTEGER NOT NULL,   PlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   Score INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (MatchId) REFERENCES MatchRecords (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id),   PRIMARY KEY (MatchId, PlayerId) );  CREATE TABLE PlayerRankings (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   PlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   Rank INTEGER NOT NULL,   CalculatedOn DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE Notifications (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   PlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   Message TEXT NOT NULL,   IsRead INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   CreatedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE PlayerFriends (   PlayerId1 INTEGER NOT NULL,   PlayerId2 INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (PlayerId1, PlayerId2),   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId1) REFERENCES Players (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId2) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE PlayerClans (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   Name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   LeaderPlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (LeaderPlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE ClanMembers (   ClanId INTEGER NOT NULL,   PlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (ClanId) REFERENCES PlayerClans (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id),   PRIMARY KEY (ClanId, PlayerId) );  CREATE TABLE ClanTournaments (   ClanId INTEGER NOT NULL,   TournamentId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (ClanId) REFERENCES PlayerClans (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (TournamentId) REFERENCES Tournaments (Id),   PRIMARY KEY (ClanId, TournamentId) );  CREATE TABLE GameModifications (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   GameId INTEGER NOT NULL,   Name TEXT NOT NULL,   AuthorPlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   Description TEXT,   CreatedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (GameId) REFERENCES Games (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (AuthorPlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE UserReviews (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   GameId INTEGER NOT NULL,   PlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   ReviewText TEXT NOT NULL,   Rating INTEGER CHECK (Rating >= 1 AND Rating <= 5),   CreatedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (GameId) REFERENCES Games (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE GamePurchases (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   GameId INTEGER NOT NULL,   PlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   PurchaseDate DATETIME NOT NULL,   Price REAL NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (GameId) REFERENCES Games (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE PlayerDevices (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   PlayerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   DeviceType TEXT NOT NULL,   Details TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (PlayerId) REFERENCES Players (Id) );  CREATE TABLE PlayerChallenges (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   ChallengerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   ChallengeeId INTEGER NOT NULL,   GameId INTEGER NOT NULL,   CreatedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   Accepted INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (ChallengerId) REFERENCES Players (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (ChallengeeId) REFERENCES Players (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (GameId) REFERENCES Games (Id) );  CREATE TABLE ChallengeResults (   ChallengeId INTEGER NOT NULL,   MatchId INTEGER NOT NULL,   Outcome TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (ChallengeId) REFERENCES PlayerChallenges (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (MatchId) REFERENCES MatchRecords (Id),   PRIMARY KEY (ChallengeId, MatchId) );  CREATE TABLE GamePatchNotes (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   GameId INTEGER NOT NULL,   Version TEXT NOT NULL,   Notes TEXT NOT NULL,   ReleaseDate DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (GameId) REFERENCES Games (Id) );  CREATE TABLE Achievements (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   Name TEXT NOT NULL,   Description TEXT,   Category TEXT );

### Question:
List the names of the clans that have members who have won more than 5 matches in the last year.

SELECT c.Name FROM PlayerClans c JOIN ClanMembers m ON c.Id = m.ClanId JOIN MatchRecords r ON m.PlayerId = r.WinnerId WHERE r.Date >= date('now', '-1 year') GROUP BY c.Id, c.Name HAVING COUNT(r.Id) > 5;
