CREATE TABLE type_forfait (   id_type_forfait Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   libelle_type_forfait TEXT NOT NULL,   prix Numeric NOT NULL,   heure_debut Time NOT NULL,   heure_fin Time NOT NULL,   duree_forfait Integer NOT NULL,   condition TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id_type_forfait) );  CREATE TABLE public_carte (   id_carte Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   PRIMARY KEY (id_carte) );  CREATE TABLE public_forfait (   id_forfait Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_type_forfait Integer NOT NULL,   id_carte Integer NOT NULL,   date_debut Date NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id_forfait),   FOREIGN KEY (id_carte) REFERENCES public_carte (id_carte) );  CREATE TABLE public_type_remontee (   id_type_remontee Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   libelle_type_remontee TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id_type_remontee) );  CREATE TABLE public_remontee (   id_remontee Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nom_remontee TEXT NOT NULL,   duree_remontee TEXT NOT NULL,   id_type_remontee Integer NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id_remontee),   FOREIGN KEY (id_type_remontee) REFERENCES public_type_remontee (id_type_remontee) );  CREATE TABLE public_passage (   id_carte Integer NOT NULL,   id_remontee Integer NOT NULL,   heure_passage Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_remontee) REFERENCES public_remontee (id_remontee),   FOREIGN KEY (id_carte) REFERENCES public_carte (id_carte) );

### Question:
Which cardholder has the highest total number of passages across all remontees, and what is the average duration of their forfaits, considering only those forfaits that are of type 'premium' (id_type_forfait = 5), joined with their forfait details, remontee types, and the specific remontee names and durations they used?

SELECT p.id_carte, COUNT(*) AS total_passages, AVG(tf.duree_forfait) AS average_forfait_duration FROM public_passage p JOIN public_forfait pf ON p.id_carte = pf.id_carte JOIN type_forfait tf ON pf.id_type_forfait = tf.id_type_forfait JOIN public_remontee r ON p.id_remontee = r.id_remontee JOIN public_type_remontee prt ON r.id_type_remontee = prt.id_type_remontee WHERE pf.id_type_forfait = 5 GROUP BY p.id_carte ORDER BY total_passages DESC LIMIT 1;

CREATE TABLE Customers (   customerId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   firstName Varchar NOT NULL,   lastName Varchar NOT NULL,   address Varchar NOT NULL,   userName Varchar NOT NULL,   pass_word Varchar NOT NULL,   regDate Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE Blogs (     blogId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,     titulo VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,     descripcion TEXT,     fechaPublicacion DATETIME NOT NULL,     autorId INTEGER NOT NULL,     FOREIGN KEY (autorId) REFERENCES Customers(customerId) );  CREATE TABLE ProductImages (   imageId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   productId Int NOT NULL,   imageUrl VarChar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (productId) REFERENCES Products(productId) );  CREATE TABLE Categories (   categoryId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   categoryName VarChar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE ProductCategory (   productCategoryId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   productId Int NOT NULL,   categoryId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (productId) REFERENCES Products(productId),   FOREIGN KEY (categoryId) REFERENCES Categories(categoryId) );  CREATE TABLE OrderDetails (   orderDetailId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   orderNum Int NOT NULL,   productId Int NOT NULL,   quantity Int NOT NULL,   subtotal REAL NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (orderNum) REFERENCES Orders(orderNum),   FOREIGN KEY (productId) REFERENCES Products(productId) );  CREATE TABLE Inventory (   inventoryId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   storeId Int NOT NULL,   productId Int NOT NULL,   quantity Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (storeId) REFERENCES Store(storeId),   FOREIGN KEY (productId) REFERENCES Products(productId) );  CREATE TABLE Suppliers (   supplierId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   supplierName VarChar NOT NULL,   contactName VarChar,   address VarChar NOT NULL,   phone VarChar,   email VarChar );  CREATE TABLE PurchaseOrders (   purchaseOrderId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   supplierId Int NOT NULL,   storeId Int NOT NULL,   orderDate Timestamp NOT NULL,   totalCost REAL NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (supplierId) REFERENCES Suppliers(supplierId),   FOREIGN KEY (storeId) REFERENCES Store(storeId) );  CREATE TABLE PurchaseOrderDetails (   purchaseOrderDetailId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   purchaseOrderId INTEGER NOT NULL,   productId Int NOT NULL,   quantity Int NOT NULL,   costPerUnit REAL NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (purchaseOrderId) REFERENCES PurchaseOrders(purchaseOrderId),   FOREIGN KEY (productId) REFERENCES Products(productId) );  CREATE TABLE StockTransferDetails (   transferDetailId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   transferId INTEGER NOT NULL,   productId Int NOT NULL,   quantity Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (transferId) REFERENCES StockTransfers(transferId),   FOREIGN KEY (productId) REFERENCES Products(productId) );  CREATE TABLE UserActivityLog (   logId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   userId Int NOT NULL,   activityType VarChar NOT NULL,   activityDate Timestamp NOT NULL,   details TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES Customers(customerId) );  CREATE TABLE NewsCategories (   categoryId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   categoryName VarChar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE NewsCategoryMappings (   mappingId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   noticiaId INTEGER NOT NULL,   categoryId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (noticiaId) REFERENCES Noticias(noticiaId),   FOREIGN KEY (categoryId) REFERENCES NewsCategories(categoryId) );  CREATE TABLE StoreReviews (   reviewId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   storeId Int NOT NULL,   userId Int NOT NULL,   rating INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(rating BETWEEN 1 AND 5),   reviewText TEXT,   reviewDate Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (storeId) REFERENCES Store(storeId),   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES Customers(customerId) );  CREATE TABLE NewsletterSubscriptions (   subscriptionId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   userId Int NOT NULL,   subscribeDate Timestamp NOT NULL,   isSubscribed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES Customers(customerId) ); cardNumber VarChar,   expiryDate VarChar,   cardHolderName VarChar,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES Customers(customerId) );  CREATE TABLE ProductAttributes (   attributeId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   attributeName VarChar NOT NULL,   attributeType VarChar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE AttributeValues (   valueId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   attributeId INTEGER NOT NULL,   value VarChar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (attributeId) REFERENCES ProductAttributes(attributeId) );  CREATE TABLE ProductAttributeMapping (   mappingId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   productId INTEGER NOT NULL,   attributeId INTEGER NOT NULL,   valueId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (productId) REFERENCES Products(productId),   FOREIGN KEY (attributeId) REFERENCES ProductAttributes(attributeId),   FOREIGN KEY (valueId) REFERENCES AttributeValues(valueId) );  CREATE TABLE CustomerPreferences (   preferenceId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   userId INTEGER NOT NULL,   preferenceType VarChar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES Customers(customerId) );  CREATE TABLE PreferenceOptions (   optionId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   preferenceId INTEGER NOT NULL,   optionValue VarChar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (preferenceId) REFERENCES CustomerPreferences(preferenceId) );  CREATE TABLE ReturnReasons (   reasonId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   returnId INTEGER NOT NULL,   reason Text NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (returnId) REFERENCES ProductReturns(returnId) );  CREATE TABLE ProductReturnDetails (   returnDetailId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   returnId INTEGER NOT NULL,   productId INTEGER NOT NULL,   quantity INT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (returnId) REFERENCES ProductReturns(returnId),   FOREIGN KEY (productId) REFERENCES Products(productId) );

### Question:
Determine which customers have specific preference options mapped to their preferences and have sent messages to other users. Include the preference types, option values, and message content.

SELECT      cp.preferenceType,     po.optionValue,     m.contenido FROM      Customers c JOIN      CustomerPreferences cp ON c.customerId = cp.userId JOIN      CustomerPreferenceMapping cpm ON cp.preferenceId = cpm.preferenceId JOIN      PreferenceOptions po ON cpm.optionId = po.optionId JOIN      mensajes m ON c.customerId = m.deUsuarioId;

### Question:
Which users have the highest number of profile views, and how many views did they receive in total?
SELECT u.email, u.name, COUNT(upv.id) AS total_views FROM users u JOIN user_profile_views upv ON u.email = upv.viewed_email GROUP BY u.email ORDER BY total_views DESC;

 CREATE TABLE funding_type (   id BigInt NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,   description TEXT );  CREATE TABLE project_funding_source (   id BigInt NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   project_id BigInt NOT NULL,   funding_type_id BigInt NOT NULL,   amount REAL NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES project(id),   FOREIGN KEY (funding_type_id) REFERENCES funding_type(id) );  CREATE TABLE notification_log (   id BigInt NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   schedule_id BigInt NOT NULL,   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   sent_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,   error_message TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (schedule_id) REFERENCES notification_schedule(id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE audit_log (   id BigInt NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   entity_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,   entity_id BigInt NOT NULL,   action_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,   old_value TEXT,   new_value TEXT,   change_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   user_id BigInt,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE organisation_contact (   id BigInt NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   organisation_id BigInt NOT NULL,   primary_contact_user_id BigInt,   secondary_contact_user_id BigInt,   FOREIGN KEY (organisation_id) REFERENCES organisation(id),   FOREIGN KEY (primary_contact_user_id) REFERENCES user(id),   FOREIGN KEY (secondary_contact_user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE project_milestone (   id BigInt NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   project_id BigInt NOT NULL,   milestone_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,   target_date DATE NOT NULL,   completed BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   completion_date DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES project(id) );  CREATE TABLE project_note (   id BigInt NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   project_id BigInt NOT NULL,   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   note TEXT NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES project(id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE project_risk (   id BigInt NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   project_id BigInt NOT NULL,   risk_description TEXT NOT NULL,   risk_level VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,   mitigation_plan TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES project(id) );  CREATE TABLE competition_organisation_type_restriction (   id BigInt NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   competition_id BigInt NOT NULL,   organisation_type_id BigInt NOT NULL,   restriction_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,   constraint_description TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (competition_id) REFERENCES competition(id),   FOREIGN KEY (organisation_type_id) REFERENCES organisation_type(id) ); ### Question:
For projects that have funding_type_id = 3 in project_funding_source, provide the project name, the total requested budget from project_budget, and the sum of all budget line amounts from project_budget_line. Ensure the results only include projects where the total requested budget is higher than the sum of their budget lines.

SELECT      p.name AS project_name,     pb.funding_requested AS total_requested_budget,     COALESCE(SUM(pbl.amount), 0) AS total_budget_line_amount FROM project p JOIN project_funding_source pfs ON p.id = pfs.project_id     AND pfs.funding_type_id = 3 JOIN project_budget pb ON p.id = pb.project_id LEFT JOIN project_budget_line pbl ON pb.id = pbl.budget_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name, pb.funding_requested HAVING total_requested_budget > COALESCE(SUM(pbl.amount), 0);

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE stats (   id Int NOT NULL,   url_id Int NOT NULL,   clickdate Timestamp NOT NULL,   ip Varchar NOT NULL,   referer Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (url_id) REFERENCES urls (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE urls (   id Int NOT NULL,   url Varchar NOT NULL,   segment Varchar NOT NULL,   datetime_added Timestamp NOT NULL,   ip Varchar NOT NULL,   num_of_clicks Int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE users (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   username TEXT NOT NULL,   email TEXT NOT NULL,   password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,   created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   last_login TIMESTAMP );  CREATE TABLE user_sessions (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   session_token TEXT NOT NULL,   expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE roles (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   role_name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE user_roles (   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   role_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, role_id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES roles (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE login_attempts (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   ip_address TEXT NOT NULL,   attempt_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   success BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT );  CREATE TABLE device_types (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   device_type TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE stats_device_info (   stat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   device_type_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (stat_id) REFERENCES stats (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (device_type_id) REFERENCES device_types (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT );  CREATE TABLE browsers (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   browser_name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE stats_browser_info (   stat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   browser_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (stat_id) REFERENCES stats (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (browser_id) REFERENCES browsers (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT );  CREATE TABLE operating_systems (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   os_name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE stats_os_info (   stat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   os_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (stat_id) REFERENCES stats (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (os_id) REFERENCES operating_systems (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT );  CREATE TABLE referral_sources (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   source_name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE campaigns (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   campaign_name TEXT NOT NULL,   start_date TIMESTAMP,   end_date TIMESTAMP );  CREATE TABLE url_campaigns (   url_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   campaign_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (url_id) REFERENCES urls (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (campaign_id) REFERENCES campaigns (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE tags (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   tag_name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE url_tags (   url_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   tag_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (url_id) REFERENCES urls (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES tags (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE geo_locations (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   ip_address TEXT NOT NULL,   country TEXT,   region TEXT,   city TEXT );  CREATE TABLE feedback (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER,   url_id INTEGER,   message TEXT NOT NULL,   submitted_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE SET NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (url_id) REFERENCES urls (id) ON DELETE SET NULL );  CREATE TABLE audit_logs (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER,   action TEXT NOT NULL,   action_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   details TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE SET NULL );  CREATE TABLE maintenance_logs (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   log_message TEXT NOT NULL,   log_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   log_type TEXT );  CREATE TABLE password_reset_tokens (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   token TEXT NOT NULL,   expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE access_tokens (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   token TEXT NOT NULL,   token_type TEXT NOT NULL,   expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE user_url_activity (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER,   url_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   activity_type TEXT NOT NULL,   activity_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE SET NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (url_id) REFERENCES urls (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON users (email);  CREATE INDEX idx_user_sessions_user_id ON user_sessions (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_login_attempts_user_id ON login_attempts (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_stats_device_info_stat_id ON stats_device_info (stat_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_stats_browser_info_stat_id ON stats_browser_info (stat_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_stats_os_info_stat_id ON stats_os_info (stat_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_url_campaigns_url_id ON url_campaigns (url_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_url_tags_url_id ON url_tags (url_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_geo_locations_ip_address ON geo_locations (ip_address);  CREATE INDEX idx_feedback_url_id ON feedback (url_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_audit_logs_user_id ON audit_logs (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_password_reset_tokens_user_id ON password_reset_tokens (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_access_tokens_user_id ON access_tokens (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_user_url_activity_url_id ON user_url_activity (url_id);

### Question:
Find the average number of clicks per day for each unique device type.

SELECT device_type, AVG(daily_clicks) AS average_clicks_per_day FROM (     SELECT dt.device_type, COUNT(*) AS daily_clicks     FROM stats s     JOIN stats_device_info sdi ON s.id = sdi.stat_id     JOIN device_types dt ON sdi.device_type_id = dt.id     GROUP BY dt.device_type, DATE(s.clickdate) ) sub GROUP BY device_type;

CREATE TABLE provincias (   Id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   CodigoArea Varchar NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE ciudades (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   IdProvincia Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdProvincia) REFERENCES provincias (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE zonas (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   IdCiudad Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdCiudad) REFERENCES ciudades (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE barrios (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   IdZona Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdZona) REFERENCES zonas (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE categorias_empresas (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   Descripcion Varchar );  Create TABLE empresas (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   Direccion Varchar,   Telefono Varchar,   Website Varchar,   Email Varchar,   IdBarrio Int,   IdCategoria Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdBarrio) REFERENCES barrios (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (IdCategoria) REFERENCES categorias_empresas (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE empleados (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   Cargo Varchar,   Telefono Varchar,   Email Varchar,   IdEmpresa Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE servicios (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   Descripcion Varchar,   Precio Decimal,   TiempoEstimado Decimal,   IdEmpresa Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE clientes (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   Telefono Varchar,   Email Varchar,   Direccion Varchar );  Create TABLE reservas (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Fecha Hacienda NOT NULL,   Hora Varchar NOT NULL,   IdCliente Int NOT NULL,   IdServicio Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdCliente) REFERENCES clientes (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (IdServicio) REFERENCES servicios (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE proveedores (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   Telefono Varchar,   Email Varchar,   Direccion Varchar,   IdBarrio Int,   FOREIGN KEY (IdBarrio) REFERENCES barrios (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE productos (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   Descripcion Varchar,   Precio Decimal,   Stock Int,   IdProveedor Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdProveedor) REFERENCES proveedores (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE empresas_productos (   IdEmpresa Int NOT NULL,   IdProducto Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (IdProducto) REFERENCES productos (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE ratings (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Valor Int NOT NULL,   Comentario Varchar,   Fecha Hacienda NOT NULL,   IdCliente Int NOT NULL,   IdEmpresa Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdCliente) REFERENCES clientes (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE promociones (   Id Int NOT NULL,   Nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   Descripcion Varchar,   Descuento Decimal,   FechaInicio Hacienda NOT NULL,   FechaFin Hacienda NOT NULL,   IdEmpresa Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  Create TABLE empresas_servicios (   IdEmpresa Int NOT NULL,   IdServicio Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (IdServicio) REFERENCES servicios (Id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  CREATE TABLE empleado_capacitaciones (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   Titulo TEXT NOT NULL,   Fecha TEXT NOT NULL,   Proveedor TEXT,   IdEmpleado INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpleado) REFERENCES empleados (Id) );  CREATE TABLE promociones_clientes (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   FechaAplicacion TEXT NOT NULL,   IdPromocion INTEGER NOT NULL,   IdCliente INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdPromocion) REFERENCES promociones (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (IdCliente) REFERENCES clientes (Id) );  CREATE TABLE preferencias_clientes (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   Preferencia TEXT NOT NULL,   Valor TEXT,   IdCliente INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdCliente) REFERENCES clientes (Id) );  CREATE TABLE servicios_paquetes (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   Nombre TEXT NOT NULL,   Descripcion TEXT,   PrecioTotal REAL,   IdEmpresa INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) );  CREATE TABLE inventario_empresa (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   FechaVenta TEXT,   Cantidad INTEGER,   IdEmpresa INTEGER NOT NULL,   IdProducto INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (IdProducto) REFERENCES productos (Id) );  CREATE TABLE horarios_servicios (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   DiaSemana TEXT NOT NULL,   HoraInicio TEXT NOT NULL,   HoraFin TEXT NOT NULL,   IdServicio INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdServicio) REFERENCES servicios (Id) );  CREATE TABLE metodos_pago (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   Nombre TEXT NOT NULL,   Descripcion TEXT,   Activo INTEGER,   IdEmpresa INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) );  CREATE TABLE facturas (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   Fecha TEXT NOT NULL,   Monto REAL NOT NULL,   Estatus TEXT,   IdCliente INTEGER NOT NULL,   IdEmpresa INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdCliente) REFERENCES clientes (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) );  CREATE TABLE tickets_soporte (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   Asunto TEXT NOT NULL,   Descripcion TEXT,   FechaCreacion TEXT NOT NULL,   Estado TEXT,   IdCliente INTEGER,   IdEmpresa INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdCliente) REFERENCES clientes (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) );  CREATE TABLE historico_precios_servicios (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   PrecioAnterior REAL,   FechaCambio TEXT NOT NULL,   IdServicio INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdServicio) REFERENCES servicios (Id) );  CREATE TABLE calificaciones_servicios (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   Valor INTEGER NOT NULL,   Comentario TEXT,   Fecha TEXT NOT NULL,   IdCliente INTEGER NOT NULL,   IdServicio INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdCliente) REFERENCES clientes (Id),   FOREIGN KEY (IdServicio) REFERENCES servicios (Id) );  CREATE TABLE incidencias_servicios (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   Descripcion TEXT NOT NULL,   Fecha TEXT NOT NULL,   Resuelto INTEGER,   IdServicio INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdServicio) REFERENCES servicios (Id) );  CREATE TABLE empresas_facebook (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   Link TEXT NOT NULL,   Activo INTEGER,   IdEmpresa INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) );  CREATE TABLE clientes_notificaciones (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   Tipo TEXT NOT NULL,   Detalles TEXT,   Enviado INTEGER,   Fecha TEXT NOT NULL,   IdCliente INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdCliente) REFERENCES clientes (Id) );  CREATE TABLE bancos_empresas (   Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   Banco TEXT NOT NULL,   Cuenta TEXT,   Titular TEXT,   IdEmpresa INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (IdEmpresa) REFERENCES empresas (Id) );

### Question:
What are the names of clients who have never made a reservation for services offered by companies in the "Technology" category?

SELECT      c.Nombre FROM     clientes c WHERE     NOT EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM             reservas r         JOIN             servicios s ON r.IdServicio = s.Id         JOIN             empresas e ON s.IdEmpresa = e.Id         JOIN             categorias_empresas ce ON e.IdCategoria = ce.Id         WHERE             ce.Nombre = 'Technology'             AND r.IdCliente = c.Id     );

CREATE TABLE device_output_setting (   device_id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   internal_id SmallInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   external_id SmallInt NOT NULL,   output_type SmallInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE device_firmware_version (     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     firmware_version Text NOT NULL,     release_date Date NOT NULL,     PRIMARY KEY (device_id, firmware_version),     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device_output_setting(device_id) );  CREATE TABLE device_manufacturer (     manufacturer_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     name Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,     country Text NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE device_model (     model_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     manufacturer_id Integer NOT NULL,     name Text NOT NULL,     description Text,     release_year SmallInt NOT NULL,     FOREIGN KEY (manufacturer_id) REFERENCES device_manufacturer(manufacturer_id) );  CREATE TABLE device (     device_id BigInt PRIMARY KEY,     model_id Integer NOT NULL,     serial_number Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,     activation_date Date,     last_maintenance Date,     status SmallInt NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,     FOREIGN KEY (model_id) REFERENCES device_model(model_id) );  CREATE TABLE device_location (     location_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     latitude Real NOT NULL,     longitude Real NOT NULL,     recorded_at Datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id) );  CREATE TABLE device_maintenance (     maintenance_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     performed_by Text NOT NULL,     description Text,     done_at Datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id) );  CREATE TABLE user_account (     user_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     username Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,     full_name Text NOT NULL,     email Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,     created_at Datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );  CREATE TABLE device_user (     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     user_id Integer NOT NULL,     assigned_at Datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     PRIMARY KEY (device_id, user_id),     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id),     FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user_account(user_id) );  CREATE TABLE device_configuration (     config_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     key Text NOT NULL,     value Text NOT NULL,     last_modified Datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id) );  CREATE TABLE device_output_usage (     usage_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     internal_id SmallInt NOT NULL,     count Integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,     last_used Datetime,     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device_output_setting(device_id),     FOREIGN KEY (internal_id) REFERENCES device_output_setting(internal_id) );  CREATE TABLE firmware_update_request (     request_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     target_version Text NOT NULL,     requested_by Integer NOT NULL,     status SmallInt NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,     requested_at Datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id),     FOREIGN KEY (requested_by) REFERENCES user_account(user_id) );  CREATE TABLE device_event (     event_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     event_type SmallInt NOT NULL,     description Text NOT NULL,     occurred_at Datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id) );  CREATE TABLE device_connection (     connection_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     connected_from Datetime NOT NULL,     connected_to Datetime,     duration Integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id) );  CREATE TABLE device_resource_usage (     usage_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     cpu_usage Real NOT NULL,     memory_usage Real NOT NULL,     recorded_at Datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id) );  CREATE TABLE device_diagnostic (     diagnostic_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     test_name Text NOT NULL,     result Text NOT NULL,     run_at Datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id) );  CREATE TABLE device_setup_wizard (     setup_id Integer PRIMARY KEY,     device_id BigInt NOT NULL,     step_number SmallInt NOT NULL,     completed Boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,     completed_at Datetime,     FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id) ); ### Question:
What are the serial numbers of devices that have a firmware update request targeting version '6.3.0', are manufactured by a company in Japan, and have a recorded resource usage higher than average for their model?

WITH model_avg AS (     SELECT          d.model_id,         AVG(dr.cpu_usage) AS avg_cpu,         AVG(dr.memory_usage) AS avg_memory     FROM device d     JOIN device_resource_usage dr ON d.device_id = dr.device_id     GROUP BY d.model_id ) SELECT DISTINCT device.serial_number FROM device JOIN firmware_update_request ON device.device_id = firmware_update_request.device_id JOIN device_model ON device.model_id = device_model.model_id JOIN device_manufacturer ON device_model.manufacturer_id = device_manufacturer.manufacturer_id WHERE firmware_update_request.target_version = '6.3.0'   AND device_manufacturer.country = 'Japan'   AND EXISTS (       SELECT 1       FROM device_resource_usage dru       JOIN model_avg ma ON device.model_id = ma.model_id       WHERE dru.device_id = device.device_id         AND (dru.cpu_usage > ma.avg_cpu OR dru.memory_usage > ma.avg_memory)   );

### Question:
Calculate the average number of addresses per user profile, but only for users who have a bio length exceeding 200 characters and live in a city with a ZIP code starting with 55.

SELECT AVG(num_addresses)  FROM (     SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_addresses     FROM USERPROFILE     JOIN useraccount_address ON USERPROFILE.USERACCOUNT_ID = useraccount_address.UserAccount_ID     JOIN address ON useraccount_address.addresses_ID = address.ID     WHERE LENGTH(USERPROFILE.BIO) > 200       AND CAST(address.ZIPCODE AS TEXT) LIKE '55%'     GROUP BY USERPROFILE.ID ) subquery;

 CREATE TABLE task_timings (   ttid INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   tid INTEGER NOT NULL,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   duration INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (tid) REFERENCES tasks(tid),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id) ); ### Question:
What is the average number of task comments per task in the system?

SELECT AVG(comment_count) AS average_comments_per_task FROM (     SELECT tasks.tid, COUNT(task_comments.comment_id) AS comment_count     FROM tasks     LEFT JOIN task_comments ON tasks.tid = task_comments.tid     GROUP BY tasks.tid );

CREATE TABLE karyawans (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nip Varchar NOT NULL,   password Varchar NOT NULL,   nama Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE pakets (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   tanggal_datang Date NOT NULL,   penghunis_id TEXT NOT NULL,   karyawans_id TEXT NOT NULL,   isi_paket Text NOT NULL,   tanggal_ambil Date NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (karyawans_id) REFERENCES karyawans (id),   FOREIGN KEY (penghunis_id) REFERENCES penghunis (id) );  CREATE TABLE penghunis (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nama Varchar NOT NULL,   foto Varchar NOT NULL,   unit Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id) );

### Question:
List all karyawans along with the total number of pakets they handled, the names of the penghunis they served, and the contents of the pakets, filtered for those who have more than 3 pakets and whose penghunis are in unit 'B3', sorted by the number of pakets in descending order.

SELECT k.id, k.nama, COUNT(p.id) AS total_pakets, GROUP_CONCAT(ph.nama) AS penghunis_names, GROUP_CONCAT(p.isi_paket) AS paket_contents FROM karyawans k JOIN pakets p ON k.id = p.karyawans_id JOIN penghunis ph ON p.penghunis_id = ph.id WHERE ph.unit = 'B3' GROUP BY k.id HAVING COUNT(p.id) > 3 ORDER BY total_pakets DESC;

### Question:
What is the average rating of articles in the 'health' type that have more than 500 views, at least one comment from an author with 'expert' in their name, and are connected to a 'resolved' g_t_n_d resolution status, while also linking to their related article details and source URLs?

SELECT AVG(article_ratings.rating) AS average_rating FROM articles JOIN article_type ON articles.article_type_id = article_type.article_type_id JOIN article_views ON articles.id = article_views.article_id JOIN article_comments ON articles.id = article_comments.article_id JOIN article_ratings ON articles.id = article_ratings.article_id JOIN article_relations ON articles.id = article_relations.article_id JOIN article_sources ON articles.id = article_sources.article_id JOIN g_t_n_d_relations ON article_relations.related_article_id = g_t_n_d_relations.g_t_n_d_id WHERE article_type.name = 'health'   AND article_views.views > 500   AND article_comments.author LIKE '%expert%'   AND g_t_n_d_relations.resolution_status = 'resolved';

### Question:
Which project documents have been updated in the last month by employees who are not part of the "Management" department and are assigned to at least one task with a status of "Overdue"?

WITH EligibleEmployees AS (     SELECT e.id     FROM employee e     WHERE NOT EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM employee_department ed         WHERE ed.id = e.id AND ed.department_name = 'Management'     )     AND EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM task t         WHERE t.assigned_to = e.id AND t.status = 3     ) ) SELECT pd.* FROM project_document pd INNER JOIN document_version dv ON pd.id = dv.document_id WHERE dv.upload_date >= date('now', '-30 days') AND dv.uploaded_by IN (SELECT id FROM EligibleEmployees);

### Question:
List the total count of achievements per child in the 'Community Service' category.
SELECT a.id_child, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM achievement a JOIN achievement_category c ON a.name = c.name WHERE c.name = 'Community Service' GROUP BY a.id_child;

CREATE TABLE manufacturers (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE types (   name Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE models (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   manufacturer_id BigInt NOT NULL,   type_name Varchar NOT NULL,   year Int,   FOREIGN KEY (manufacturer_id) REFERENCES manufacturers (id),   FOREIGN KEY (type_name) REFERENCES types (name) );  CREATE TABLE bikes (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   model_id BigInt NOT NULL,   size Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (model_id) REFERENCES models (id) );  CREATE TABLE bike_colors (   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   color Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id) );  CREATE TABLE component_types (   name Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE components (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   model_id BigInt NOT NULL,   component_type_name Varchar NOT NULL,   part_number Varchar,   description Varchar,   FOREIGN KEY (model_id) REFERENCES models (id),   FOREIGN KEY (component_type_name) REFERENCES component_types (name) );  CREATE TABLE bike_components (   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   component_id BigInt NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id),   FOREIGN KEY (component_id) REFERENCES components (id) );  CREATE TABLE accessory_types (   name Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE accessories (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   accessory_type_name Varchar NOT NULL,   description Varchar,   FOREIGN KEY (accessory_type_name) REFERENCES accessory_types (name) );  CREATE TABLE bike_accessories (   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   accessory_id BigInt NOT NULL,   quantity Int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id),   FOREIGN KEY (accessory_id) REFERENCES accessories (id) );  CREATE TABLE repair_types (   name Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE repairs (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   repair_type_name Varchar NOT NULL,   date Date NOT NULL,   description Varchar,   cost Real,   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id),   FOREIGN KEY (repair_type_name) REFERENCES repair_types (name) );  CREATE TABLE users (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE bike_owners (   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   ownership_start Datetime NOT NULL,   ownership_end Datetime,   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, bike_id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id),   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id) );  CREATE TABLE sales (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   sale_date Datetime NOT NULL,   total_cost Real,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE sales_details (   sale_id BigInt NOT NULL,   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   quantity Int NOT NULL,   unit_price Real,   PRIMARY KEY (sale_id, bike_id),   FOREIGN KEY (sale_id) REFERENCES sales (id),   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id) );  CREATE TABLE parts_inventory (   part_number Varchar NOT NULL,   quantity_in_stock Int NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (part_number) );  CREATE TABLE suppliers (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   contact_info Varchar,   PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE purchase_orders (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   supplier_id BigInt NOT NULL,   order_date Datetime NOT NULL,   delivery_date Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (supplier_id) REFERENCES suppliers (id) );  CREATE TABLE ratings (   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   rating Int NOT NULL CHECK (rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5),   date Datetime NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (bike_id, user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE reviews (   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   review_text Varchar NOT NULL,   date Datetime NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (bike_id, user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE warranty_claims (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   claim_date Datetime NOT NULL,   status Varchar NOT NULL,   resolution_description Varchar,   cost Real,   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE service_centers (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   location Varchar NOT NULL,   contact_info Varchar );  CREATE TABLE maintenance_tasks (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   task_name Varchar NOT NULL,   description Varchar,   recommended_frequency Varchar );  CREATE TABLE spare_parts (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   part_name Varchar NOT NULL,   model_id BigInt NOT NULL,   part_number Varchar NOT NULL,   quantity_in_stock Int,   FOREIGN KEY (model_id) REFERENCES models (id),   FOREIGN KEY (part_number) REFERENCES parts_inventory (part_number) );  CREATE TABLE inventory_transactions (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   part_number Varchar NOT NULL,   transaction_type Varchar NOT NULL,   quantity Int NOT NULL,   transaction_date Datetime NOT NULL,   responsible_user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (part_number) REFERENCES parts_inventory (part_number),   FOREIGN KEY (responsible_user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE inventory_audit (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   part_number Varchar NOT NULL,   audit_date Datetime NOT NULL,   physical_count Int NOT NULL,   recorded_count Int NOT NULL,   discrepancy Int,   audited_by BigInt NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (part_number) REFERENCES parts_inventory (part_number),   FOREIGN KEY (audited_by) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE component_suppliers (   component_id BigInt NOT NULL,   supplier_id BigInt NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (component_id, supplier_id),   FOREIGN KEY (component_id) REFERENCES components (id),   FOREIGN KEY (supplier_id) REFERENCES suppliers (id) );  CREATE TABLE component_risks (   component_type Varchar NOT NULL,   risk_level Int NOT NULL,   description Varchar,   mitigation_strategy Varchar,   FOREIGN KEY (component_type) REFERENCES component_types (name) );  CREATE TABLE supplier_performance (   supplier_id BigInt NOT NULL,   performance_date Date NOT NULL,   on_time_delivery_rate Real NOT NULL,   defect_rate Real NOT NULL,   response_time Real,   FOREIGN KEY (supplier_id) REFERENCES suppliers (id) );  CREATE TABLE production_batches (   batch_id Varchar NOT NULL,   model_id BigInt NOT NULL,   start_date Datetime NOT NULL,   end_date Datetime NOT NULL,   quantity_produced Int NOT NULL,   quality_issues Int,   FOREIGN KEY (model_id) REFERENCES models (id) );  CREATE TABLE batch_bikes (   batch_id Varchar NOT NULL,   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   production_date Datetime NOT NULL,   inspector_id BigInt NOT NULL,   inspection_result Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (batch_id, bike_id),   FOREIGN KEY (batch_id) REFERENCES production_batches (batch_id),   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id),   FOREIGN KEY (inspector_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE parts_cross_reference (   part_number Varchar NOT NULL,   cross_part_number Varchar NOT NULL,   description Varchar,   PRIMARY KEY (part_number, cross_part_number),   FOREIGN KEY (part_number) REFERENCES parts_inventory (part_number),   FOREIGN KEY (cross_part_number) REFERENCES parts_inventory (part_number) );  CREATE TABLE preventive_maintenance (   task_id BigInt NOT NULL,   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   scheduled_date Datetime NOT NULL,   performed_date Datetime,   technician_id BigInt,   status Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (task_id, bike_id),   FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES maintenance_tasks (id),   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id),   FOREIGN KEY (technician_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE performance_stats (   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   stat_date Date NOT NULL,   ride_distance Real,   ride_duration Int,   avg_speed Real,   max_speed Real,   calories_burned Real,   PRIMARY KEY (bike_id, user_id, stat_date),   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE bike_maintenance (   bike_id BigInt NOT NULL,   service_center_id BigInt,   technician_id BigInt,   date_performed Datetime NOT NULL,   description Varchar NOT NULL,   parts_used BigInt,   FOREIGN KEY (bike_id) REFERENCES bikes (id),   FOREIGN KEY (service_center_id) REFERENCES service_centers (id),   FOREIGN KEY (technician_id) REFERENCES users (id),   FOREIGN KEY (parts_used) REFERENCES parts_inventory (part_number) );  CREATE TABLE component_ratings (   component_id BigInt NOT NULL,   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   rating Int NOT NULL CHECK (rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5),   comment Varchar,   date Datetime NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (component_id, user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (component_id) REFERENCES components (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE accessory_reviews (   accessory_id BigInt NOT NULL,   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   review_text Varchar NOT NULL,   date Datetime NOT NULL,   rating Int NOT NULL CHECK (rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5),   PRIMARY KEY (accessory_id, user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (accessory_id) REFERENCES accessories (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE accessory_ratings (   accessory_id BigInt NOT NULL,   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   rating Int NOT NULL CHECK (rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5),   date Datetime NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (accessory_id, user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (accessory_id) REFERENCES accessories (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE model_review_stats (   model_id BigInt NOT NULL,   average_rating Real NOT NULL,   total_reviews Int NOT NULL,   last_reviewed Date,   FOREIGN KEY (model_id) REFERENCES models (id) );  CREATE TABLE configuration_profiles (   profile_id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id BigInt NOT NULL,   profile_name Varchar NOT NULL,   default_configuration Varchar,   created_date Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );

### Question:
What is the percentage of bikes that have a rating of 4 or higher from users, compared to the total number of bikes that have at least one rating?
SELECT      (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN rating >= 4 THEN bike_id END) * 100.0) / COUNT(DISTINCT bike_id) AS percentage  FROM ratings;

CREATE TABLE FLIGHTS_SCHEDULE (   FLIGHTS_SCHEDULE_ID Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   FLIGHT Int NOT NULL,   FLIGHT_TIME Timestamp NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (FLIGHTS_SCHEDULE_ID) );

### Question:
What is the average number of flights scheduled per hour during peak travel times, and which flight numbers contribute most to this average?

WITH flight_hours AS (     SELECT strftime('%H', FLIGHT_TIME) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS count_per_hour     FROM FLIGHTS_SCHEDULE     GROUP BY hour ), peak_hours AS (     SELECT hour     FROM flight_hours     ORDER BY count_per_hour DESC     LIMIT 10 ), flights_in_peak AS (     SELECT FLIGHT, COUNT(*) AS freq     FROM FLIGHTS_SCHEDULE     WHERE strftime('%H', FLIGHT_TIME) IN (SELECT hour FROM peak_hours)     GROUP BY FLIGHT ), top_flights AS (     SELECT FLIGHT, freq     FROM flights_in_peak     ORDER BY freq DESC     LIMIT 10 ) SELECT      (SELECT AVG(count_per_hour) FROM flight_hours WHERE hour IN (SELECT hour FROM peak_hours)) AS avg_flights_per_hour,     (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(FLIGHT || ':' || freq, ', ') FROM top_flights) AS top_contributing_flights;

CREATE TABLE "match" (   paysl TEXT NOT NULL,   paysv TEXT NOT NULL,   butsl Integer NOT NULL,   butsv Integer NOT NULL,   type TEXT NOT NULL,   date Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (paysl) REFERENCES pays (nom),   FOREIGN KEY (paysv) REFERENCES pays (nom),   FOREIGN KEY (type) REFERENCES typematch (type) );  CREATE TABLE pays (   nom TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   groupe Character NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE typematch (   type TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE joueur (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   nom TEXT NOT NULL,   prenom TEXT NOT NULL,   pays TEXT NOT NULL,   date_naissance DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (pays) REFERENCES pays(nom) );  CREATE TABLE position (   nom TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY );  CREATE TABLE joueur_position (   joueur_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   position_nom TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (joueur_id, position_nom),   FOREIGN KEY (joueur_id) REFERENCES joueur(id),   FOREIGN KEY (position_nom) REFERENCES position(nom) );  CREATE TABLE stade (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   nom TEXT NOT NULL,   ville TEXT NOT NULL,   capacite INTEGER NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE classement (   pays TEXT NOT NULL,   groupe Character NOT NULL,   points INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   buts_marques INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   buts_encaisses INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   PRIMARY KEY (pays, groupe),   FOREIGN KEY (pays) REFERENCES pays(nom),   FOREIGN KEY (groupe) REFERENCES pays(groupe) );  CREATE TABLE arbitre (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   nom TEXT NOT NULL,   pays TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (pays) REFERENCES pays(nom) );  CREATE TABLE but_evenement (   evenement_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   but_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (evenement_id) REFERENCES evenement(id) );  CREATE TABLE avertissement_evenement (   evenement_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   joueur_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   couleur TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (evenement_id) REFERENCES evenement(id),   FOREIGN KEY (joueur_id) REFERENCES joueur(id) );  CREATE TABLE remplacement_evenement (   evenement_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   joueur_sortant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   joueur_entant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (evenement_id) REFERENCES evenement(id),   FOREIGN KEY (joueur_sortant_id) REFERENCES joueur(id),   FOREIGN KEY (joueur_entant_id) REFERENCES joueur(id) );  CREATE TABLE transfert (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   joueur_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   equipe_depart TEXT NOT NULL,   equipe_arrivee TEXT NOT NULL,   date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (joueur_id) REFERENCES joueur(id),   FOREIGN KEY (equipe_depart) REFERENCES pays(nom),   FOREIGN KEY (equipe_arrivee) REFERENCES pays(nom) );  CREATE TABLE entrainement (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   equipe TEXT NOT NULL,   date DATE NOT NULL,   duree_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (equipe) REFERENCES pays(nom) );  CREATE TABLE focus_entrainement (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   nom TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE entrainement_focus (   entrainement_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   focus_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (entrainement_id, focus_id),   FOREIGN KEY (entrainement_id) REFERENCES entrainement(id),   FOREIGN KEY (focus_id) REFERENCES focus_entrainement(id) );  CREATE INDEX idx_joueur_pays ON joueur(pays);  CREATE INDEX idx_stade_ville ON stade(ville);  CREATE TABLE affiliation (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   club TEXT NOT NULL,   association TEXT NOT NULL,   date_debut DATE NOT NULL,   date_fin DATE,   note TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (club) REFERENCES pays(nom),   FOREIGN KEY (association) REFERENCES pays(nom) );  CREATE TABLE coach (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   nom TEXT NOT NULL,   prenom TEXT NOT NULL,   pays_origine TEXT NOT NULL,   equipe TEXT,   date_nommination DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (pays_origine) REFERENCES pays(nom),   FOREIGN KEY (equipe) REFERENCES pays(nom) );  CREATE TABLE former_binding (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   joueur_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   club_affectation TEXT NOT NULL,   date_debut DATE NOT NULL,   date_fin DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (joueur_id) REFERENCES joueur(id),   FOREIGN KEY (club_affectation) REFERENCES pays(nom) );  CREATE TABLE gravity_game (   match_paysl TEXT NOT NULL,   match_paysv TEXT NOT NULL,   date_match DATE NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (match_paysl) REFERENCES pays(nom),   FOREIGN KEY (match_paysv) REFERENCES pays(nom),   FOREIGN KEY (match_paysl, match_paysv, date_match) REFERENCES match(paysl, paysv, date) );  CREATE TABLE highlight (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   match_paysl TEXT NOT NULL,   match_paysv TEXT NOT NULL,   moment TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (match_paysl, match_paysv) REFERENCES match(paysl, paysv) );  CREATE TABLE kme (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   evenement_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (evenement_id) REFERENCES evenement(id) );  CREATE TABLE match_entraineur (   match_paysl TEXT NOT NULL,   match_paysv TEXT NOT NULL,   coach_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   role TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (match_paysl, match_paysv, coach_id),   FOREIGN KEY (match_paysl, match_paysv) REFERENCES match(paysl, paysv),   FOREIGN KEY (coach_id) REFERENCES coach(id) );  CREATE TABLE match_stade (   match_paysl TEXT NOT NULL,   match_paysv TEXT NOT NULL,   stade_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (match_paysl, match_paysv),   FOREIGN KEY (match_paysl, match_paysv) REFERENCES match(paysl, paysv),   FOREIGN KEY (stade_id) REFERENCES stade(id) );  CREATE TABLE match_joueur (   joueur_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   match_paysl TEXT NOT NULL,   match_paysv TEXT NOT NULL,   buts INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   passes DECISIVES INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   tirs_coups TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   PRIMARY KEY (joueur_id, match_paysl, match_paysv),   FOREIGN KEY (joueur_id) REFERENCES joueur(id),   FOREIGN KEY (match_paysl, match_paysv) REFERENCES match(paysl, paysv) );  CREATE TABLE medal_record (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   pays TEXT NOT NULL,   medaille_type TEXT NOT NULL,   annee INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (pays) REFERENCES pays(nom) );  CREATE TABLE nutrition_plan (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   joueur_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   date_debut DATE NOT NULL,   date_fin DATE,   details TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (joueur_id) REFERENCES joueur(id) );  CREATE TABLE objective (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   pays TEXT NOT NULL,   match_paysl TEXT,   match_paysv TEXT,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (pays) REFERENCES pays(nom),   FOREIGN KEY (match_paysl, match_paysv) REFERENCES match(paysl, paysv) );  CREATE INDEX idx_medal_record_pays ON medal_record(pays);

### Question:
Identify the system health check type that has the longest average time between consecutive checks in the last 60 days, where each check is associated with a system backup operation and the health status is "OK". Include the check type, the average time between checks, and the most recent check timestamp.

WITH filtered_checks AS (     SELECT          h.check_type,          h.check_time     FROM          guacamole_system_health h     INNER JOIN          guacamole_system_backup b     ON h.check_type = b.backup_type     WHERE          h.status = 'OK'         AND h.check_time >= datetime('now', '-60 days') ), lagged_checks AS (     SELECT         check_type,         check_time,         LEAD(check_time) OVER (PARTITION BY check_type ORDER BY check_time) AS next_check_time     FROM         filtered_checks ) SELECT     check_type,     AVG(julianday(next_check_time) - julianday(check_time)) * 86400 AS avg_time_between_checks,     (SELECT MAX(check_time) FROM filtered_checks f WHERE f.check_type = lc.check_type) AS most_recent_check FROM     lagged_checks lc WHERE next_check_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY     check_type ORDER BY     avg_time_between_checks DESC LIMIT 1;

### Question:
The query joins **compliancecheck**, **tenant**, **complianceissue**, and **activitylog**. This combination allows for the analysis of unresolved compliance issues and their related activity logs. The LEFT JOIN on complianceissue ensures that even checks with no unresolved issues are still included, providing a complete overview of all compliance checks.

SELECT      cc.tkey,     cc.checkname,     COUNT(DISTINCT ci.tkey) AS unresolved_issues_count,     COUNT(DISTINCT al.tkey) AS activity_logs_count FROM compliancecheck cc LEFT JOIN complianceissue ci      ON cc.tkey = ci.check_tkey AND ci.resolved = 0 LEFT JOIN activitylog al      ON al.details LIKE '%' || cc.tkey || '%' GROUP BY cc.tkey, cc.checkname;

### Question:
What is the total number of animals in the system that have a recorded height measurement higher than the average height for their respective species type?

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM tb_clienteanimais a JOIN (     SELECT cod_tipo_animal, AVG(CAST(alturaAnimal AS FLOAT)) AS avg_height     FROM tb_clienteanimais     GROUP BY cod_tipo_animal ) avg_heights ON a.cod_tipo_animal = avg_heights.cod_tipo_animal WHERE CAST(a.alturaAnimal AS FLOAT) > avg_heights.avg_height;

CREATE TABLE users (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   "key" Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE emails (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id Int NOT NULL,   email Text,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );

### Question:
List the name and key of the user with the highest number of email addresses and the count of those emails.
SELECT users.name, users.key, COUNT(emails.id) AS email_count FROM users JOIN emails ON users.id = emails.user_id GROUP BY users.id ORDER BY email_count DESC LIMIT 1;

### Question:
What is the total number of completed maintenance records for each facility, along with the facility name and the average time between scheduled and completed dates?

SELECT f.title AS facility_name, COUNT(*) AS total_completed, AVG(julianday(m.completed_date) - julianday(m.scheduled_date)) AS avg_days_difference FROM public_maintenance_record m JOIN public_facility f ON m.facility_id = f.id WHERE m.completed_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY f.id;

 CREATE TABLE QRTZ_SIMPLE_TRIGGERS (   SCHED_NAME Varchar NOT NULL,   TRIGGER_NAME Varchar NOT NULL,   TRIGGER_GROUP Varchar NOT NULL,   REPEAT_COUNT BigInt NOT NULL,   REPEAT_INTERVAL BigInt NOT NULL,   TIMES_TRIGGERED BigInt NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (SCHED_NAME, TRIGGER_NAME, TRIGGER_GROUP),   FOREIGN KEY (SCHED_NAME, TRIGGER_NAME, TRIGGER_GROUP) REFERENCES QRTZ_TRIGGERS (SCHED_NAME, TRIGGER_NAME, TRIGGER_GROUP) );  CREATE TABLE QRTZ_CRON_TRIGGERS (   SCHED_NAME Varchar NOT NULL,   TRIGGER_NAME Varchar NOT NULL,   TRIGGER_GROUP Varchar NOT NULL,   CRON_EXPRESSION Varchar NOT NULL,   TIME_ZONE_ID Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (SCHED_NAME, TRIGGER_NAME, TRIGGER_GROUP),   FOREIGN KEY (SCHED_NAME, TRIGGER_NAME, TRIGGER_GROUP) REFERENCES QRTZ_TRIGGERS (SCHED_NAME, TRIGGER_NAME, TRIGGER_GROUP) );  CREATE TABLE QRTZ_SIMPROP_TRIGGERS (   SCHED_NAME Varchar NOT NULL,   TRIGGER_NAME Varchar NOT NULL,   TRIGGER_GROUP Varchar NOT NULL,   STR_PROP_1 Varchar,   STR_PROP_2 Varchar,   STR_PROP_3 Varchar,   INT_PROP_1 Int,   INT_PROP_2 Int,   LONG_PROP_1 BigInt,   LONG_PROP_2 BigInt,   DEC_PROP_1 Numeric,   DEC_PROP_2 Numeric,   BOOL_PROP_1 Boolean,   BOOL_PROP_2 Boolean,   TIME_ZONE_ID Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (SCHED_NAME, TRIGGER_NAME, TRIGGER_GROUP),   FOREIGN KEY (SCHED_NAME, TRIGGER_NAME, TRIGGER_GROUP) REFERENCES QRTZ_TRIGGERS (SCHED_NAME, TRIGGER_NAME, TRIGGER_GROUP) );  CREATE TABLE QRTZ_FIRED_TRIGGERS (   SCHED_NAME Varchar NOT NULL,   ENTRY_ID Varchar NOT NULL,   TRIGGER_NAME Varchar NOT NULL,   TRIGGER_GROUP Varchar NOT NULL,   INSTANCE_NAME Varchar NOT NULL,   FIRED_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   SCHED_TIME BigInt NOT NULL,   PRIORITY Integer NOT NULL,   STATE Varchar NOT NULL,   JOB_NAME Varchar,   JOB_GROUP Varchar,   IS_NONCONCURRENT Boolean,   REQUESTS_RECOVERY Boolean,   PRIMARY KEY (SCHED_NAME, ENTRY_ID) ); ### Question:
Which jobs have a recovery request enabled, and what is the total number of times their triggers have fired, along with the earliest and latest fire times, for each job, considering only triggers that are not paused and have a priority greater than 5, grouped by job name and group, sorted by the total fire count in ascending order?

SELECT      j.JOB_NAME,     j.JOB_GROUP,     COUNT(f.ENTRY_ID) AS total_fire_count,     MIN(f.FIRED_TIME) AS earliest_fire_time,     MAX(f.FIRED_TIME) AS latest_fire_time FROM QRTZ_JOB_DETAILS j JOIN QRTZ_TRIGGERS t ON j.JOB_NAME = t.JOB_NAME AND j.JOB_GROUP = t.JOB_GROUP JOIN QRTZ_FIRED_TRIGGERS f ON t.TRIGGER_NAME = f.TRIGGER_NAME AND t.TRIGGER_GROUP = f.TRIGGER_GROUP WHERE j.IS_UPDATE_DATA = 1     AND t.TRIGGER_GROUP NOT IN (SELECT TRIGGER_GROUP FROM QRTZ_PAUSED_TRIGGER_GRPS)     AND f.PRIORITY > 5 GROUP BY j.JOB_NAME, j.JOB_GROUP ORDER BY total_fire_count ASC;

 CREATE TABLE producers (   producerID TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE song_artists (   song_artistsID TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   song Int NOT NULL,   artist Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (song) REFERENCES songs (id),   FOREIGN KEY (artist) REFERENCES artists (artistID) );  CREATE TABLE artist_genres (   artist_id TEXT NOT NULL,   genre_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (artist_id) REFERENCES artists(artistID),   FOREIGN KEY (genre_id) REFERENCES genres(genre_id),   PRIMARY KEY (artist_id, genre_id) );  CREATE TABLE users (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   username TEXT NOT NULL,   email TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE playlists (   playlist_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   date_created DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id) );  CREATE TABLE playlist_songs (   playlist_id TEXT NOT NULL,   song_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (playlist_id) REFERENCES playlists(playlist_id),   FOREIGN KEY (song_id) REFERENCES songs(id) );  CREATE TABLE song_reviews (   review_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   song_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   content TEXT,   rating INTEGER CHECK(rating >= 0 AND rating <= 5),   date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (song_id) REFERENCES songs(id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id) );  CREATE TABLE album_reviews (   review_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   album_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   content TEXT,   rating INTEGER CHECK(rating >= 0 AND rating <= 5),   date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (album_id) REFERENCES albums(albumID),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id) );  CREATE TABLE tags (   tag_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (tag_id) );  CREATE TABLE song_tags (   song_id TEXT NOT NULL,   tag_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (song_id) REFERENCES songs(id),   FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES tags(tag_id),   PRIMARY KEY (song_id, tag_id) );  CREATE TABLE tag_statistics (   tag_id TEXT NOT NULL,   total_usage_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES tags(tag_id),   PRIMARY KEY (tag_id) );  CREATE TABLE playlist_tags (   playlist_id TEXT NOT NULL,   tag_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (playlist_id) REFERENCES playlists(playlist_id),   FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES tags(tag_id),   PRIMARY KEY (playlist_id, tag_id) );  CREATE TABLE song_languages (   song_id TEXT NOT NULL,   language_code TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (song_id) REFERENCES songs(id),   PRIMARY KEY (song_id) );  CREATE TABLE languages (   language_code TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   language_name TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (language_code) );  CREATE TABLE user_streaming_stats (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   total_listening_time INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   total_songs_streamed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   PRIMARY KEY (user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id) );  CREATE TABLE user_top_songs (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   song_id TEXT NOT NULL,   play_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (song_id) REFERENCES songs(id),   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, song_id) );  CREATE TABLE user_top_albums (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   album_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   play_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (album_id) REFERENCES albums(albumID),   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, album_id) );  CREATE TABLE playlist_popularity (   playlist_id TEXT NOT NULL,   total_views INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   total_edits INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (playlist_id) REFERENCES playlists(playlist_id),   PRIMARY KEY (playlist_id) );  CREATE TABLE album_interactions (   interaction_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   album_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   interaction_type TEXT NOT NULL,   interaction_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (album_id) REFERENCES albums(albumID),   PRIMARY KEY (interaction_id) );  CREATE TABLE artist_interactions (   interaction_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   artist_id TEXT NOT NULL,   interaction_type TEXT NOT NULL,   interaction_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (artist_id) REFERENCES artists(artistID),   PRIMARY KEY (interaction_id) );  CREATE TABLE playlist_shares (   share_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   playlist_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   share_type TEXT NOT NULL,   share_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (playlist_id) REFERENCES playlists(playlist_id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id),   PRIMARY KEY (share_id) );  CREATE TABLE song_similarities (   song1_id TEXT NOT NULL,   song2_id TEXT NOT NULL,   similarity_score REAL NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (song1_id) REFERENCES songs(id),   FOREIGN KEY (song2_id) REFERENCES songs(id),   PRIMARY KEY (song1_id, song2_id) );  CREATE TABLE recommendation_models (   model_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   model_version TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   PRIMARY KEY (model_id) );  CREATE TABLE recommended_songs (   recommendation_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   model_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   song_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (model_id) REFERENCES recommendation_models(model_id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (song_id) REFERENCES songs(id),   PRIMARY KEY (recommendation_id) );  CREATE TABLE background_music_log (   log_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   context TEXT NOT NULL,   song_id TEXT NOT NULL,   duration_used REAL NOT NULL,   log_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (song_id) REFERENCES songs(id),   PRIMARY KEY (log_id) );

### Question:
What is the total number of unique users who have both interacted with a song and reviewed it, grouped by the most common device they use?

SELECT      d.device_type,     COUNT(DISTINCT u.user_id) AS unique_users FROM users u JOIN song_interactions si ON u.user_id = si.user_id JOIN song_reviews sr ON u.user_id = sr.user_id JOIN user_devices ud ON u.user_id = ud.user_id JOIN devices d ON ud.device_id = d.device_id GROUP BY d.device_type ORDER BY unique_users DESC;

CREATE TABLE user (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   email Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   full_name Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE user_role (   user_id Integer NOT NULL,   role Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, role),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE project (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL,   code Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   description Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE project_member (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   project_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES project (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user (id) );  CREATE TABLE project_member_role (   member_id Integer NOT NULL,   role Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (member_id, role),   FOREIGN KEY (member_id) REFERENCES project_member (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE part_family (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL,   code Text NOT NULL,   counter Integer NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE change_request (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   description Text NOT NULL,   cycle Text NOT NULL,   created_by Integer NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_by Integer NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES user (id),   FOREIGN KEY (updated_by) REFERENCES user (id) );  CREATE TABLE part (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   family_id Integer NOT NULL,   ref Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   designation Text NOT NULL,   created_by Integer NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_by Integer NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (family_id) REFERENCES part_family (id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES user (id),   FOREIGN KEY (updated_by) REFERENCES user (id) );  CREATE TABLE part_revision (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   part_id Integer NOT NULL,   revision Integer NOT NULL,   designation Text NOT NULL,   change_request_id Integer NOT NULL,   cycle Text NOT NULL,   created_by Integer NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_by Integer NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (part_id) REFERENCES part (id),   FOREIGN KEY (change_request_id) REFERENCES change_request (id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES user (id),   FOREIGN KEY (updated_by) REFERENCES user (id) );  CREATE TABLE part_validation (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   part_rev_id Integer NOT NULL,   result Text NOT NULL,   comments Text NOT NULL,   created_by Integer NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_by Integer NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (part_rev_id) REFERENCES part_revision (id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES user (id),   FOREIGN KEY (updated_by) REFERENCES user (id) );  CREATE TABLE part_approval (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   validation_id Integer NOT NULL,   assignee_id Integer NOT NULL,   decision TEXT NOT NULL,   comments Text NOT NULL,   created_by Integer NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_by Integer NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (validation_id) REFERENCES part_validation (id),   FOREIGN KEY (assignee_id) REFERENCES user (id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES user (id),   FOREIGN KEY (updated_by) REFERENCES user (id) );  CREATE TABLE change_part_create (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   request_id Integer NOT NULL,   family_id Integer NOT NULL,   version Text NOT NULL,   designation Text NOT NULL,   comments Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (request_id) REFERENCES change_request (id),   FOREIGN KEY (family_id) REFERENCES part_family (id) );  CREATE TABLE change_part_fork (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   request_id Integer NOT NULL,   part_id Integer NOT NULL,   version Text NOT NULL,   designation Text NOT NULL,   comments Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (request_id) REFERENCES change_request (id),   FOREIGN KEY (part_id) REFERENCES part (id) );  CREATE TABLE change_part_revision (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   request_id Integer NOT NULL,   part_id Integer NOT NULL,   designation Text NOT NULL,   comments Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (request_id) REFERENCES change_request (id),   FOREIGN KEY (part_id) REFERENCES part (id) );  CREATE TABLE change_review (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   request_id Integer NOT NULL,   assignee_id Integer NOT NULL,   decision TEXT NOT NULL,   comments Text NOT NULL,   created_by Integer NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_by Integer NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (request_id) REFERENCES change_request (id),   FOREIGN KEY (assignee_id) REFERENCES user (id) );  CREATE TABLE document (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL,   description Text NOT NULL,   created_by Integer NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   checkout Integer NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES user (id),   FOREIGN KEY (checkout) REFERENCES user (id) );  CREATE TABLE document_revision (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   document_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   revision Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   filename Text NOT NULL,   filesize Integer NOT NULL,   created_by Integer NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   change_description Text NOT NULL,   uploaded Integer NOT NULL,   sha1 TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES document (id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES user (id) );

CREATE TABLE comments (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   message Text NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   taskId TEXT NOT NULL,   authorId TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (authorId) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (taskId) REFERENCES tasks (id) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE tasks (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   title Varchar NOT NULL,   dueDate Timestamp NOT NULL,   description Text NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   sectionId TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sectionId) REFERENCES sections (id) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE ); CREATE TABLE reviews (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   image Varchar NOT NULL,   overall_rating Int NOT NULL,   description Text NOT NULL,   enabled Boolean NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE locations (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   lat Decimal NOT NULL,   lng Decimal NOT NULL,   description Text NOT NULL,   url Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE users (   id TEXT NOT NULL,   ip TEXT NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE categories (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   description Text,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE location_categories (   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   category_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (id),   FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories (id),   PRIMARY KEY (location_id, category_id) );  CREATE TABLE services (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   description Text,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE location_services (   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   service_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (id),   FOREIGN KEY (service_id) REFERENCES services (id),   PRIMARY KEY (location_id, service_id) );  CREATE TABLE tags (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE review_tags (   review_id TEXT NOT NULL,   tag_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (review_id) REFERENCES reviews (id),   FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES tags (id),   PRIMARY KEY (review_id, tag_id) );  CREATE TABLE location_hours (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   day_of_week Integer NOT NULL CHECK (day_of_week BETWEEN 0 AND 6),   open_time Text,   close_time Text,   is_closed Boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (id) );  CREATE TABLE location_photos (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   url Text NOT NULL,   caption Text,   uploaded_by TEXT NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (id),   FOREIGN KEY (uploaded_by) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE reservations (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   reservation_date Date NOT NULL,   start_time Text NOT NULL,   end_time Text NOT NULL,   number_of_guests Integer NOT NULL,   status Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id),   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (id) );  CREATE TABLE location_features (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   feature_type Varchar NOT NULL,   description Text,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (id) );  CREATE TABLE user_activity_logs (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   activity_type Varchar NOT NULL,   activity_details Text,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE report_reviews (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   review_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   reason Text NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   updated_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (review_id) REFERENCES reviews (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );

List the count of reviews created each day, sorted from the most recent to the oldest.
