CREATE TABLE images (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   image Varchar NOT NULL,   deleted_at Datetime NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE priorities (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE forms (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   priority_id TEXT NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   birthdate Date NOT NULL,   company Varchar NOT NULL,   profession Varchar NOT NULL,   notes Text NOT NULL,   phone_home Varchar NOT NULL,   phone_business Varchar NOT NULL,   phone_mobile Varchar NOT NULL,   fax Varchar NOT NULL,   biography Text NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (priority_id) REFERENCES priorities (id) );  CREATE TABLE users (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   password Varchar NOT NULL,   role Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE form_submissions (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   form_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   submission_date Datetime NOT NULL,   ip_address Varchar NOT NULL,   data Text NOT NULL,   status Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (form_id) REFERENCES forms (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE user_tokens (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   token_value Varchar NOT NULL,   token_type Varchar NOT NULL,   issued_at Datetime NOT NULL,   expires_at Datetime NOT NULL,   is_revoked INTEGER NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE user_preferences (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   theme Varchar NOT NULL,   language Varchar NOT NULL,   timezone Varchar NOT NULL,   notifications_enabled INTEGER NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE audit_logs (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   action_type Varchar NOT NULL,   action_details Text NOT NULL,   ip_address Varchar NOT NULL,   user_agent Varchar NOT NULL,   timestamp Datetime NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE form_versions (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   form_id TEXT NOT NULL,   version_number INTEGER NOT NULL,   changes_summary Text NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (form_id) REFERENCES forms (id) );  CREATE TABLE form_shares (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   form_id TEXT NOT NULL,   shared_with_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   access_level Varchar NOT NULL,   expires_at Datetime NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (form_id) REFERENCES forms (id),   FOREIGN KEY (shared_with_user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE form_access_tokens (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   form_id TEXT NOT NULL,   token_value Varchar NOT NULL,   expires_at Datetime NOT NULL,   access_count INTEGER NOT NULL,   max_access_count INTEGER NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (form_id) REFERENCES forms (id) );  CREATE TABLE form_tags (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   form_id TEXT NOT NULL,   tag_name Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (form_id) REFERENCES forms (id) );  CREATE TABLE form_comments (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   form_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   comment_text Text NOT NULL,   parent_comment_id TEXT,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (form_id) REFERENCES forms (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id),   FOREIGN KEY (parent_comment_id) REFERENCES form_comments (id) );  CREATE INDEX idx_form_submissions_form ON form_submissions (form_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_form_submissions_user ON form_submissions (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_user_tokens_user ON user_tokens (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_user_preferences_user ON user_preferences (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_audit_logs_user ON audit_logs (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_form_versions_form ON form_versions (form_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_form_shares_form ON form_shares (form_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_form_shares_user ON form_shares (shared_with_user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_form_access_tokens_form ON form_access_tokens (form_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_form_tags_form ON form_tags (form_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_form_comments_form ON form_comments (form_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_form_comments_user ON form_comments (user_id);  CREATE TABLE user_sessions (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   session_token TEXT NOT NULL,   ip_address TEXT NOT NULL,   user_agent TEXT NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   expires_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   is_active INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE TABLE form_notifications (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   form_submission_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   notification_type TEXT NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   sent_at DATETIME,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   message TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (form_submission_id) REFERENCES form_submissions (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) );  CREATE INDEX idx_user_sessions_user ON user_sessions (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_form_notifications_submission ON form_notifications (form_submission_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_form_notifications_user ON form_notifications (user_id);

### Question:
List the number of unique players who have been followed by more than 250 users and have at least eight achievements.

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM (     SELECT PseudoPlayer_id     FROM PseudoPlayerFollow     GROUP BY PseudoPlayer_id     HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) > 250 ) AS popular_players INNER JOIN (     SELECT PseudoPlayer_id     FROM PseudoPlayerAchievement     GROUP BY PseudoPlayer_id     HAVING COUNT(*) >= 8 ) AS achievement_players ON popular_players.PseudoPlayer_id = achievement_players.PseudoPlayer_id;

CREATE TABLE quarantines (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   address Varchar NOT NULL,   location Varchar NOT NULL,   capacity Int NOT NULL,   supervisor Int NOT NULL,   created_by Int NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE supervisors (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   phone Varchar NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   address Varchar NOT NULL,   position Varchar NOT NULL,   created_by Int NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE users (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   username VARCHAR NOT NULL UNIQUE,   password_hash VARCHAR NOT NULL,   role VARCHAR NOT NULL,   last_login DATETIME,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE patients (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   full_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   dob DATE NOT NULL,   gender VARCHAR NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   admission_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   release_date DATETIME,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_logs (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   log_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   recorded_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_equipment (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   item_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   last Checked DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_incidents (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   incident_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   occurred_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   reported_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   resolved BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   resolved_at DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (reported_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_supervisor_assignments (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   supervisor_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (supervisor_id) REFERENCES supervisors(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_capacity_logs (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   total_capacity INT NOT NULL,   used_capacity INT NOT NULL,   log_date DATE NOT NULL,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_maintenance (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   task_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   scheduled_for DATE NOT NULL,   completed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   completed_by INTEGER,   completed_at DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (completed_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_staff (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   full_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   role VARCHAR NOT NULL,   supervisor_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (supervisor_id) REFERENCES supervisors(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_staff_assignments (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   staff_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (staff_id) REFERENCES quarantine_staff(id),   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_visitor_logs (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   visitor_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   purpose VARCHAR NOT NULL,   entered_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   exited_at DATETIME,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_patient_intakes (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   patient_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   intake_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_patient_releases (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   patient_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   release_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   status VARCHAR NOT NULL,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_inventory (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   item_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   last_checked DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_inventory_movements (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   from_quarantine INTEGER,   to_quarantine INTEGER,   item_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,   moved_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (from_quarantine) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (to_quarantine) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES quarantine_inventory(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_medication_logs (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   patient_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   medication_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   dosage VARCHAR NOT NULL,   administered_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   administered_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   notes TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients(id),   FOREIGN KEY (administered_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_symptoms (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   patient_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   symptom VARCHAR NOT NULL,   recorded_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_contact_tracing (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   quarantine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   contact_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   details TEXT NOT NULL,   traced_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (quarantine_id) REFERENCES quarantines(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_test_results (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   patient_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   test_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   result VARCHAR NOT NULL,   tested_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patients(id),   FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE quarantine_health_tips (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   title VARCHAR NOT NULL,   content TEXT NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   published_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (published_by) REFERENCES users(id) ); ### Question:
List quarantines where the average inventory item quantity is below 10, the inventory was moved between quarantines managed by supervisors with the title 'Senior Quarantine Officer', and the movement occurred in the last 30 days. Include quarantine names, item names, and average quantities.

WITH senior_quarantines AS (     SELECT q.id     FROM quarantines q     JOIN quarantine_supervisor_assignments assg ON q.id = assg.quarantine_id     JOIN supervisors sup ON sup.id = assg.supervisor_id     WHERE sup.position = 'Senior Quarantine Officer' ) SELECT      q.name AS quarantine_name,     inv.item_name,     AVG(inv.quantity) AS avg_quantity FROM quarantines q JOIN quarantine_inventory inv ON inv.quarantine_id = q.id WHERE q.id IN (     SELECT m.from_quarantine     FROM quarantine_inventory_movements m     WHERE m.moved_at >= date('now', '-30 days')     AND m.from_quarantine IN (SELECT id FROM senior_quarantines)     AND m.to_quarantine IN (SELECT id FROM senior_quarantines)     UNION     SELECT m.to_quarantine     FROM quarantine_inventory_movements m     WHERE m.moved_at >= date('now', '-30 days')     AND m.from_quarantine IN (SELECT id FROM senior_quarantines)     AND m.to_quarantine IN (SELECT id FROM senior_quarantines) ) GROUP BY q.id, inv.item_name HAVING AVG(inv.quantity) < 10;

CREATE TABLE lang (   lang Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   lang_name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE datatype (   datatype Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   datatype_name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE usr (   usr Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   usr_name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE source (   source Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   source_name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE tag (   tag Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   tag_name Varchar NOT NULL,   datatype Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (datatype) REFERENCES datatype (datatype) );  CREATE TABLE dataset (   dataset Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   source Varchar NOT NULL,   dataset_name Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (source) REFERENCES source (source) );  CREATE TABLE import (   import TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   stamp Timestamp NOT NULL UNIQUE,   dataset Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   usr Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (dataset) REFERENCES dataset (dataset),   FOREIGN KEY (usr) REFERENCES usr (usr) );  CREATE TABLE col (   col TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   import BigInt NOT NULL,   tag Varchar NOT NULL,   header Text NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (import) REFERENCES import (import),   FOREIGN KEY (tag) REFERENCES tag (tag) );  CREATE TABLE row (   row TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE );

### Question:
Calculate the total number of columns for each import and display the import ID along with the count, sorted by the count in descending order.
SELECT import, COUNT(*) AS column_count FROM col GROUP BY import ORDER BY column_count DESC;

### Question:
Identify users who have accepted more than 5 friend requests but have not earned any badges, and provide their email and the count of unread notifications they have.

SELECT u.email,         (SELECT COUNT(*)          FROM notifications n          WHERE n.user_id = u.user_id AND n.is_seen = 0) AS unread_count FROM users u WHERE u.user_id IN (     SELECT fr.receiver_id     FROM friend_requests fr     WHERE fr.status = 'accepted'     GROUP BY fr.receiver_id     HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ) AND NOT EXISTS (     SELECT 1     FROM badges b     WHERE b.user_id = u.user_id );

CREATE TABLE potentialduplicate (   potentialduplicateid BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   uid TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   created Timestamp NOT NULL,   lastUpdated Timestamp NOT NULL,   lastUpdatedBy BigInt NOT NULL,   teiA TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   teiB TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (potentialduplicateid) );

### Question:
What is the average number of potential duplicates created by users who have also updated more than 3 potential duplicates with status 'Resolved' in the last 6 months?

WITH ResolvedUsers AS (     SELECT         lastUpdatedBy AS userId     FROM         potentialduplicate     WHERE         lastUpdated >= DATE('now', '-6 months') AND status = 'Resolved'     GROUP BY         lastUpdatedBy     HAVING         COUNT(*) > 3 ) SELECT     AVG(totalDuplicates) AS average_duplicates FROM (     SELECT         COUNT(*) AS totalDuplicates     FROM         potentialduplicate     WHERE         uid IN (SELECT userId FROM ResolvedUsers)     GROUP BY         uid );

### Question:
Which compute node hosts the most instances based on the usage records and cores allocation?

SELECT cnha.host_aggregate_name AS compute_node, COUNT(*) AS instance_count FROM new_cost_usage_records AS ncur JOIN new_compute_node_host_aggregates AS cnha ON ncur.compute_node_id = cnha.compute_node_id GROUP BY cnha.host_aggregate_name ORDER BY instance_count DESC LIMIT 1;

 CREATE TABLE core_party_ih (   party_id Integer NOT NULL,   party_key Text NOT NULL,   full_name Text NOT NULL,   short_name Text NOT NULL,   fk_employee_id_last_modified_by Integer NOT NULL,   fk_employee_id_created_by Integer NOT NULL,   created_timestamp Timestamp NOT NULL,   last_modified_timestamp Timestamp NOT NULL,   tech_insert_function Text NOT NULL,   tech_begin_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_end_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_is_current Boolean NOT NULL,   tech_row_hash Text NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_uuid Text NOT NULL,   tech_deleted_in_source_system Boolean NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE core_project_ih (   project_id Integer NOT NULL,   project_key Text NOT NULL,   jira_id Integer NOT NULL,   jira_key Text NOT NULL,   project_name Text NOT NULL,   tech_insert_function Text NOT NULL,   tech_begin_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_end_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_is_current Boolean NOT NULL,   tech_row_hash Text NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_uuid Text NOT NULL,   tech_deleted_in_source_system Boolean NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE core_organization_activity_summary (   summary_id Integer NOT NULL,   fk_organization_id Integer NOT NULL,   activity_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   new_deals_count Integer NOT NULL,   updated_deals_count Integer NOT NULL,   total_value BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_insert_function Text NOT NULL,   tech_begin_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_end_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_is_current Boolean NOT NULL,   tech_row_hash Text NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_uuid Text NOT NULL,   tech_deleted_in_source_system Boolean NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(fk_organization_id) REFERENCES core_organization_ih(organization_id) );  CREATE TABLE core_issue_dependency (   dependency_id Integer NOT NULL,   fk_primary_issue_id Integer NOT NULL,   fk_secondary_issue_id Integer NOT NULL,   dependency_type Text NOT NULL,   created_timestamp Timestamp NOT NULL,   resolved_timestamp Timestamp,   tech_insert_function Text NOT NULL,   tech_begin_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_end_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_is_current Boolean NOT NULL,   tech_row_hash Text NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_uuid Text NOT NULL,   tech_deleted_in_source_system Boolean NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(fk_primary_issue_id) REFERENCES core_issue_ih(issue_id),   FOREIGN KEY(fk_secondary_issue_id) REFERENCES core_issue_ih(issue_id) );  CREATE TABLE core_employee_training (   training_id Integer NOT NULL,   fk_employee_id Integer NOT NULL,   course_title Text NOT NULL,   completion_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   certification_file_url Text,   duration_days Integer NOT NULL,   tech_insert_function Text NOT NULL,   tech_begin_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_end_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_is_current Boolean NOT NULL,   tech_row_hash Text NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_uuid Text NOT NULL,   tech_deleted_in_source_system Boolean NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(fk_employee_id) REFERENCES core_employee_ih(employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE core_deal_stage_transition (   transition_id Integer NOT NULL,   fk_deal_id Integer NOT NULL,   from_stage Text NOT NULL,   to_stage Text NOT NULL,   transition_timestamp Timestamp NOT NULL,   initiator_employee_id Integer NOT NULL,   comments Text,   tech_insert_function Text NOT NULL,   tech_begin_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_end_effective_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_is_current Boolean NOT NULL,   tech_row_hash Text NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_utc_timestamp BigInt NOT NULL,   tech_data_load_uuid Text NOT NULL,   tech_deleted_in_source_system Boolean NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(fk_deal_id) REFERENCES core_deal_ih(deal_id),   FOREIGN KEY(initiator_employee_id) REFERENCES core_employee_ih(employee_id) );  CREATE INDEX idx_core_organization_activity_summary_org_id ON core_organization_activity_summary(fk_organization_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_core_issue_dependency_primary ON core_issue_dependency(fk_primary_issue_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_core_issue_dependency_secondary ON core_issue_dependency(fk_secondary_issue_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_core_employee_training_employee_id ON core_employee_training(fk_employee_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_core_deal_stage_transition_deal_id ON core_deal_stage_transition(fk_deal_id);

### Question:
Which employees have completed training courses with a duration of more than 7 days, and what is the longest duration of such training?

SELECT      e.employee_id,     e.full_name,     MAX(et.duration_days) AS longest_duration FROM core_employee_training et JOIN core_employee_ih e ON et.fk_employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE et.duration_days > 7 GROUP BY e.employee_id, e.full_name;

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE test_data (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   office_id TEXT NOT NULL,   area_id TEXT NOT NULL,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   sex Char NOT NULL,   in_date Date NOT NULL,   create_by TEXT NOT NULL,   create_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   update_by TEXT NOT NULL,   update_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   remarks TEXT NOT NULL,   del_flag Char NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE test_data_child (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   test_data_main_id TEXT NOT NULL,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   create_by TEXT NOT NULL,   create_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   update_by TEXT NOT NULL,   update_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   remarks TEXT NOT NULL,   del_flag Char NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (test_data_main_id) REFERENCES test_data_main (id) );  CREATE TABLE test_data_main (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   office_id TEXT NOT NULL,   area_id TEXT NOT NULL,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   sex Char NOT NULL,   in_date Date NOT NULL,   create_by TEXT NOT NULL,   create_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   update_by TEXT NOT NULL,   update_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   remarks TEXT NOT NULL,   del_flag Char NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE test_tree (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   parent_id TEXT NOT NULL,   parent_ids TEXT NOT NULL,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   sort TEXT NOT NULL,   create_by TEXT NOT NULL,   create_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   update_by TEXT NOT NULL,   update_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   remarks TEXT NOT NULL,   del_flag Char NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   PRIMARY KEY (id) );

### Question:
Which test_data entries have remarks that mention 'urgent' and are associated with a main entry with a specific sort order in the test_tree structure?

SELECT test_data.*  FROM test_data JOIN test_data_child ON test_data.id = test_data_child.test_data_main_id JOIN test_tree ON test_tree.id = test_data.id WHERE test_data_child.remarks LIKE '%urgent%'    AND test_tree.sort = 'specific_sort_order';

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE bill (   bills_id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   bills_month Varchar NOT NULL,   telephone_number_telephone_number_id Int NOT NULL,   programme_id_programme Int NOT NULL,   billscost Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (telephone_number_telephone_number_id) REFERENCES telephone_number (telephone_number_id),   FOREIGN KEY (programme_id_programme) REFERENCES telephone_number (telephone_number_id) );  CREATE TABLE calls (   calls_id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   calls_duration Int NOT NULL,   calls_timestamp Datetime NOT NULL,   bill_bills_id1 Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (bill_bills_id1) REFERENCES bill (bills_id) );  CREATE TABLE customer (   username Varchar NOT NULL,   password Varchar NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   surname Varchar NOT NULL,   tax_number Varchar NOT NULL,   seller_username Varchar NOT NULL,   programme_id_programme Int NOT NULL,   telephone_number Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE telephone_number (   telephone_number_id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   telephone_number_area Varchar NOT NULL,   telephone_number_type Varchar NOT NULL,   telephone_number_category Varchar NOT NULL,   programme_id_programme Int NOT NULL,   telephone_number Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE programme (   programme_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   programme_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description VARCHAR,   price_per_month INT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE seller (   seller_username VARCHAR NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   seller_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   commission_rate INT );  CREATE TABLE subscription (   subscription_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   programme_id INT NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username),   FOREIGN KEY (programme_id) REFERENCES programme(programme_id) );  CREATE TABLE payment (   payment_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   bill_id INT NOT NULL,   amount INT NOT NULL,   payment_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   status VARCHAR NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (bill_id) REFERENCES bill(bills_id) );  CREATE TABLE call_type (   call_type_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   type_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description VARCHAR );  CREATE TABLE area_code (   area_code_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   code VARCHAR NOT NULL,   region VARCHAR NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE call_detail (   call_detail_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   call_id INT NOT NULL,   type_id INT NOT NULL,   is_incoming BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   caller_number VARCHAR,   receiver_number VARCHAR,   FOREIGN KEY (call_id) REFERENCES calls(calls_id),   FOREIGN KEY (type_id) REFERENCES call_type(call_type_id) );  CREATE TABLE customer_address (   address_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   street VARCHAR NOT NULL,   city VARCHAR NOT NULL,   postal_code VARCHAR NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE complaint (   complaint_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   complaint_text TEXT NOT NULL,   status VARCHAR NOT NULL,   submission_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   resolution_date DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE promo_code (   promo_code_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   code VARCHAR NOT NULL UNIQUE,   discount_percent INT NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE message (   message_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   sender_number INT NOT NULL,   receiver_number INT NOT NULL,   message_text TEXT NOT NULL,   timestamp DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sender_number) REFERENCES telephone_number(telephone_number),   FOREIGN KEY (receiver_number) REFERENCES telephone_number(telephone_number) );  CREATE TABLE call_log_archive (   archived_call_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   call_id INT NOT NULL,   archive_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   reason VARCHAR,   FOREIGN KEY (call_id) REFERENCES calls(calls_id) );  CREATE TABLE device (   device_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   telephone_number_id INT NOT NULL,   model VARCHAR NOT NULL,   manufacturer VARCHAR NOT NULL,   purchase_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (telephone_number_id) REFERENCES telephone_number(telephone_number_id) );  CREATE TABLE usage_summary (   usage_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   month DATE NOT NULL,   total_call_duration INT NOT NULL,   total_calls INT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE payment_method (   method_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   details TEXT NOT NULL,   is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE tariff_plan (   plan_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   plan_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   data_included INT,   call_minutes_included INT,   price INT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE service_request (   request_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   request_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   status VARCHAR NOT NULL,   submitted_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE log_audit (   log_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   table_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   record_id INT NOT NULL,   action VARCHAR NOT NULL,   timestamp DATETIME NOT NULL,   user VARCHAR NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE feature (   feature_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   feature_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description VARCHAR );  CREATE TABLE feature_subscription (   feature_sub_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   feature_id INT NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username),   FOREIGN KEY (feature_id) REFERENCES feature(feature_id) );  CREATE TABLE international_call (   international_call_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   call_id INT NOT NULL,   country_code VARCHAR NOT NULL,   is_roaming BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   foreign_fee INT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (call_id) REFERENCES call_detail(call_detail_id) );  CREATE TABLE customer_note (   note_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   note_text TEXT NOT NULL,   created_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   creator_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE call_charge (   call_charge_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   call_detail_id INT NOT NULL,   cost INT NOT NULL,   is_discounted BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (call_detail_id) REFERENCES call_detail(call_detail_id) );  CREATE TABLE customer_service (   service_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   service_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   service_description TEXT NOT NULL,   start_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   end_date DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE tax_record (   tax_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   tax_period DATE NOT NULL,   amount INT NOT NULL,   reference_number VARCHAR NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE customer_rating (   rating_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   service_id INT,   rating INT NOT NULL,   comment TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username),   FOREIGN KEY (service_id) REFERENCES customer_service(service_id) );  CREATE TABLE invoice (   invoice_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   bill_id INT NOT NULL,   invoice_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   due_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   total_amount INT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (bill_id) REFERENCES bill(bills_id) );  CREATE TABLE credit_transaction (   transaction_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   amount INT NOT NULL,   transaction_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   transaction_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE service_voucher (   voucher_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   voucher_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   voucher_code VARCHAR NOT NULL,   validity_date DATE NOT NULL,   is_used BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE customer_profile_view (   view_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   viewer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   viewed_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   view_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (viewer_username) REFERENCES customer(username),   FOREIGN KEY (viewed_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE reminder (   reminder_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   reminder_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   scheduled_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   is_sent BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   message TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE customer_group (   group_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   group_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description TEXT );  CREATE TABLE customer_group_membership (   membership_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   group_id INT NOT NULL,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   join_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (group_id) REFERENCES customer_group(group_id),   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE data_package (   package_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   package_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   data_amount INT NOT NULL,   price INT NOT NULL,   validity_days INT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE data_package_purchase (   purchase_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   package_id INT NOT NULL,   purchase_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   activation_date DATETIME,   expiry_date DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username),   FOREIGN KEY (package_id) REFERENCES data_package(package_id) );  CREATE TABLE customer_surveys (   survey_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   survey_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   completion_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   results TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE service_report (   report_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   service_id INT NOT NULL,   report_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   outcome TEXT,   remarks TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (service_id) REFERENCES customer_service(service_id) );  CREATE TABLE service_attachment (   attachment_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   service_id INT NOT NULL,   file_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   file_path VARCHAR NOT NULL,   upload_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (service_id) REFERENCES customer_service(service_id) );  CREATE TABLE broadcast_message (   message_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   sender_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   message_text TEXT NOT NULL,   message_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   target_group VARCHAR,   FOREIGN KEY (sender_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE customer_consent (   consent_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   customer_username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   consent_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   granted BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   grant_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_username) REFERENCES customer(username) );  CREATE TABLE service_outage (   outage_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   area_code_id INT NOT NULL,   start_datetime DATETIME NOT NULL,   end_datetime DATETIME,   reason TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (area_code_id) REFERENCES area_code(area_code_id) );  CREATE TABLE outage_report (   report_id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   outage_id INT NOT NULL,   reported_by VARCHAR NOT NULL,   report_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (outage_id) REFERENCES service_outage(outage_id) );

### Question:
How many customers have a data package purchase with a validity period longer than 90 days and a purchase date in the last 5 months?

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dpp.customer_username) FROM data_package dp JOIN data_package_purchase dpp ON dp.package_id = dpp.package_id WHERE dp.validity_days > 90   AND dpp.purchase_date >= DATE('now', '-5 months');

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE alembic_version (   version_num Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE bot_history (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   bot_id TEXT NOT NULL,   version_number SmallInt NOT NULL,   last_rank SmallInt NOT NULL,   last_score Float NOT NULL,   last_num_players SmallInt NOT NULL,   last_games_played BigInt NOT NULL,   language Varchar NOT NULL,   when_retired Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE challenge (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   created Datetime NOT NULL,   finished Datetime NOT NULL,   num_games Int NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   most_recent_game_task Datetime NOT NULL,   issuer TEXT NOT NULL,   winner TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE challenge_participant (   challenge_id Int NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   points Int NOT NULL,   ships_produced Int NOT NULL,   attacks_made Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (challenge_id) REFERENCES challenge (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE game_bot_stat (   game_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   bot_id TEXT NOT NULL,   planets_controlled TEXT NOT NULL,   ships_produced TEXT NOT NULL,   ships_alive TEXT NOT NULL,   ships_alive_ratio Float NOT NULL,   ships_relative_ratio Float NOT NULL,   planets_destroyed TEXT NOT NULL,   attacks_total TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE game_stat (   game_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   turns_total TEXT NOT NULL,   planets_destroyed TEXT NOT NULL,   ships_produced TEXT NOT NULL,   ships_destroyed TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE game_view_stat (   game_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   views_total TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE hackathon_participant (   hackathon_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE hackathon_snapshot (   hackathon_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   bot_id TEXT NOT NULL,   games_played TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   score Float NOT NULL,   mu Float NOT NULL,   sigma Float NOT NULL,   version_number Int NOT NULL,   language Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE leagues (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   category Varchar NOT NULL,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   description Varchar NOT NULL,   query Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE organization_email_domain (   organization_id Int NOT NULL,   domain Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE user_badge (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   badge_id TEXT NOT NULL,   is_enabled TinyInt NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',   creation_time Datetime NOT NULL,   update_time Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE user_notification (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   title Varchar NOT NULL,   body Varchar NOT NULL,   mood TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'neutral',   creation_time Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE user_tier_history (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   tier Varchar NOT NULL,   last_in_tier Datetime NOT NULL,   total_time_in_tier TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE bot_update_history (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   bot_id TEXT NOT NULL,   version_number SMALLINT NOT NULL,   update_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   reason TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user_badge (user_id) );  CREATE TABLE challenge_stat (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   challenge_id INT NOT NULL,   total_turns INT NOT NULL,   most_turns_won INT NOT NULL,   most_ships_produced INT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (challenge_id) REFERENCES challenge (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE hackathon_ranking (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   hackathon_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   rank INT NOT NULL,   score Float NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (hackathon_id) REFERENCES hackathon_snapshot (hackathon_id) );  CREATE TABLE game_round_stat (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   game_id TEXT NOT NULL,   round_number INT NOT NULL,   winner TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (game_id) REFERENCES game_stat (game_id) );  CREATE TABLE user_game_history (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   game_id TEXT NOT NULL,   bot_id TEXT NOT NULL,   score Float NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user_badge (user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (game_id) REFERENCES game_stat (game_id) );  CREATE TABLE user_league (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   league_id INT NOT NULL,   join_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   leave_time DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user_badge (user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (league_id) REFERENCES leagues (id) );  CREATE TABLE challenge_bot (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   challenge_id INT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   bot_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (challenge_id) REFERENCES challenge (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user_badge (user_id) );  CREATE TABLE notification_view (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   notification_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   viewed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   view_time DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (notification_id) REFERENCES user_notification (id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user_badge (user_id) );  CREATE TABLE game_event_log (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   game_id TEXT NOT NULL,   event_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   event_type TEXT NOT NULL,   details TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (game_id) REFERENCES game_stat (game_id) );  CREATE TABLE bot_attack_stat (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   bot_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   attacks_made INT NOT NULL,   attacks_won INT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (bot_id) REFERENCES game_bot_stat (bot_id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user_badge (user_id) ); ### Question:
What is the total number of food items ordered by customers who have not used any coupons and have placed orders in the last 30 days?

SELECT c.cname FROM Customer AS c JOIN make_order AS mo ON c.cid = mo.cid JOIN (     SELECT ol.ocid, SUM(oc.quantity) AS total_quantity     FROM Order_List AS ol     JOIN order_contains AS oc ON ol.ocid = oc.ocid     GROUP BY ol.ocid ) AS order_summary ON mo.ocid = order_summary.ocid WHERE order_summary.total_quantity = (     SELECT MAX(total_quantity)     FROM (         SELECT SUM(oc2.quantity) AS total_quantity         FROM Order_List AS ol2         JOIN order_contains AS oc2 ON ol2.ocid = oc2.ocid         GROUP BY ol2.ocid     ) );

### Question:
First, I need to figure out how these tables can be joined. The timeinput has project_id and app_user_id. The task table also has project_id and user_id. The user_skill table has user_id. So possible joins could be between timeinput and task via project_id, or timeinput's app_user_id with task's user_id, or user_skill with either of those via user_id.

WITH combined_data AS (     SELECT          tsk.user_id AS user_name,         tin.minutes,         us.skill     FROM          timeinput tin     JOIN          task tsk ON tin.project_id = tsk.project_id     JOIN          user_skill us ON tsk.user_id = us.user_id          UNION ALL      SELECT          tin.app_user_id AS user_name,         tin.minutes,         us.skill     FROM          timeinput tin     JOIN          user_skill us ON tin.app_user_id = us.user_id ) SELECT      user_name,     skill,     SUM(minutes) AS total_minutes FROM      combined_data GROUP BY      user_name,     skill ORDER BY      user_name;

### Question:
Identify the names of projects where the average duration of tasks is greater than 10 hours.
SELECT projet.nom FROM projet JOIN tache ON projet.id_projet = tache.ref_projet GROUP BY projet.id_projet, projet.nom HAVING AVG(tache.duree) > 10;

### Question:
List the name, model_key, and last_updated_by of models that have a dependency on another model and have at least one category named 'Analytics' in new_table_7, sorted by the number of comments in new_table_3 in descending order.

WITH qualified_models AS (     SELECT DISTINCT dep.model_id     FROM new_table_5 dep     JOIN new_table_7 cat ON dep.model_id = cat.model_id     WHERE cat.category_name = 'Analytics' ) SELECT m.name, m.model_key, m.last_updated_by, COUNT(t3.id) AS comment_count FROM qualified_models qm JOIN act_de_model m ON qm.model_id = m.id LEFT JOIN new_table_3 t3 ON m.id = t3.model_id GROUP BY m.id, m.name, m.model_key, m.last_updated_by ORDER BY comment_count DESC;

### Question:
Find the extension with the most recently executed cronjob (based on the "last_run" timestamp), and provide the number of enabled templates, the count of distinct languages in its translations, and the sum of access levels for all its ACL entries.

SELECT    t.count_enabled AS enabled_templates,   l.distinct_languages,   a.sum_access_level FROM (   SELECT extension_id    FROM castro_extension_cronjobs    ORDER BY last_run DESC    LIMIT 1 ) AS c LEFT JOIN (   SELECT extension_id, COUNT(*) AS count_enabled    FROM castro_extension_templatehooks    WHERE enabled = '1'    GROUP BY extension_id ) AS t ON c.extension_id = t.extension_id LEFT JOIN (   SELECT extension_id, COUNT(DISTINCT language) AS distinct_languages    FROM castro_extension_translations    GROUP BY extension_id ) AS l ON c.extension_id = l.extension_id LEFT JOIN (   SELECT extension_id, SUM(CAST(access_allowed AS INTEGER)) AS sum_access_level    FROM castro_extension_acl    GROUP BY extension_id ) AS a ON c.extension_id = a.extension_id;

CREATE TABLE author (   ssn Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   address Varchar NOT NULL,   phone Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE book (   ISBN Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   title Varchar NOT NULL,   year Int NOT NULL,   price Float NOT NULL,   publisher Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE shoppingbasket (   basketId Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   username Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE stocks (   ISBN Varchar NOT NULL,   warehouseCode Int NOT NULL,   number Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (ISBN) REFERENCES book (ISBN) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (warehouseCode) REFERENCES warehouse (warehouseCode) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE discount (    discountId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,    code VARCHAR NOT NULL UNIQUE,    discountType VARCHAR NOT NULL,    value FLOAT NOT NULL,    startDate DATETIME NOT NULL,    endDate DATETIME NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE auditlog (   logId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   tableName VARCHAR NOT NULL,   recordId INTEGER NOT NULL,   actionType VARCHAR NOT NULL,   actionTime DATETIME NOT NULL,   username VARCHAR,   FOREIGN KEY (username) REFERENCES customers (username) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE taxes (   taxId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   taxName VARCHAR NOT NULL,   taxRate FLOAT NOT NULL,   appliesTo VARCHAR NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE shipmentdetails (   shipmentDetailId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   trackingId INTEGER NOT NULL,   weight FLOAT,   dimensions TEXT,   carrier VARCHAR NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (trackingId) REFERENCES shipmenttracking (trackingId) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE warehouseemployee (   employeeId INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   warehouseCode INTEGER NOT NULL,   username VARCHAR NOT NULL,   role VARCHAR NOT NULL,   hireDate DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (warehouseCode) REFERENCES warehouse (warehouseCode) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (username) REFERENCES customers (username) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE ); ### Question:
Identify the customers who have a gift card with a remaining balance over $50, have made at least one return in the last 6 months, and have placed orders containing books that are also in their recommendation history, grouped by their preferred book format.

SELECT up.format FROM userpreference up WHERE up.username IN (     SELECT g.username     FROM giftcard g     WHERE g.amount > 50 )   AND up.username IN (     SELECT r.username     FROM returns r     WHERE r.returnDate > DATE('now', '-6 months') )   AND up.username IN (     SELECT o.username     FROM orders o     JOIN orderitems oi ON o.orderId = oi.orderId     JOIN recommendation rec ON o.username = rec.username AND oi.ISBN = rec.ISBN ) GROUP BY up.format;

CREATE TABLE usuario (   dni Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   password Text NOT NULL,   rol Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (dni) );  CREATE TABLE clinico (   nombre Text NOT NULL,   apellido Text NOT NULL,   dni Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   fechaNacimiento Text NOT NULL,   email Text NOT NULL,   telefono Integer NOT NULL,   ciudad Text NOT NULL,   provincia Text NOT NULL,   codPostal Integer NOT NULL,   direccion Text NOT NULL,   especialidad Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (dni),   FOREIGN KEY (dni) REFERENCES usuario (dni) );  CREATE TABLE cuidador_familiar (   nombre Text NOT NULL,   apellido Text NOT NULL,   dni Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   fechaNacimiento Text NOT NULL,   email Text NOT NULL,   telefono Integer NOT NULL,   ciudad Text NOT NULL,   provincia Text NOT NULL,   codPostal Integer NOT NULL,   direccion Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (dni),   FOREIGN KEY (dni) REFERENCES usuario (dni) );  CREATE TABLE asiste (   dni_pac Text NOT NULL,   dni_fam Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (dni_pac, dni_fam),   FOREIGN KEY (dni_pac) REFERENCES paciente (dni),   FOREIGN KEY (dni_fam) REFERENCES cuidador_familiar (dni) );  CREATE TABLE paciente (   nombre Text NOT NULL,   apellido Text NOT NULL,   dni Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   fechaNacimiento Text NOT NULL,   email Text NOT NULL,   telefono Integer NOT NULL,   ciudad Text NOT NULL,   provincia Text NOT NULL,   codPostal Integer NOT NULL,   direccion Text NOT NULL,   dni_clinico Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (dni),   FOREIGN KEY (dni_clinico) REFERENCES clinico (dni),   FOREIGN KEY (dni) REFERENCES usuario (dni) );  CREATE TABLE admin (   nombre Text NOT NULL,   apellido Text NOT NULL,   dni Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   fechaNacimiento Text NOT NULL,   email Text NOT NULL,   telefono Integer NOT NULL,   ciudad Text NOT NULL,   provincia Text NOT NULL,   codPostal Integer NOT NULL,   direccion Text NOT NULL,   tipo Integer NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (dni),   FOREIGN KEY (dni) REFERENCES usuario (dni) );

### Question:
List the number of patients per city who are cared for by family caregivers residing in the same province, sorted from highest to lowest.

SELECT p.ciudad, COUNT(DISTINCT p.dni) AS num_pacientes FROM paciente p JOIN asiste a ON p.dni = a.dni_pac JOIN cuidador_familiar cf ON a.dni_fam = cf.dni WHERE p.provincia = cf.provincia GROUP BY p.ciudad ORDER BY num_pacientes DESC;

What are the names of the genres associated with movies that have at least one rating of 5 stars?

CREATE TABLE login (   id_user Int NOT NULL,   username Varchar NOT NULL,   password Varchar NOT NULL,   level Varchar NOT NULL,   nama_lengkap Varchar NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   alamat Varchar NOT NULL,   no_telp Varchar NOT NULL,   foto Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE pembayaran (   id_pembayaran Int NOT NULL,   fkTransaksi Int NOT NULL,   no_kartu Varchar NOT NULL,   nama_pengguna Varchar NOT NULL,   cvv Varchar NOT NULL,   status Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (fkTransaksi) REFERENCES transaksi (id_transaksi) );  CREATE TABLE produk (   id_produk Int NOT NULL,   nama_produk Varchar NOT NULL,   harga Int NOT NULL,   stok Int NOT NULL,   deskripsi Varchar NOT NULL,   gambar Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE transaksi (   id_transaksi Int NOT NULL,   id_user Int NOT NULL,   id_produk Int NOT NULL,   jumlah Int NOT NULL,   total_harga Int NOT NULL,   tanggal Date NOT NULL );

### Question:
What is the full name and email of the user who made the transaction with the highest total price on December 15th, 2023, along with the product name and payment status?

SELECT l.nama_lengkap, l.email, p.nama_produk, pb.status FROM transaksi t JOIN login l ON t.id_user = l.id_user JOIN produk p ON t.id_produk = p.id_produk JOIN pembayaran pb ON t.id_transaksi = pb.fkTransaksi WHERE t.tanggal = '2023-12-15'   AND t.total_harga = (SELECT MAX(total_harga) FROM transaksi WHERE tanggal = '2023-12-15');

### Question:
List the number of active subscriptions per billing tariff, along with the average usage amount for each tariff's associated billing accounts in the month of May 2023, excluding any tariffs with less than three active subscriptions.

SELECT     bt.id AS tariff_id,     bt.name AS tariff_name,     COUNT(bs.id) AS num_active_subscriptions,     COALESCE(AVG(bu.usage_amount), 0.0) AS average_usage FROM billing_subscription bs JOIN billing_tariff bt ON bs.tariff_id = bt.id LEFT JOIN billing_usage bu ON bs.account_id = bu.account_id     AND bu.period = '2023-05' WHERE     bs.status = 'Active'     AND bs.start_date <= '2023-05-31'     AND bs.end_date >= '2023-05-01' GROUP BY bt.id, bt.name HAVING num_active_subscriptions >= 3;

### Question:
Which departments have at least one employee who has received a performance review score above 90, and what is the highest score per department?

SELECT d.dept_name, MAX(pr.score) AS highest_score FROM performance_reviews pr JOIN employees e ON pr.employee_id = e.id JOIN roles r ON e.role_id = r.id JOIN departments d ON r.department_id = d.id WHERE pr.score > 90 GROUP BY d.dept_name;

### Question:
What is the distribution of failed parts returned under warranty claims, grouped by product model and failure reason?

SELECT      productos.nombre AS model,      part_failure.nombre AS failure_reason,      COUNT(*) AS count FROM      formulario_retorno JOIN      detalle_retorno ON formulario_retorno.id_form_retorno = detalle_retorno.id_form_retorno JOIN      part_failure ON detalle_retorno.id_part_fail = part_failure.id_part_fail JOIN      productos ON detalle_retorno.equipment_serial_number = productos.codigo_serie WHERE      formulario_retorno.warranty_status = 'under warranty' GROUP BY      productos.nombre,      part_failure.nombre;

 CREATE TABLE abstracts (     publication_id TEXT NOT NULL,     text TEXT NOT NULL,     language TEXT NOT NULL,     word_count INTEGER NOT NULL,     FOREIGN KEY (publication_id) REFERENCES publications (id),     PRIMARY KEY (publication_id) );  CREATE TABLE publishers (     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,     name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,     address TEXT,     country TEXT );  CREATE TABLE publication_publishers (     publication_id TEXT NOT NULL,     publisher_id INTEGER NOT NULL,     publication_date TEXT,     PRIMARY KEY (publication_id),     FOREIGN KEY (publication_id) REFERENCES publications (id),     FOREIGN KEY (publisher_id) REFERENCES publishers (id) ); ### Question:
What is the average number of hours logged per day in January 2024 by employees who are enrolled in a training program titled "Advanced Analytics" and have a completion status of "In Progress"?

SELECT SUM(hours_logged) / 31.0 AS average_hours_per_day FROM work_hour_log_table WHERE employee_id IN (     SELECT e.employee_id     FROM employee_training_enrollment_table e     JOIN training_program_table t ON e.training_id = t.training_id     WHERE t.title = 'Advanced Analytics' AND e.completion_status = 'In Progress' ) AND log_date >= '2024-01-01' AND log_date < '2024-02-01';

 CREATE TABLE film_production (   film_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   company_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   role TEXT CHECK( role IN ('producer','distributor') ) NOT NULL,   percentage REAL NOT NULL CHECK( percentage BETWEEN 0 AND 100 ),   contract_date DATE,   last_update TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),   PRIMARY KEY (film_id, company_id),   FOREIGN KEY (film_id) REFERENCES film(film_id),   FOREIGN KEY (company_id) REFERENCES production_company(company_id) );  CREATE TABLE genre (   genre_id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   genre_name TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   popularity_rank INTEGER DEFAULT 0,   last_update TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')) );  CREATE TABLE film_genre (   film_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   genre_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   last_update TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),   PRIMARY KEY (film_id, genre_id),   FOREIGN KEY (film_id) REFERENCES film(film_id),   FOREIGN KEY (genre_id) REFERENCES genre(genre_id) );  CREATE TABLE classification (   classification_id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   rating TEXT CHECK( rating IN ('G','PG','PG-13','R','NC-17') ) NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   audience TEXT,   advisory_note TEXT,   last_update TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')) );  CREATE TABLE film_classification (   film_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   classification_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   effective_date DATE NOT NULL,   expires_date DATE,   last_update TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),   PRIMARY KEY (film_id),   FOREIGN KEY (film_id) REFERENCES film(film_id),   FOREIGN KEY (classification_id) REFERENCES classification(classification_id) );  CREATE TABLE promotion (   promotion_id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   promotion_name TEXT NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE NOT NULL,   discount_percentage REAL NOT NULL CHECK( discount_percentage BETWEEN 0 AND 100 ),   min_revenue REAL DEFAULT 0,   max_revenue REAL,   last_update TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')) );  CREATE TABLE film_promotion (   film_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   promotion_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   promotion_start DATE NOT NULL,   promotion_end DATE NOT NULL,   last_update TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),   PRIMARY KEY (film_id, promotion_id),   FOREIGN KEY (film_id) REFERENCES film(film_id),   FOREIGN KEY (promotion_id) REFERENCES promotion(promotion_id) );  CREATE TABLE staff_attendance (   attendance_id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   staff_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   store_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   date DATE NOT NULL,   time_in TIME NOT NULL,   time_out TIME NOT NULL,   total_hours REAL NOT NULL,   status TEXT CHECK( status IN ('present','absent','sick','leave') ),   last_update TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),   FOREIGN KEY (staff_id) REFERENCES staff(staff_id),   FOREIGN KEY (store_id) REFERENCES store(store_id) );  CREATE TABLE store_inventory_audit (   audit_id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   store_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   inventory_date DATE NOT NULL,   film_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   quantity_begin INTEGER NOT NULL,   quantity_in INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   quantity_out INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   quantity_end INTEGER NOT NULL,   remarks TEXT,   last_update TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),   FOREIGN KEY (store_id) REFERENCES store(store_id),   FOREIGN KEY (film_id) REFERENCES film(film_id) );  CREATE TABLE system_event (   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   event_name TEXT NOT NULL,   event_date DATE NOT NULL,   start_time TIME NOT NULL,   end_time TIME NOT NULL,   event_type TEXT NOT NULL,   location TEXT NOT NULL,   details TEXT NOT NULL,   organizer TEXT,   max_attendance INTEGER,   actual_attendance INTEGER DEFAULT 0,   event_status TEXT CHECK( event_status IN ('scheduled','completed','cancelled') ),   last_update TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')) );  CREATE TABLE user_preference (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   preference_key TEXT NOT NULL,   preference_value TEXT DEFAULT NULL,   category TEXT CHECK( category IN ('ui','profile','security') ) NOT NULL,   is_encrypted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   last_update TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, preference_key) );

### Question:
Which staff member has the highest number of 'scheduled' shifts at store_id 4 in 2024?

SELECT staff_id, COUNT(*) AS scheduled_shifts FROM staff_schedule WHERE store_id = 4   AND shift_status = 'scheduled'   AND shift_date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31' GROUP BY staff_id ORDER BY scheduled_shifts DESC LIMIT 1;

CREATE TABLE bills (   id Int NOT NULL,   students_id Int NOT NULL,   bills_category_id Int NOT NULL,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   amount Decimal NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Unpaid',   lunas TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   duedate Date NOT NULL,   payment Int NOT NULL,   note Text NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   users_id Int NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE bills_category (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   bills_category_name Varchar NOT NULL,   bills_category_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Tidak Tetap',   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE bills_status (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   bills_status_name Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE ci_sessions (   id Varchar NOT NULL,   ip_address Varchar NOT NULL,   timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,   data Blob NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE groups (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   group_name Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE menus (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   parent_id Int NOT NULL,   is_have_child Int NOT NULL,   title Varchar NOT NULL,   link Varchar NOT NULL,   icon Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE periode (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   periode_name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE privileges (   id Int NOT NULL,   group_id Int NOT NULL,   menu_id Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE schools_group (   id Int NOT NULL,   schools_group_name Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE settings (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   meta_key Varchar NOT NULL,   meta_value Text NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE students (   id Int NOT NULL,   students_group_id Int NOT NULL,   students_status_id Int NOT NULL,   users_id Int NOT NULL,   student_nis Varchar NOT NULL,   student_name Varchar NOT NULL,   gender TEXT NOT NULL,   birthplace Varchar NOT NULL,   birthdate Date NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   phone_number Varchar NOT NULL,   address Text NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE students_group (   id Int NOT NULL,   schools_group_id Int NOT NULL,   students_level_id Int NOT NULL,   students_group_name Varchar NOT NULL,   teachers_id Int NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE students_level (   id Int NOT NULL,   students_level_name Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE students_status (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   students_status_name Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE teachers (   id Int NOT NULL,   teachers_nik Varchar NOT NULL,   teachers_name Varchar NOT NULL,   gender TEXT NOT NULL,   birthplace Varchar NOT NULL,   birthdate Date NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   phone_number Varchar NOT NULL,   address Text NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE transactions (   id Int NOT NULL,   invoice_number Char NOT NULL,   students_id Int NOT NULL,   "transaction" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Pending',   type Varchar NOT NULL,   amount Decimal NOT NULL,   date Datetime NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE transaction_details (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   transaction_id Int NOT NULL,   bills_id Int NOT NULL,   bills_category_id Int NOT NULL,   bills_name Varchar NOT NULL,   bills_amount Decimal NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE users (   id Int NOT NULL,   group_id Int NOT NULL,   username Varchar NOT NULL,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   password Varchar NOT NULL,   foto Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Datetime NOT NULL,   updated_at Datetime NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   FOREIGN KEY (group_id) REFERENCES groups (id) ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE payment_methods (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   method_name TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   is_active TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE discounts (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   discount_name TEXT NOT NULL,   percentage REAL NOT NULL CHECK(percentage BETWEEN 0 AND 100),   applicable_category_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   FOREIGN KEY (applicable_category_id) REFERENCES bills_category(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE invoices (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   total_amount DECIMAL NOT NULL,   due_date DATE NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Unpaid',   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE notifications (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   message TEXT NOT NULL,   is_read TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   send_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE receipts (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   transaction_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   receipt_number TEXT NOT NULL,   amount_received DECIMAL NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (transaction_id) REFERENCES transactions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE academic_terms (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   term_name TEXT NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE NOT NULL,   is_active TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE courses (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   course_name TEXT NOT NULL,   teacher_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   credits INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(credits > 0),   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   FOREIGN KEY (teacher_id) REFERENCES teachers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE enrollments (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   course_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   enrollment_date DATE NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE attendance (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   attendance_date DATE NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(status IN ('Present', 'Absent', 'Leave')),   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE guardians (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   guardian_name TEXT NOT NULL,   relationship TEXT NOT NULL,   phone_number TEXT NOT NULL,   address TEXT NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE documents (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   document_type TEXT NOT NULL,   file_path TEXT NOT NULL,   uploaded_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE class_schedules (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   course_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   teacher_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   day TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(day IN ('Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday', 'Saturday', 'Sunday')),   time_slot TEXT NOT NULL,   location TEXT NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (teacher_id) REFERENCES teachers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE installment_plans (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   bill_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   payment_schedule TEXT NOT NULL,   total_installments INTEGER NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (bill_id) REFERENCES bills(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE audit_logs (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   bill_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   action_type TEXT NOT NULL,   action_details TEXT NOT NULL,   action_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (bill_id) REFERENCES bills(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE messages (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   from_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   to_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   subject TEXT NOT NULL,   message TEXT NOT NULL,   is_read TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   sent_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (from_user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (to_user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE library_books (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   title TEXT NOT NULL,   author TEXT NOT NULL,   isbn TEXT NOT NULL,   quantity INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(quantity >= 0),   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' );  CREATE TABLE book_lends (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   book_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   lend_date DATE NOT NULL,   return_date DATE,   is_returned TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (book_id) REFERENCES library_books(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE exam_schedule (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   course_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   exam_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(exam_type IN ('Midterm', 'Final')),   exam_date DATE NOT NULL,   start_time TIME NOT NULL,   end_time TIME NOT NULL,   location TEXT NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE exam_results (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   exam_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   score REAL NOT NULL CHECK(score BETWEEN 0 AND 100),   remarks TEXT,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (exam_id) REFERENCES exam_schedule(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE supplementary_fees (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   fee_type TEXT NOT NULL,   amount DECIMAL NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   due_date DATE NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   softdelete TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );

### Question:
What is the most common payment method used by students who have at least one overdue bill?

WITH overdue_students AS (     SELECT DISTINCT students_id     FROM bills     WHERE duedate < DATE('now') AND status = 'overdue' ) SELECT pm.method_name, COUNT(*) AS payment_count FROM transactions t JOIN payment_methods pm ON t.type = pm.method_name WHERE t.students_id IN (SELECT students_id FROM overdue_students) GROUP BY pm.method_name ORDER BY payment_count DESC LIMIT 1;

CREATE TABLE user (   id Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   start_balance Varchar NOT NULL,   available_money Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id) );

### Question:
What is the average difference between the start balance and available money for users with the highest available money?
SELECT AVG(CAST(start_balance AS INTEGER) - CAST(available_money AS INTEGER))  FROM user  WHERE available_money = (SELECT MAX(available_money) FROM user);

 CREATE TABLE plm_log_authentication (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   auth_method TEXT NOT NULL,   auth_token Clob,   user_id TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_referrer (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   referrer_url Clob,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_cache_hit (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   cache_key TEXT NOT NULL,   cache_value Clob,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_forwarded (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   forwarded_for TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_security (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   security_check TEXT NOT NULL,   result BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_custom_header (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   custom_name TEXT NOT NULL,   custom_value Clob NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_authentication_attempt (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   success BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   attempt_details Clob,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_data_transform (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   transformation_name TEXT NOT NULL,   in_data Clob,   out_data Clob,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_cors (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   origin TEXT NOT NULL,   is_allowed BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_encoding (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   encoding_type TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_http_version (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   version TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_request (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   request_line Clob NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );  CREATE TABLE plm_log_response (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_log_api TEXT NOT NULL,   response_line Clob NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_log_api) REFERENCES plm_log_api (id) );

### Question:
List the IP addresses that made more than one API request in a single day and include their associated city and country information.

SELECT      il.ip_address,     il.country,     il.city FROM      plm_log_api a JOIN      plm_log_ip_location il ON a.id = il.id_log_api GROUP BY      il.ip_address,      DATE(a.date) HAVING      COUNT(*) > 1;

### Question:
Find all recipes that include the ingredient 'flour' and have at least one user rating above 4, then list each recipe's average rating and the total number of unique users who have attempted it.

SELECT      r.recipe_id,     AVG(rr.rating) AS average_rating,     COUNT(DISTINCT rr.user_id) AS unique_users FROM      recipes r JOIN      recipe_ingredients ri ON r.recipe_id = ri.recipe_id JOIN      recipe_ratings rr ON r.recipe_id = rr.recipe_id WHERE      ri.ingredient_name = 'flour'     AND r.recipe_id IN (         SELECT DISTINCT recipe_id         FROM recipe_ratings         WHERE rating > 4     ) GROUP BY      r.recipe_id;

### Question:
Find the customer with the most unread notifications and provide their full name, occupation, and the count of unread notifications.

SELECT      c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name AS full_name,      c.occupation,      COUNT(n.id) AS unread_count FROM said_db_customer c JOIN said_db_customer_notification n ON c.id = n.customer_id WHERE n.read_status = 0 GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY unread_count DESC LIMIT 1;

### Question:
List the screen names of users who are part of community 5, have at least one retweet in the 'retweet_patterns' table, and whose tweets include the hashtag '#TechTrends'.

### Question:
Which model type has the highest number of models with both 'Low' compression level in export settings and 'Light' physics constraints, and what is the count of such models?

SELECT mt.dis, COUNT(*) as count FROM modeltype mt JOIN model m ON mt.mtid = m.mtid JOIN model_export_settings e ON m.mid = e.mid JOIN model_physics_constraint p ON m.mid = p.mid WHERE e.compressionLevel = 'Low' AND p.constraintType = 'Light' GROUP BY mt.dis ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1;

### Question:
How many departments have a completion rate of less than 50% for their set goals, considering only goals with a defined completion date?

SELECT COUNT(*) AS departments_with_low_completion_rate FROM (     SELECT g.departmentid     FROM department_goals g     INNER JOIN departments d ON g.departmentid = d.departmentid     WHERE g.target_date IS NOT NULL       AND g.completion_date IS NOT NULL     GROUP BY g.departmentid     HAVING          100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN g.completion_date <= g.target_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)          / COUNT(*) < 50 ) AS sub;

### Question:
How many users have either blocked another user or been blocked by someone else in the last 30 days?

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (     SELECT BlockerID AS userID FROM UserBlocks WHERE BlockedAt >= date('now', '-30 days')     UNION     SELECT BlockedID AS userID FROM UserBlocks WHERE BlockedAt >= date('now', '-30 days') );

 CREATE TABLE user_2fa_methods (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   method_type TEXT NOT NULL,   is_primary INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE user_status_logs (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   changed_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id) );  CREATE TABLE user_devices (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   device_info TEXT NOT NULL,   last_used Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id) );
