CREATE TABLE students (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   phoneNumber Varchar NOT NULL,   createdAt Datetime NOT NULL,   modifiedAt Datetime NOT NULL,   deletedAt Datetime );  CREATE TABLE exercises (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   createdAt Datetime NOT NULL,   modifiedAt Datetime NOT NULL,   deletedAt Datetime );  CREATE TABLE trainings (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Waiting',   createdAt Datetime NOT NULL,   modifiedAt Datetime,   deletedAt Datetime );  CREATE TABLE trainingExercises (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   trainingId Int NOT NULL,   exerciseId Int NOT NULL,   numberOfSessions Int NOT NULL,   createdAt Datetime NOT NULL,   modifiedAt Datetime NOT NULL,   deletedAt Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (trainingId) REFERENCES trainings (id),   FOREIGN KEY (exerciseId) REFERENCES exercises (id) );  CREATE TABLE studentTrainings (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   studentId Int NOT NULL,   trainingId Int NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Active',   createdAt Datetime NOT NULL,   modifiedAt Datetime NOT NULL,   deletedAt Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (studentId) REFERENCES students (id),   FOREIGN KEY (trainingId) REFERENCES trainings (id) );  CREATE TABLE studentTrainingExercises (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   studentTrainingId Int NOT NULL,   trainingExerciseId Int NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Pending',   createdAt Datetime NOT NULL,   modifiedAt Datetime NOT NULL,   deletedAt Datetime,   FOREIGN KEY (studentTrainingId) REFERENCES studentTrainings (id),   FOREIGN KEY (trainingExerciseId) REFERENCES trainingExercises (id) );  CREATE TABLE instructors (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   email TEXT NOT NULL,   phoneNumber TEXT,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME );  CREATE TABLE trainingInstructors (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   trainingId INTEGER NOT NULL,   instructorId INTEGER NOT NULL,   role TEXT NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (trainingId) REFERENCES trainings(id),   FOREIGN KEY (instructorId) REFERENCES instructors(id) );  CREATE TABLE sessions (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   trainingId INTEGER NOT NULL,   startDate DATETIME NOT NULL,   endDate DATETIME NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Scheduled',   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (trainingId) REFERENCES trainings(id) );  CREATE TABLE sessionExercises (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   sessionId INTEGER NOT NULL,   exerciseId INTEGER NOT NULL,   duration INTEGER NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (sessionId) REFERENCES sessions(id),   FOREIGN KEY (exerciseId) REFERENCES exercises(id) );  CREATE TABLE attendance (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   studentId INTEGER NOT NULL,   sessionId INTEGER NOT NULL,   present BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   notes TEXT,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (studentId) REFERENCES students(id),   FOREIGN KEY (sessionId) REFERENCES sessions(id) );  CREATE TABLE equipment (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   type TEXT NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME );  CREATE TABLE exerciseEquipment (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   exerciseId INTEGER NOT NULL,   equipmentId INTEGER NOT NULL,   quantityRequired INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (exerciseId) REFERENCES exercises(id),   FOREIGN KEY (equipmentId) REFERENCES equipment(id) );  CREATE TABLE inventory (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   equipmentId INTEGER NOT NULL,   locationId INTEGER NOT NULL,   quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,   lastRestocked DATETIME,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (equipmentId) REFERENCES equipment(id),   FOREIGN KEY (locationId) REFERENCES locations(id) );  CREATE TABLE feedback (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   studentTrainingExerciseId INTEGER NOT NULL,   instructorId INTEGER NOT NULL,   comment TEXT NOT NULL,   rating INTEGER CHECK (rating BETWEEN 1 AND 5),   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (studentTrainingExerciseId) REFERENCES studentTrainingExercises(id),   FOREIGN KEY (instructorId) REFERENCES instructors(id) );  CREATE TABLE notes (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   studentTrainingId INTEGER NOT NULL,   instructorId INTEGER NOT NULL,   content TEXT NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (studentTrainingId) REFERENCES studentTrainings(id),   FOREIGN KEY (instructorId) REFERENCES instructors(id) );  CREATE TABLE goals (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   studentId INTEGER NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   targetType TEXT NOT NULL,   targetValue INTEGER,   completionDate DATETIME,   status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Open',   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (studentId) REFERENCES students(id) );  CREATE TABLE goalProgress (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   goalId INTEGER NOT NULL,   date DATETIME NOT NULL,   currentValue INTEGER NOT NULL,   notes TEXT,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (goalId) REFERENCES goals(id) );  CREATE TABLE schedules (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   dayOfWeek TEXT NOT NULL,   startTime TEXT NOT NULL,   endTime TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME );  CREATE TABLE messages (   id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   fromUserId INTEGER NOT NULL,   toUserId INTEGER NOT NULL,   subject TEXT NOT NULL,   body TEXT NOT NULL,   isRead BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   sentAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   modifiedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME,   FOREIGN KEY (fromUserId) REFERENCES students(id),   FOREIGN KEY (toUserId) REFERENCES students(id) ); ### Question:
What percentage of student training exercises in the "Beginner's Yoga" training have a feedback comment from instructors?

WITH total AS (     SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count     FROM studentTrainingExercises     JOIN studentTrainings ON studentTrainingExercises.studentTrainingId = studentTrainings.id     JOIN trainingExercises ON studentTrainingExercises.trainingExerciseId = trainingExercises.id     JOIN trainings ON trainingExercises.trainingId = trainings.id     WHERE trainings.name = 'Beginner''s Yoga' ), with_feedback AS (     SELECT COUNT(*) AS feedback_count     FROM feedback     JOIN studentTrainingExercises ON feedback.studentTrainingExerciseId = studentTrainingExercises.id     JOIN studentTrainings ON studentTrainingExercises.studentTrainingId = studentTrainings.id     JOIN trainingExercises ON studentTrainingExercises.trainingExerciseId = trainingExercises.id     JOIN trainings ON trainingExercises.trainingId = trainings.id     WHERE trainings.name = 'Beginner''s Yoga' ) SELECT      (with_feedback.feedback_count * 100.0 / total.total_count) AS percentage FROM      total, with_feedback;

CREATE TABLE new_Book (   id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL,   author Text NOT NULL,   intro Text NOT NULL,   status Integer NOT NULL,   ownerId Integer NOT NULL,   createdAt Datetime NOT NULL,   updateAt Datetime NOT NULL,   deletedAt Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE new_Tag (   id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL,   ownerId Integer NOT NULL,   createdAt Datetime NOT NULL,   updateAt Datetime NOT NULL,   deletedAt Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE new_User (   id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL,   password Text NOT NULL,   email Text NOT NULL,   status Integer NOT NULL,   createdAt Datetime NOT NULL,   updateAt Datetime NOT NULL,   deletedAt Datetime NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE new_Review (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   bookId INTEGER NOT NULL,   userId INTEGER NOT NULL,   content TEXT NOT NULL,   rating INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5),   ownerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   updateAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (bookId) REFERENCES new_Book (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES new_User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE new_Comment (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   reviewId INTEGER NOT NULL,   userId INTEGER NOT NULL,   parentId INTEGER,  
content TEXT NOT NULL,   ownerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   updateAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (reviewId) REFERENCES new_Review (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES new_User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (parentId) REFERENCES new_Comment (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE new_Rating (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   userId INTEGER NOT NULL,   bookId INTEGER NOT NULL,   rating INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5),   ownerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   updateAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES new_User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (bookId) REFERENCES new_Book (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE new_ReadingList (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   userId INTEGER NOT NULL,   bookId INTEGER NOT NULL,   listName TEXT NOT NULL,   ownerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   updateAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES new_User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (bookId) REFERENCES new_Book (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE new_Recommendation (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   fromUserId INTEGER NOT NULL,   toUserId INTEGER NOT NULL,   bookId INTEGER NOT NULL,   message TEXT,   ownerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   updateAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (fromUserId) REFERENCES new_User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (toUserId) REFERENCES new_User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (bookId) REFERENCES new_Book (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE new_Bookshelf (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   userId INTEGER NOT NULL,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   ownerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   updateAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES new_User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE new_Like (   id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   userId INTEGER NOT NULL,   reviewId INTEGER NOT NULL,   ownerId INTEGER NOT NULL,   createdAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   updateAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   deletedAt DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES new_User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (reviewId) REFERENCES new_Review (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  Create Index idx_tag_name on new_Tag (name);  Create Index idx_user_email on new_User (email);

### Question:
Find the average rating of books that have at least one recommendation and a review with a comment from the same user.

SELECT AVG(r.rating) FROM new_Rating r WHERE r.bookId IN (     SELECT DISTINCT rec.bookId     FROM new_Recommendation rec     WHERE EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM new_Comment c         JOIN new_Review rev ON c.reviewId = rev.id         WHERE c.userId = rec.fromUserId             AND rev.bookId = rec.bookId     ) );

### Question:
List the employers who have posted tasks in categories where the average bid price is above $1000.

SELECT DISTINCT employer.id, employer.username FROM employer JOIN task ON employer.id = task.employer_id WHERE task.category_id IN (     SELECT task.category_id     FROM task     JOIN bid ON task.id = bid.task_id     GROUP BY task.category_id     HAVING AVG(bid.bid_price) > 1000 );

CREATE TABLE global_dlc_data (   dlc_id Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   temp_contract_id Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   contract_id Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   protocol_version Integer NOT NULL,   state Varchar NOT NULL,   is_initiator Integer NOT NULL,   account Varchar NOT NULL,   change_index Integer NOT NULL,   key_index Integer NOT NULL,   fee_rate Varchar NOT NULL,   fund_output_serial_id Varchar NOT NULL,   funding_outpoint Varchar NOT NULL,   funding_tx_id Varchar NOT NULL,   closing_tx_id Varchar NOT NULL,   aggregate_signature Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE oracle_nonces (   announcement_id Integer NOT NULL,   "index" Integer NOT NULL,   announcement_signature Varchar NOT NULL,   nonce Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   signature Varchar NOT NULL,   outcome Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (announcement_id) REFERENCES oracle_announcement_data (id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION ); ### Question:
Identify the VLANs associated with networks that have routing tables updated in the last 30 days and have at least one SNMP trap logged for the router with ID 42.

SELECT vlan.vlan_number, vlan.description FROM vlan WHERE vlan.network_id IN (     SELECT DISTINCT network_interface.network_id     FROM routing_table     JOIN network_interface ON routing_table.interface_id = network_interface.id     WHERE routing_table.router_id = 42       AND routing_table.last_updated >= date('now', '-30 days') ) AND EXISTS (     SELECT 1     FROM snmp_trap     WHERE snmp_trap.router_id = 42 );

PRIMARY KEY (id) );  CREATE TABLE ConversationParticipant (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   conversationId BigInt NOT NULL,   userId BigInt NOT NULL,   joinedAt TEXT,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (conversationId) REFERENCES Conversation(id),   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) );  CREATE TABLE UserSetting (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   userId BigInt NOT NULL,   settingKey TEXT NOT NULL,   settingValue TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) );  CREATE TABLE SavedMoment (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   userId BigInt NOT NULL,   momentId BigInt NOT NULL,   date TEXT,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id),   FOREIGN KEY (momentId) REFERENCES Moment(id) );  CREATE TABLE ActivityLog (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   userId BigInt NOT NULL,   actionType Integer NOT NULL,   actionData TEXT,   date TEXT,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) );  CREATE TABLE ReportedContent (   id BigInt NOT NULL UNIQUE,   userId BigInt NOT NULL,   contentId BigInt NOT NULL,   contentType Integer NOT NULL,

### Question:
List all users who reported a moment that was commented on by someone they are not friends with, and check if the reporting user has an active session. Include reports made after the user's activation date.

SELECT DISTINCT rc.userId FROM ReportedContent rc JOIN User u ON rc.userId = u.id JOIN Comment c ON rc.contentId = c.momentId AND rc.contentType = 1 LEFT JOIN Friendship f1 ON (f1.userId1 = rc.userId AND f1.userId2 = c.userId) LEFT JOIN Friendship f2 ON (f2.userId1 = c.userId AND f2.userId2 = rc.userId) WHERE f1.id IS NULL    AND f2.id IS NULL   AND rc.date > u.registerTime   AND u.activate = 1   AND EXISTS (     SELECT 1     FROM Session s     WHERE s.sid IN (       SELECT us.settingValue       FROM UserSetting us       WHERE us.userId = rc.userId         AND us.settingKey = 'session.sid'     )     AND s.expires > strftime('%s','now')   );

### Question:
List all projects that had an approved submission and at least three audit log entries for 'document_update' actions, including the primary member's name and the total number of such audit logs.

SELECT      s.project_id,     '-' AS full_name,     COUNT(*) AS document_update_count FROM EDCR_PROJECT_SUBMISSION s JOIN EDCR_AUDIT_LOG al ON s.project_id = al.object_id WHERE s.status = 'approved'   AND al.action_type = 'document_update' GROUP BY s.project_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3;

CREATE TABLE USER_ROLE (   role_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   role_name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE USER_ACCOUNT (   user_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   username TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   passkey TEXT NOT NULL,   role_id Integer NOT NULL,   last_login Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES USER_ROLE (role_id) );  CREATE TABLE OLYMPICS (   olympic_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   olympic_num TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   host_city TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   opening_date Date NOT NULL UNIQUE,   closing_date Date NOT NULL,   official_website TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE SPORT (   sport_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   sport_name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   dob Date NOT NULL,   team_size Integer NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE COUNTRY (   country_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   country TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   country_code TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE PARTICIPANT (   participant_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   fname TEXT NOT NULL,   lname TEXT NOT NULL,   nationality TEXT NOT NULL,   birth_place TEXT NOT NULL,   dob Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (nationality) REFERENCES COUNTRY (country) );  CREATE TABLE MEDAL (   medal_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   medal_title TEXT NOT NULL,   points Integer NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE VENUE (   venue_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   olympics_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   venue_name TEXT NOT NULL,   capacity Integer NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (olympics_id) REFERENCES OLYMPICS (olympic_id) );  CREATE TABLE EVENT (   event_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   sport_id Integer NOT NULL,   venue_id Integer NOT NULL,   gender Integer NOT NULL,   event_time Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sport_id) REFERENCES SPORT (sport_id),   FOREIGN KEY (venue_id) REFERENCES VENUE (venue_id) );  CREATE INDEX idx_event_time ON EVENT (event_time);  CREATE INDEX idx_olympic_id ON OLYMPICS (olympic_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_venue_id ON VENUE (venue_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_participant_nationality ON PARTICIPANT (nationality);  CREATE INDEX idx_sport_id ON EVENT (sport_id);  CREATE TABLE RANKINGS (   ranking_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   event_id Integer NOT NULL,   participant_id Integer NOT NULL,   medal_id Integer NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT (event_id),   FOREIGN KEY (participant_id) REFERENCES PARTICIPANT (participant_id),   FOREIGN KEY (medal_id) REFERENCES MEDAL (medal_id) );  CREATE TABLE TEAM (team_id INT PRIMARY KEY, sport_id INT, coach_id INT, team_name TEXT, team_size INT, FOREIGN KEY (sport_id) REFERENCES SPORT(sport_id), FOREIGN KEY (coach_id) REFERENCES COACH(coach_id));  CREATE TABLE PARTICIPANT_TEAM (participant_id INT, team_id INT, PRIMARY KEY (participant_id, team_id), FOREIGN KEY (participant_id) REFERENCES PARTICIPANT(participant_id), FOREIGN KEY (team_id) REFERENCES TEAM(team_id));  CREATE TABLE TRAINING_SITE (site_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, site_name TEXT, location TEXT, country_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (country_id) REFERENCES COUNTRY(country_id));  CREATE TABLE PARTICIPANT_TRAINING_SITE (participant_id INT, site_id INT, start_date DATE, end_date DATE, PRIMARY KEY (participant_id, site_id), FOREIGN KEY (participant_id) REFERENCES PARTICIPANT(participant_id), FOREIGN KEY (site_id) REFERENCES TRAINING_SITE(site_id));  CREATE TABLE SPONSOR (sponsor_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, country_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY (country_id) REFERENCES COUNTRY(country_id));  CREATE TABLE SPONSORSHIP (sponsorship_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, sponsor_id INTEGER, participant_id INTEGER, team_id INTEGER, start_date DATE, end_date DATE, FOREIGN KEY (sponsor_id) REFERENCES SPONSOR(sponsor_id), FOREIGN KEY (participant_id) REFERENCES PARTICIPANT(participant_id), FOREIGN KEY (team_id) REFERENCES TEAM(team_id));  CREATE TABLE PERMISSION (permission_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, permission_name TEXT UNIQUE);  CREATE TABLE ROLE_PERMISSION (role_id INTEGER, permission_id INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY (role_id, permission_id), FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES USER_ROLE(role_id), FOREIGN KEY (permission_id) REFERENCES PERMISSION(permission_id));  CREATE TABLE LOGIN_LOG (login_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, login_date DATE, status TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES USER_ACCOUNT(user_id));  CREATE TABLE VOLUNTEER (volunteer_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, fname TEXT, lname TEXT, contact_info TEXT, country_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY (country_id) REFERENCES COUNTRY(country_id));  CREATE TABLE VOLUNTEER_ASSIGNMENT (assignment_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, volunteer_id INTEGER, event_id INTEGER, start_date DATE, end_date DATE, FOREIGN KEY (volunteer_id) REFERENCES VOLUNTEER(volunteer_id), FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id));  CREATE TABLE COUNTRY_RANKING (ranking_year INTEGER, country_id INTEGER, gold_count INTEGER, silver_count INTEGER, total_rank INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY (ranking_year, country_id), FOREIGN KEY (country_id) REFERENCES COUNTRY(country_id));  CREATE TABLE WORLD_RECORD (record_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, sport_id INTEGER, record_value TEXT, record_holder_id INTEGER, set_date DATE, FOREIGN KEY (sport_id) REFERENCES SPORT(sport_id), FOREIGN KEY (record_holder_id) REFERENCES PARTICIPANT(participant_id));  CREATE TABLE FEEDBACK (feedback_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, role_id INTEGER, event_id INTEGER, comments TEXT, date_submitted DATE, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES USER_ACCOUNT(user_id), FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES USER_ROLE(role_id), FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id));  CREATE TABLE NOTIFICATION (notification_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, message TEXT, date_sent DATE, status TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES USER_ACCOUNT(user_id));  CREATE INDEX idx_ranking_participant ON RANKINGS (participant_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_ranking_event ON RANKINGS (event_id);  CREATE TABLE CALENDAR_EVENT (   calendar_event_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   olympic_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   date_time DATE NOT NULL,   event_type TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id),   FOREIGN KEY (olympic_id) REFERENCES OLYMPICS(olympic_id) );  CREATE TABLE EQUIPMENT (   equipment_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   sport_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   equipment_name TEXT NOT NULL,   manufacturer TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sport_id) REFERENCES SPORT(sport_id) );  CREATE TABLE NUTRITION_PLAN (   plan_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   participant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   coach_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE NOT NULL,   diet_type TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (participant_id) REFERENCES PARTICIPANT(participant_id),   FOREIGN KEY (coach_id) REFERENCES COACH(coach_id) );  CREATE TABLE TRANSPORTATION (   transport_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   team_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   departure_date DATE NOT NULL,   arrival_date DATE NOT NULL,   mode_of_transport TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (team_id) REFERENCES TEAM(team_id) );  CREATE TABLE WEATHER_EVENT (   weather_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   temperature REAL NOT NULL,   condition TEXT NOT NULL,   recorded_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id) );  CREATE TABLE BROADCAST_RIGHTS (   broadcast_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   country_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   olympic_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE NOT NULL,   platform TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (country_id) REFERENCES COUNTRY(country_id),   FOREIGN KEY (olympic_id) REFERENCES OLYMPICS(olympic_id) );  CREATE TABLE TICKET (   ticket_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   price REAL NOT NULL,   purchased_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   purchase_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id) );  CREATE TABLE INJURY_RECORD (   injury_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   participant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   injury_date DATE NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   recovery_date DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (participant_id) REFERENCES PARTICIPANT(participant_id) );  CREATE TABLE CERTIFICATE (   certificate_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   participant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   issue_date DATE NOT NULL,   certificate_type TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id),   FOREIGN KEY (participant_id) REFERENCES PARTICIPANT(participant_id) );  CREATE TABLE REFEREE (   referee_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   fname TEXT NOT NULL,   lname TEXT NOT NULL,   country_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   sport_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (country_id) REFERENCES COUNTRY(country_id),   FOREIGN KEY (sport_id) REFERENCES SPORT(sport_id) );  CREATE TABLE REFEREE_ASSIGNMENT (   assignment_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   referee_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (referee_id) REFERENCES REFEREE(referee_id),   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id) );  CREATE TABLE ANNOUNCEMENT (   announcement_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   message TEXT NOT NULL,   date_posted DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES USER_ACCOUNT(user_id) );  CREATE TABLE PARTICIPANT_HISTORY (   history_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   participant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   year INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (participant_id) REFERENCES PARTICIPANT(participant_id),   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id) );  CREATE TABLE VENUE_MAINTENANCE (   maintenance_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   venue_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE NOT NULL,   task_description TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (venue_id) REFERENCES VENUE(venue_id) );  CREATE TABLE SPECTATOR_FEEDBACK (   feedback_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   rating INTEGER NOT NULL,   comments TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES USER_ACCOUNT(user_id) );  CREATE TABLE AWARD_CEREMONY (   ceremony_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   date_time DATE NOT NULL,   location TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id) );  CREATE TABLE DOCUMENT_LIBRARY (   document_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   title TEXT NOT NULL,   upload_date DATE NOT NULL,   file_type TEXT NOT NULL,   uploaded_by INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (uploaded_by) REFERENCES USER_ACCOUNT(user_id) );  CREATE TABLE AGE_CATEGORY (   category_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   min_age INTEGER NOT NULL,   max_age INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES EVENT(event_id) );

### Question:
List all sports where the youngest athlete to compete was under 16 years old at the time of the event.

SELECT sport.sport_name FROM SPORT sport WHERE sport.sport_id IN (     SELECT event.sport_id     FROM PARTICIPANT_HISTORY ph     JOIN EVENT event ON ph.event_id = event.event_id     JOIN PARTICIPANT p ON ph.participant_id = p.participant_id     WHERE DATE(event.event_time) < DATE(p.dob, '+16 years')     GROUP BY event.sport_id );

CREATE TABLE User (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   username Text NOT NULL,   email Text NOT NULL,   password Text NOT NULL,   bio Text NOT NULL,   profilePictureUrl Text NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE Article (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   slug Text NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   title Text NOT NULL,   description Text NOT NULL,   markdownContent Text NOT NULL,   userId Integer NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE ArticleTag (   name Text NOT NULL UNIQUE );  CREATE TABLE _FavoritedArticles (   A Integer NOT NULL,   B Integer NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (A) REFERENCES Article (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (B) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE _FollowedUser (   A Integer NOT NULL,   B Integer NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (A) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (B) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE INDEX idx_postrevisions_postid ON PostRevisions (postId);  CREATE TABLE SeenRevisions (   postRevisionId TEXT NOT NULL,   userId TEXT NOT NULL,   revisionSeenAt DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   status INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   isAcknowledged INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   PRIMARY KEY (postRevisionId, userId),   FOREIGN KEY (postRevisionId) REFERENCES PostRevisions (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ); ### Question:
For each user, find the total upvotes their comments received, but only for comments on articles that have been flagged at least once.

SELECT Comment.userId, COUNT(CommentVote.id) AS totalUpvotes FROM Comment INNER JOIN (     SELECT DISTINCT articleId FROM ArticleFlag ) AS FlaggedArticles ON Comment.articleId = FlaggedArticles.articleId LEFT JOIN CommentVote ON Comment.id = CommentVote.commentId AND CommentVote.isUpvote = 1 GROUP BY Comment.userId;

### Question:
How many articles were created in the same year as the most recently created tag?

### Question:
List the types of events that have been logged for sites currently subscribed to those event types, along with the number of times each event has been logged.
SELECT es.event_type, COUNT(el.id) AS log_count FROM event_subscriptions es JOIN event_logs el ON es.id = el.event_subscription_id WHERE es.subscribed = 1 GROUP BY es.event_type;

### Question:
Show the names of all satellites that have sensor data collected in the year 2023, along with the names of the campaigns they are associated with.

SELECT s.name AS satellite_name, c.name AS campaign_name FROM SensorData sd JOIN Satellite s ON sd.satelliteId = s.id JOIN Composition cp ON cp.satelliteId = sd.satelliteId JOIN Campaign c ON cp.campaignId = c.id WHERE strftime('%Y', sd.collectedAt) = '2023';

CREATE TABLE users (   userId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   firstName Varchar NOT NULL,   lastName Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE transactions (   transactionId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   fromUserId Int NOT NULL,   toUserId Int NOT NULL,   amount Int NOT NULL,   account TEXT NOT NULL,   note Varchar NOT NULL,   date Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (fromUserId) REFERENCES users (userId),   FOREIGN KEY (toUserId) REFERENCES users (userId) );  CREATE TABLE account_info (   account_number TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   bank_name TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id INT NOT NULL,   account_type TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (userId) );  CREATE TABLE categories (   category_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   category_name TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT );  CREATE TABLE transaction_categories (   transaction_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   category_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (transaction_id, category_id),   FOREIGN KEY (transaction_id) REFERENCES transactions (transactionId),   FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories (category_id) );  CREATE TABLE budgets (   budget_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   category_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   amount INTEGER NOT NULL,   period TEXT NOT NULL,   start_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   end_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (userId),   FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories (category_id) );  CREATE TABLE budget_items (   item_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   budget_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   amount INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (budget_id) REFERENCES budgets (budget_id) );  CREATE TABLE recurring_transactions (   recurring_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   transaction_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   start_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   end_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   frequency INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (transaction_id) REFERENCES transactions (transactionId) );  CREATE TABLE user_profiles (   user_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   date_of_birth DATE NOT NULL,   bio TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (userId) );  CREATE TABLE user_contacts (   contact_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   contact_type TEXT NOT NULL,   contact_value TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (userId) );  CREATE TABLE user_addresses (   address_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   street TEXT NOT NULL,   city TEXT NOT NULL,   state TEXT NOT NULL,   zipcode TEXT NOT NULL,   country TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (userId) );  CREATE TABLE user_payment_methods (   payment_method_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   cardholder_name TEXT NOT NULL,   card_number TEXT NOT NULL,   expiry_date TEXT NOT NULL,   cvv INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (userId) );  CREATE TABLE tags (   tag_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   tag_name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE transaction_tags (   transaction_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   tag_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (transaction_id, tag_id),   FOREIGN KEY (transaction_id) REFERENCES transactions (transactionId),   FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES tags (tag_id) );  CREATE TABLE file_attachments (   file_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   filename TEXT NOT NULL,   file_path TEXT NOT NULL,   upload_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );

### Question:
Show the total transaction amount for each category linked to the "groceries" category name.

SELECT c.category_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_amount FROM transactions t JOIN transaction_categories tc ON t.transactionId = tc.transaction_id JOIN categories c ON tc.category_id = c.category_id WHERE c.category_name = 'groceries' GROUP BY c.category_id;

CREATE TABLE iso8583_mapper (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   description TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE iso8583_dataelement (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_mapper TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   dataelement_number Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   dataelement_name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   dataelement_type TEXT NOT NULL,   dataelement_length_type TEXT NOT NULL,   dataelement_length Integer NOT NULL,   dataelement_length_prefix Integer NOT NULL,   dataelement_repeated_colidx TEXT NOT NULL,   dataelement_repeated_colrange TEXT NOT NULL,   dataelement_subelement_separator TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_mapper) REFERENCES iso8583_mapper (id) );  CREATE TABLE iso8583_subelement (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id_data_element TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   subelement_number Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   subelement_name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   subelement_type TEXT NOT NULL,   subelement_type_format TEXT NOT NULL,   subelement_length Integer NOT NULL,   subelement_padding TEXT NOT NULL,   subelement_padding_pos TEXT NOT NULL,   subelement_separator TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_data_element) REFERENCES iso8583_dataelement (id) );  CREATE TABLE iso8583_messagetype (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   id_mapper TEXT NOT NULL,   message_type TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (id_mapper) REFERENCES iso8583_mapper (id) );  CREATE TABLE iso8583_bitmap (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   id_message_type TEXT NOT NULL,   bitmap_type TEXT NOT NULL,   bitmap_length INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_message_type) REFERENCES iso8583_messagetype (id) );  CREATE TABLE iso8583_messagefield (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   id_message_type TEXT NOT NULL,   field_number INTEGER NOT NULL,   field_name TEXT NOT NULL,   id_data_element TEXT NOT NULL,   position INTEGER NOT NULL,   is_mandatory BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_message_type) REFERENCES iso8583_messagetype (id),   FOREIGN KEY (id_data_element) REFERENCES iso8583_dataelement (id) );  CREATE TABLE iso8583_transaction (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   transaction_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   id_message_type_in TEXT,   id_message_type_out TEXT,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   details TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (id_message_type_in) REFERENCES iso8583_messagetype (id),   FOREIGN KEY (id_message_type_out) REFERENCES iso8583_messagetype (id) );  CREATE TABLE iso8583_transactionerror (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   id_transaction TEXT NOT NULL,   error_code TEXT NOT NULL,   error_message TEXT NOT NULL,   error_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_transaction) REFERENCES iso8583_transaction (id) );  CREATE TABLE iso8583_useraccess (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   username TEXT NOT NULL,   role TEXT NOT NULL,   access_rights TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES iso8583_mapper (id) );  CREATE TABLE iso8583_auditlog (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   username TEXT NOT NULL,   timestamp DATETIME NOT NULL,   action_type TEXT NOT NULL,   affected_id TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT ); ### Question:
For the 'financial' message group type, how many distinct message templates are there per message type that includes a 'payment' message type in their description?

SELECT      mt.message_type,     COUNT(DISTINCT mst.template_name) AS distinct_templates_count FROM      iso8583_messagetype mt JOIN      iso8583_messagegroup mg ON mt.message_type = mg.includes_message_type JOIN      iso8583_messagetemplate mst ON mt.id = mst.id_message_type WHERE      mg.group_type = 'financial'     AND mt.description LIKE '%payment%' GROUP BY      mt.message_type;

### Question:
Show the users who have both accepted collaborator invitations and posted at least one todo item on a canvas they are not the owner of, along with the number of such canvases per user.

SELECT cc.user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS non_owner_canvas_count FROM canvas_collaborators cc JOIN todo_items t ON cc.user_id = t.user_id JOIN notes n ON t.note_id = n.id JOIN canvasses c ON n.canvas_id = c.id WHERE CAST(cc.user_id AS INTEGER) != c.owner_id GROUP BY cc.user_id;

### Question:
Find the organization name and the average number of failed login attempts for all users who have logged in at least once.

SELECT      Organization.name,     AVG(User.failed_login_attempts) AS avg_failed_attempts FROM      User JOIN      User_Organization ON User.id = User_Organization.user_id JOIN      Organization ON User_Organization.organization_id = Organization.id WHERE      User.id IN (         SELECT DISTINCT user_id         FROM Activity     ) GROUP BY      Organization.name;

### Question:
Which employees have not performed any 'Vaccination' service in the last 6 months?

SELECT e.empl_id, e.empl_name FROM employee e WHERE e.empl_id NOT IN (     SELECT ps.performed_by     FROM pet_service ps     INNER JOIN service s ON ps.service_id = s.service_id     WHERE s.service_name = 'Vaccination'     AND ps.performed_on >= DATE('now', '-6 months') );

How many people have identification documents in the 45-55 age range?

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE contacts (   contact_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   address Varchar NOT NULL,   phone_number Varchar NOT NULL,   additional_info Text NOT NULL,   first_name Varchar NOT NULL,   last_name Varchar NOT NULL,   position Varchar NOT NULL,   company Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE acme_customers (   customer_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   contact_id Integer NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contacts (contact_id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  CREATE TABLE locations (   location_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   address Varchar NOT NULL,   longitude Real NOT NULL,   latitude Real NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE acme_orders (   order_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   created_on Timestamp NOT NULL,   comment Text NOT NULL,   customer_id Integer NOT NULL,   priority Integer NOT NULL,   start_location_id Integer NOT NULL,   end_location_id Integer NOT NULL,   scheduled_time TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (start_location_id) REFERENCES locations (location_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (end_location_id) REFERENCES locations (location_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES acme_customers (customer_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  CREATE TABLE warehouses (   warehouse_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   warehouse_name Varchar NOT NULL,   contact_id Integer NOT NULL,   location Integer NOT NULL,   max_capacity Real NOT NULL,   is_active Boolean NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contacts (contact_id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (location) REFERENCES locations (location_id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  CREATE TABLE acme_order_status (   created_on Timestamp NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   warehouse_id Integer NOT NULL,   order_id Integer NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES acme_orders (order_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE RESTRICT,   FOREIGN KEY (warehouse_id) REFERENCES warehouses (warehouse_id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  CREATE TABLE acme_users (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   password TEXT NOT NULL,   region TEXT NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   contact_id Integer NOT NULL,   token Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   avatar_url Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contacts (contact_id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  CREATE TABLE user_roles (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   role TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES acme_users (user_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  CREATE TABLE delivery_operators (   operator_id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   current_location Integer NOT NULL,   location_last_updated Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (operator_id) REFERENCES acme_users (user_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (current_location) REFERENCES locations (location_id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  CREATE TABLE order_deliveries (   order_id Integer NOT NULL,   delivery_operator_id Integer NOT NULL,   delivery_status TEXT NOT NULL,   start_location_id Integer NOT NULL,   end_location_id Integer NOT NULL,   active_time_periods TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES acme_orders (order_id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (delivery_operator_id) REFERENCES delivery_operators (operator_id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (start_location_id) REFERENCES locations (location_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE NO ACTION,   FOREIGN KEY (end_location_id) REFERENCES locations (location_id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE NO ACTION );  CREATE TABLE inventory_items (   item_id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   amount REAL NOT NULL,   units VARCHAR NOT NULL,   warehouse_id TEXT NOT NULL,   reorder_point REAL NOT NULL,   is_perishable BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (warehouse_id) REFERENCES warehouses (warehouse_id) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION );

### Question:
How many inventory items have an amount below their reorder point in warehouses with a max capacity over 1000 units?

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM inventory_items  JOIN warehouses ON inventory_items.warehouse_id = warehouses.warehouse_id  WHERE warehouses.max_capacity > 1000  AND inventory_items.amount < inventory_items.reorder_point;

CREATE TABLE kd_covid_PATIENT (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   hasSymptom TinyInt NOT NULL,   hasFever TinyInt,   hasSmellTasteLoss TinyInt,   hasRunningNose TinyInt,   hasTiredness TinyInt,   hasCough TinyInt,   hasBreathProblem TinyInt,   hasPurpleMouth TinyInt,   hasSoreThroat TinyInt,   hasChestPressure TinyInt,   hasDiarrhea TinyInt,   hasNOASymptom TinyInt,   duration1to3Days TinyInt,   duration4to7Days TinyInt,   duration8to10Days TinyInt,   duration11to14Days TinyInt,   duration14PlusDays TinyInt,   wentOutOfCity TinyInt,   hadContactWithOutsider TinyInt,   hadContactWithInfected TinyInt,   hadLast14DaysNOA TinyInt,   age1to15Years TinyInt,   age16to30Years TinyInt,   age31to45Years TinyInt,   age46to60Years TinyInt,   age60PlusYears TinyInt,   hasDiabetes TinyInt,   hasHeartProblem TinyInt,   hasChronicKidney TinyInt,   hasChronicRespiratory TinyInt,   hasHighPressure TinyInt,   hasCancer TinyInt,   dontHavePriorDisease TinyInt,   priorDiseasesDWA TinyInt,   male TinyInt,   female TinyInt,   otherGender TinyInt,   otherCity TinyInt,   cityName Varchar NOT NULL,   neighborhoodName Varchar,   zipCode Char,   fullNameDWA TinyInt,   fullName Varchar,   phone Char,   email Varchar,   visitedPoints TEXT,   created_at Timestamp,   updated_at Timestamp,   android_id Varchar,   resultCode TinyInt NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_COMMUNITYOUTREACH (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   program_name VARCHAR,   start_date DATETIME,   end_date DATETIME,   target_population VARCHAR,   outreach_method VARCHAR,   participants_count INT,   facilitators TEXT,   materials_used TEXT,   follow_up_actions TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_RESOURCEALLOCATION (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   facility_id INTEGER,   item_name VARCHAR,   quantity_allocated INT,   allocation_date DATETIME,   responsible_person VARCHAR,   notes TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_SUPPLYCHAINLOGISTICS (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   item_id INTEGER,   supplier_name VARCHAR,   order_date DATETIME,   delivery_date DATETIME,   quantity_received INT,   delivery_status VARCHAR,   tracking_number VARCHAR );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_HEALTHEDUCATIONPROGRAMS (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   program_title VARCHAR,   start_date DATETIME,   end_date DATETIME,   target_audience VARCHAR,   education_type VARCHAR,   facilitator_name VARCHAR,   session_count INT,   attendance_count INT,   materials_distributed TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_HEALTHWORKERPERFORMANCE (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   health_worker_id INTEGER,   review_date DATETIME,   performance_rating INT,   training_completed TEXT,   certifications_obtained TEXT,   notes TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_PUBLICHEALTHANNOUNCEMENTS (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   announcement_title VARCHAR,   release_date DATETIME,   distribution_channel VARCHAR,   key_points TEXT,   target_region VARCHAR,   contact_information VARCHAR,   status VARCHAR );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_QUARANTINEMANAGEMENT (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   individual_id INTEGER,   quarantine_start DATETIME,   quarantine_end DATETIME,   location VARCHAR,   monitor_interval INT,   compliance_notes TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_VACCINATIONCAMPAIGNS (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   campaign_name VARCHAR,   start_date DATETIME,   end_date DATETIME,   target_group VARCHAR,   vaccine_type VARCHAR,   administered_doses INT,   campaign_status VARCHAR,   logistical_notes TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_MASSSCREENINGEVENTS (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   event_name VARCHAR,   screening_date DATETIME,   location VARCHAR,   total_participants INT,   positive_cases INT,   zero_cases INT,   test_method_used VARCHAR,   event_notes TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_INCIDENCESTUDIES (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   study_title VARCHAR,   study_period_start DATETIME,   study_period_end DATETIME,   population_group VARCHAR,   incidence_rate FLOAT,   risk_factors_analyzed TEXT,   conclusion_notes TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_PATIENTEDUCATION (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   patient_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   education_date DATETIME,   topic VARCHAR,   delivery_method VARCHAR,   provider_name VARCHAR,   follow_up_needed TINYINT,   notes TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_RESOURCEUTILIZATION (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   facility_id INTEGER,   resource_type VARCHAR,   usage_date DATETIME,   units_used FLOAT,   cost_incurred FLOAT,   notes TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_MEDICALSUPPORTSERVICE (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   patient_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   service_type VARCHAR,   service_provider VARCHAR,   scheduled_date DATETIME,   service_status VARCHAR,   duration_hours INT,   service_notes TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_TRAVELRESTRICTIONS (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   restriction_name VARCHAR,   implemented_date DATETIME,   region_applicability VARCHAR,   restriction_type VARCHAR,   enforcement_notes TEXT,   last_updated DATETIME );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_CONTAINMENTZONES (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   zone_name VARCHAR,   declared_date DATETIME,   geographical_boundary TEXT,   population_affected INT,   restrictions_imposed TEXT,   containment_notes TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_SANITIZATIONLOGS (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   facility_id INTEGER,   sanitization_date DATETIME,   areas_cleaned TEXT,   cleaning_method VARCHAR,   responsible_staff TEXT,   sanitization_notes TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_CONTACTEDINDIVIDUALS (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   contact_tracing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   full_name VARCHAR,   relation_to_patient VARCHAR,   contact_info VARCHAR,   last_seen_date DATETIME,   notified_status VARCHAR,   follow_up_actions TEXT );  CREATE TABLE kd_covid_TEST_LABORATORY (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   test_id INTEGER,   lab_id INTEGER,   FOREIGN KEY (test_id) REFERENCES kd_covid_DIAGNOSTIC_LAB_RESULTS(id) );

### Question:
Determine the relationship between travel restrictions implemented in high-risk regions and the subsequent changes in quarantine management compliance, factoring in the availability of medical support services and public health announcements made during the restriction periods.

SELECT      tr.region_applicability AS region,     tr.implemented_date AS restriction_date,     CASE         WHEN qm.compliance_notes LIKE '%compliant%' THEN 'Compliant'         WHEN qm.compliance_notes LIKE '%non-compliant%' THEN 'Non-Compliant'         ELSE 'Unclassified'     END AS compliance_status,     GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT mss.service_type) AS available_medical_services,     GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pha.key_points) AS public_health_announcements FROM      kd_covid_TRAVELRESTRICTIONS tr JOIN      kd_covid_CONTAINMENTZONES cz      ON tr.region_applicability = cz.zone_name JOIN      kd_covid_QUARANTINEMANAGEMENT qm      ON cz.id = qm.location LEFT JOIN      kd_covid_MEDICALSUPPORTSERVICE mss      ON qm.individual_id = mss.patient_id     AND mss.scheduled_date BETWEEN tr.implemented_date AND qm.quarantine_end LEFT JOIN      kd_covid_PUBLICHEALTHANNOUNCEMENTS pha      ON cz.zone_name = pha.target_region     AND pha.release_date BETWEEN tr.implemented_date AND qm.quarantine_end WHERE      tr.restriction_type = 'high-risk' GROUP BY      tr.region_applicability,      tr.implemented_date,      compliance_status ORDER BY      tr.region_applicability,      tr.implemented_date;

CREATE TABLE attachments (   id Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   messageId Text NOT NULL,   type Text NOT NULL,   fingerprint Text NOT NULL,   decryptionKey Blob NOT NULL,   signature Blob NOT NULL,   filename Text NOT NULL,   localPath Text NOT NULL,   url Text NOT NULL,   size Int NOT NULL,   encryptedSize Int NOT NULL,   extras Text NOT NULL,   uploadStage Text NOT NULL,   downloadStage Text NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE cipherKeys (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   keyText Text NOT NULL,   keyType Text NOT NULL,   algorithm Text NOT NULL,   keyLength Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE keyRotations (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   keyId Text NOT NULL,   rotationType Text NOT NULL,   startTime Int NOT NULL,   endTime Int );  CREATE TABLE messageScores (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   messageId Text NOT NULL,   score Int NOT NULL,   calculatedAt Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE contactPushSubscriptions (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   contactId Text NOT NULL,   deviceId Text NOT NULL,   subscription Text NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE groupMembershipRequests (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   groupId Text NOT NULL,   requesterId Text NOT NULL,   timestamp Int NOT NULL,   status Text NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE pendingMessageDeliveries (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   messageId Text NOT NULL,   retryCount Int NOT NULL,   nextRetryTime Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE secureDeliveryTokens (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   tokenValue Text NOT NULL,   expirationTimestamp Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE deviceHeartbeats (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   deviceId Text NOT NULL,   heartbeatTimestamp Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE messageSignatureVerifications (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   messageId Text NOT NULL,   verified Int NOT NULL,   verifiedAt Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE messageRetryLogs (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   deliveryId TEXT NOT NULL,   failureReason TEXT NOT NULL,   attemptTimestamp INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (deliveryId) REFERENCES pendingMessageDeliveries(id) );  CREATE TABLE cipherKeyUsages (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   keyId TEXT NOT NULL,   usageType TEXT NOT NULL,   usedAt INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (keyId) REFERENCES cipherKeys(id) );  CREATE TABLE messageIndex (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   threadId TEXT NOT NULL,   messageIds TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE group_join_logs (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   groupId TEXT NOT NULL,   memberId TEXT NOT NULL,   joinTimestamp INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (groupId) REFERENCES messageIndex(threadId) );  CREATE TABLE AttachmentBackups (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   attachmentId TEXT NOT NULL,   backupTime INTEGER NOT NULL,   backupLocation TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (attachmentId) REFERENCES attachments(id) );

### Question:
Provide the average score of messages calculated at different times of day (morning, afternoon, evening), based on the calculatedAt timestamp.

SELECT      CASE          WHEN strftime('%H', datetime(calculatedAt, 'unixepoch')) BETWEEN '0' AND '11' THEN 'morning'         WHEN strftime('%H', datetime(calculatedAt, 'unixepoch')) BETWEEN '12' AND '17' THEN 'afternoon'         ELSE 'evening'     END AS time_of_day,     AVG(score) AS average_score FROM messageScores GROUP BY time_of_day ORDER BY time_of_day;

CREATE TABLE T_OPERACIONES (   id_operacion TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   tipo TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nombre TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   dominio TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   activo TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',   detalle TEXT NOT NULL,   version_actual TEXT NOT NULL,   nivel_log TEXT NOT NULL,   parametros_automaticos TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE T_USUARIOS (   id_usuario TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   nombre_usuario TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   correo TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   contraseña TEXT NOT NULL,   ultimo_acceso TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE T_ROLES (   id_rol TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   nombre_rol TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   descripcion TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE T_USUARIO_ROL (   id_usuario TEXT NOT NULL,   id_rol TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id_usuario, id_rol),   FOREIGN KEY (id_usuario) REFERENCES T_USUARIOS(id_usuario) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (id_rol) REFERENCES T_ROLES(id_rol) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE T_CONFIGURACIONES (   id_configuracion TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   id_operacion TEXT NOT NULL,   clave_config TEXT NOT NULL,   valor_config TEXT NOT NULL,   tipo_configuracion TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_operacion) REFERENCES T_OPERACIONES(id_operacion) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE T_ERRORES_SISTEMA (   id_error TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   id_oper_log TEXT NOT NULL,   codigo_error TEXT NOT NULL,   descripcion_error TEXT NOT NULL,   nivel_severidad TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_oper_log) REFERENCES T_OP_LOG(id_oper_log) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE T_SEGURIDAD_OPERACIONES (   id_seguridad TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   id_operacion TEXT NOT NULL,   politica_acceso TEXT NOT NULL,   requisito_autenticacion TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_operacion) REFERENCES T_OPERACIONES(id_operacion) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE T_BACKUPS (   id_backup TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   nombre_backup TEXT NOT NULL,   fecha_creacion TEXT NOT NULL,   tamanho TEXT NOT NULL,   estado_backup TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE T_AUDITORIA_CAMBIOS (   id_auditoria TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   id_operacion TEXT NOT NULL,   usuario_modificador TEXT NOT NULL,   accion_realizada TEXT NOT NULL,   fecha_cambio TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_operacion) REFERENCES T_OPERACIONES(id_operacion) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE T_DEPENDENCIAS_OP (   id_dependencia TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   id_operacion_principal TEXT NOT NULL,   id_operacion_dependiente TEXT NOT NULL,   tipo_relacion TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_operacion_principal) REFERENCES T_OPERACIONES(id_operacion) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (id_operacion_dependiente) REFERENCES T_OPERACIONES(id_operacion) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE T_SUCURSALES (   id_sucursal TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   nombre_sucursal TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   ubicacion TEXT NOT NULL,   responsable TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE T_INTEGRACIONES_EXTERNAS (   id_integracion TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   nombre_servicio TEXT NOT NULL,   url_api TEXT NOT NULL,   credenciales TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE T_METRICAS_PERFORMANCE (   id_metrica TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   id_operacion TEXT NOT NULL,   tiempo_proceso TEXT NOT NULL,   uso_recursos TEXT NOT NULL,   tipo_metrica TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_operacion) REFERENCES T_OPERACIONES(id_operacion) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE T_LECTURA_WRITING (   id_registro_acceso TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   tipo_acceso TEXT NOT NULL,   usuario_acceso TEXT NOT NULL,   fecha_acceso TEXT NOT NULL,   datos_afectados TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE T_ACCESS_LOG (   id_registro_acceso TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   id_usuario TEXT NOT NULL,   fecha_registro TEXT NOT NULL,   accion TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_usuario) REFERENCES T_USUARIOS(id_usuario) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE T_NOTIFICATIONS (   id_notificacion TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   destinatario TEXT NOT NULL,   mensaje TEXT NOT NULL,   fecha_envio TEXT NOT NULL,   estado_entrega TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE INDEX iusuarios_nombre ON T_USUARIOS (nombre_usuario);  CREATE INDEX iroles_nombre ON T_ROLES (nombre_rol);  CREATE INDEX iusuario_rol_usuario ON T_USUARIO_ROL (id_usuario);  CREATE INDEX iusuario_rol_rol ON T_USUARIO_ROL (id_rol);  CREATE INDEX iconfig_operacion ON T_CONFIGURACIONES (id_operacion);  CREATE INDEX ierrores_log ON T_ERRORES_SISTEMA (id_oper_log);  CREATE INDEX iseguridad_operacion ON T_SEGURIDAD_OPERACIONES (id_operacion);  CREATE INDEX ibackups_fecha ON T_BACKUPS (fecha_creacion);  CREATE INDEX iauditoria_operacion ON T_AUDITORIA_CAMBIOS (id_operacion);  CREATE INDEX idependencias_principal ON T_DEPENDENCIAS_OP (id_operacion_principal);  CREATE INDEX idependencias_dependiente ON T_DEPENDENCIAS_OP (id_operacion_dependiente);  CREATE INDEX isucursales_nombre ON T_SUCURSALES (nombre_sucursal);  CREATE INDEX iintegraciones_nombre ON T_INTEGRACIONES_EXTERNAS (nombre_servicio);  CREATE INDEX imetricas_operacion ON T_METRICAS_PERFORMANCE (id_operacion);  CREATE INDEX ilectura_fecha ON T_LECTURA_WRITING (fecha_acceso);  CREATE INDEX iaccess_usuario ON T_ACCESS_LOG (id_usuario);  CREATE INDEX inotificaciones_fecha ON T_NOTIFICATIONS (fecha_envio);

### Question:
List the operations that have both a 'politica_acceso' of 'RESTRICTED' and a 'activo' status of 'Y', along with the names of the users who have access to these operations through their roles.

SELECT      o.id_operacion,     o.nombre AS operacion,     u.nombre_usuario AS usuario FROM      T_OPERACIONES o JOIN T_SEGURIDAD_OPERACIONES s     ON o.id_operacion = s.id_operacion JOIN T_USUARIO_ROL ur     ON ur.id_rol = s.requisito_autenticacion JOIN T_USUARIOS u     ON ur.id_usuario = u.id_usuario WHERE      o.activo = 'Y'     AND s.politica_acceso = 'RESTRICTED';

### Question:
What is the distribution of payment types among members who were born after January 1, 1990, grouped by their user group?

SELECT ug.Name_UG, p.type_payment, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN payments p ON m.id_member = p.id_pay_member JOIN usergroups ug ON m.ID_UG = ug.ID_UG WHERE m.dayofbirth > '1990-01-01' GROUP BY ug.Name_UG, p.type_payment ORDER BY ug.Name_UG, p.type_payment;

 CREATE TABLE steps (   steps_id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   order_no Int NOT NULL,   description_step Text NOT NULL,   recipe_id Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipes (recipe_id) );  CREATE TABLE ingredients (   ingredient_id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   ingredient_name Varchar NOT NULL,   total_calories Int NOT NULL,   measure Varchar NOT NULL,   grams_per_measure Varchar NOT NULL ); ### Question:
Calculate the total grams per measure of all ingredients used in the recipe with recipe_id 22.

SELECT SUM(CAST(ingredients.grams_per_measure AS REAL)) AS total_grams  FROM ingredients  JOIN recipes_ingredients ON ingredients.ingredient_id = recipes_ingredients.ingredient_id  WHERE recipes_ingredients.recipe_id = 22;

### Question:
What are the most frequently recorded themes in employee training sessions from the treinamento_funcionario table?
SELECT tema_treinamento, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM treinamento_funcionario GROUP BY tema_treinamento ORDER BY frequency DESC;

CREATE TABLE students (   student_id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE students_exams (   student_id Int NOT NULL,   exam_id Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students (student_id) );  CREATE TABLE exams (   exam_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   exam_name TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT );  CREATE TABLE subjects (   subject_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   subject_name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE exam_subjects (   exam_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   subject_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (exam_id, subject_id),   FOREIGN KEY (exam_id) REFERENCES exams(exam_id),   FOREIGN KEY (subject_id) REFERENCES subjects(subject_id) );  CREATE TABLE teachers (   teacher_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE student_grades (   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   exam_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   grade TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(student_id),   FOREIGN KEY (exam_id) REFERENCES exams(exam_id) );  CREATE TABLE exam_dates (   exam_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   start_datetime TEXT NOT NULL,   end_datetime TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (exam_id) REFERENCES exams(exam_id) );  CREATE TABLE classrooms (   classroom_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   room_number TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE class_exams (   classroom_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   exam_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (classroom_id, exam_id),   FOREIGN KEY (classroom_id) REFERENCES classrooms(classroom_id),   FOREIGN KEY (exam_id) REFERENCES exams(exam_id) );  CREATE TABLE teacher_subjects (   teacher_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   subject_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (teacher_id, subject_id),   FOREIGN KEY (teacher_id) REFERENCES teachers(teacher_id),   FOREIGN KEY (subject_id) REFERENCES subjects(subject_id) );  CREATE TABLE attendance (   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   exam_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   is_present BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,   PRIMARY KEY (student_id, exam_id),   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(student_id),   FOREIGN KEY (exam_id) REFERENCES exams(exam_id) );  CREATE TABLE exams_results (   result_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   exam_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   score INTEGER CHECK (score BETWEEN 0 AND 100),   comments TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(student_id),   FOREIGN KEY (exam_id) REFERENCES exams(exam_id) );  CREATE TABLE student_parents (   student_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   parent_name TEXT NOT NULL,   relationship TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (student_id, parent_name),   FOREIGN KEY (student_id) REFERENCES students(student_id) );

### Question:
Find the exam with the lowest number of student scores recorded. Include the exam name and the count of scores.
SELECT e.exam_name, COUNT(er.score) AS score_count FROM exams e LEFT JOIN exams_results er ON e.exam_id = er.exam_id GROUP BY e.exam_id ORDER BY score_count ASC LIMIT 1;

### Question:
How many distinct users received assistance related to data alignment tasks during weeks with below 90% accuracy in the active company logs?

WITH low_accuracy_weeks AS (     SELECT DISTINCT STRFTIME('%Y-%W', date) AS week     FROM mood_insights_develop_logs_active_company     WHERE percent_accuracy < 0.9 ) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ua.user_id) FROM mood_insights_develop_logs_user_assistances AS ua JOIN mood_insights_develop_logs_active_company AS ac ON ua.log_id = ac.ID WHERE ua.help_topic LIKE '%data alignment%'   AND STRFTIME('%Y-%W', ac.date) IN (SELECT week FROM low_accuracy_weeks);

### Question:
Identify the chat with the highest total number of reactions across all its messages. List the chat title and the total reaction count.

SELECT    public_chats.title,    SUM(public_reaction_counts.count) AS total_reactions FROM public_message_logs INNER JOIN public_reaction_counts ON public_message_logs.id = public_reaction_counts.message_id INNER JOIN public_chats ON public_message_logs.chat_id = public_chats.id GROUP BY public_chats.id ORDER BY total_reactions DESC LIMIT 1;

CREATE TABLE Argument (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   assertionId Integer NOT NULL,   sourceId Integer NOT NULL,   userId Integer NOT NULL,   side Boolean NOT NULL,   score Decimal NOT NULL,   text Text NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (assertionId) REFERENCES Assertion (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Assertion (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   urlToken Text NOT NULL,   userId Integer NOT NULL,   sourceId Integer NOT NULL,   score Decimal NOT NULL,   text Text NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Rating (   userId Integer NOT NULL,   argumentId Integer NOT NULL,   rating Boolean NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (argumentId) REFERENCES Argument (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Source (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   domain Text NOT NULL,   score Decimal NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE User (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL,   email Text NOT NULL,   passwordHash Text NOT NULL,   role TEXT NOT NULL,   createdAt Timestamp NOT NULL,   updatedAt Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE _SourceToUser (   A Integer NOT NULL,   B Integer NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (A) REFERENCES Source (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (B) REFERENCES User (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE ArgumentHistory (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   argumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   previousText TEXT NOT NULL,   changedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   userId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (argumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE SourceMetadata (   sourceId TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   metadataJson TEXT NOT NULL,   lastChecked TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE UserPreferences (   userId TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   darkMode BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   languageCode TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'en',   showExperimental BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE ArgumentTag (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   argumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   tagName TEXT NOT NULL,   addedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (argumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE RatingHistory (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   argumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   userId INTEGER NOT NULL,   oldRating BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   newRating BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   changedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (argumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE AssertionTag (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   assertionId TEXT NOT NULL,   tagName TEXT NOT NULL,   addedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (assertionId) REFERENCES Assertion(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE ArgumentTranslation (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   argumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   languageCode TEXT NOT NULL,   translatedText TEXT NOT NULL,   translator Text NOT NULL,   accuracyScore Decimal NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (argumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE AssertionTranslation (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   assertionId TEXT NOT NULL,   languageCode TEXT NOT NULL,   translatedText TEXT NOT NULL,   translator Text NOT NULL,   accuracyScore Decimal NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (assertionId) REFERENCES Assertion(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE SourcePingHistory (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   sourceId TEXT NOT NULL,   pingTime TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   responseTime INTEGER NOT NULL,   success BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE UserActivity (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   userId TEXT NOT NULL,   activityType TEXT NOT NULL,   activityDetails TEXT,   createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE ArgumentReport (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   argumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   reporterId TEXT NOT NULL,   reason TEXT NOT NULL,   details TEXT,   status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',   reportedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (argumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (reporterId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE AssertionHistory (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   assertionId TEXT NOT NULL,   previousText TEXT NOT NULL,   changedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   userId INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (assertionId) REFERENCES Assertion(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE ArgumentLink (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   fromArgumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   toArgumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   linkType TEXT NOT NULL,   createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (fromArgumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (toArgumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE SourceCoverage (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   sourceId TEXT NOT NULL,   coverageArea TEXT NOT NULL,   coverageScore Decimal NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE UserFollow (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   followerId TEXT NOT NULL,   followeeId TEXT NOT NULL,   followsAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,   FOREIGN KEY (followerId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (followeeId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE SourceCategory (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   sourceId TEXT NOT NULL,   categoryName TEXT NOT NULL,   relevanceScore Decimal NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE ArgumentRelation (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   argumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   relatedArgumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   relationshipType TEXT NOT NULL,   addedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (argumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (relatedArgumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE AssertionRelation (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   assertionId TEXT NOT NULL,   relatedAssertionId TEXT NOT NULL,   relationshipType TEXT NOT NULL,   addedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (assertionId) REFERENCES Assertion(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (relatedAssertionId) REFERENCES Assertion(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE SourceRelation (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   sourceId TEXT NOT NULL,   relatedSourceId TEXT NOT NULL,   relationshipType TEXT NOT NULL,   addedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (relatedSourceId) REFERENCES Source(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE UserBan (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   userId TEXT NOT NULL,   bannedByUserId TEXT NOT NULL,   reason TEXT,   bannedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (bannedByUserId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE UserMessage (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   senderId TEXT NOT NULL,   receiverId TEXT NOT NULL,   subject TEXT NOT NULL,   message Text NOT NULL,   sentAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   read BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (senderId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (receiverId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE ArgumentContext (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   argumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   contextText TEXT NOT NULL,   sourceId TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (argumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE AssertionContext (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   assertionId TEXT NOT NULL,   contextText TEXT NOT NULL,   sourceId TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (assertionId) REFERENCES Assertion(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE SourceEditor (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   sourceId TEXT NOT NULL,   userId TEXT NOT NULL,   editorType TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE ArgumentNote (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   argumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   userId TEXT NOT NULL,   noteText TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (argumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE AssertionNote (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   assertionId TEXT NOT NULL,   userId TEXT NOT NULL,   noteText TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (assertionId) REFERENCES Assertion(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE SourceNote (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   sourceId TEXT NOT NULL,   userId TEXT NOT NULL,   noteText TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE UserNotification (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   userId TEXT NOT NULL,   notificationType TEXT NOT NULL,   message TEXT NOT NULL,   createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   read BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE SourcePermission (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   sourceId TEXT NOT NULL,   userId TEXT NOT NULL,   permissionLevel TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (sourceId) REFERENCES Source(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE ArgumentComment (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   argumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   userId TEXT NOT NULL,   commentText TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (argumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE argumentReview (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,   argumentId TEXT NOT NULL,   userId TEXT NOT NULL,   reviewText TEXT NOT NULL,   rating Decimal NOT NULL,   accepted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (argumentId) REFERENCES Argument(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES User(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );

### Question:
What is the average accuracy score of argument translations for arguments that are linked together and were reported by users with a 'moderator' role?

SELECT AVG(at.accuracyScore) FROM ArgumentTranslation at WHERE at.argumentId IN (     SELECT fromArgumentId FROM ArgumentLink     UNION ALL     SELECT toArgumentId FROM ArgumentLink ) AND EXISTS (     SELECT 1     FROM ArgumentReport ar     JOIN User u ON ar.reporterId = u.id     WHERE ar.argumentId = at.argumentId     AND u.role = 'moderator' );

CREATE TABLE teacher (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE student (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   tid Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (tid) REFERENCES teacher (id) );  CREATE TABLE blog (   id Varchar NOT NULL,   title Varchar NOT NULL,   author Varchar NOT NULL,   create_time Datetime NOT NULL,   views Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE blog_tag (   blog_id Varchar NOT NULL,   tag Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (blog_id, tag),   FOREIGN KEY (blog_id) REFERENCES blog (id) );

### Question:
Calculate the average number of blog views per student, considering each student's blogs authored by their assigned teacher. Only include students whose teachers have at least 5 blog posts and 2 unique tags assigned.

WITH valid_teachers AS (     SELECT t.id AS tid, t.name AS tname     FROM teacher t     JOIN blog b ON t.name = b.author     JOIN blog_tag bt ON b.id = bt.blog_id     GROUP BY t.id, t.name     HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) >= 5 AND COUNT(DISTINCT bt.tag) >= 2 ) SELECT AVG(sv.total_views) AS average_views_per_student FROM (     SELECT s.id, SUM(b.views) AS total_views     FROM student s     JOIN valid_teachers vt ON s.tid = vt.tid     JOIN blog b ON vt.tname = b.author     GROUP BY s.id ) sv;

 CREATE TABLE t_mapel (   id_mapel INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   nama_mata_pelajaran VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE t_kelas_guru (   id_kelas_guru INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   id_guru INTEGER NOT NULL,   kelas VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (id_guru) REFERENCES t_guru(id_guru),   FOREIGN KEY (kelas) REFERENCES t_siswa(kelas) ); ### Question:
How many students in class XII have a medical history of asthma recorded in their file?
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM t_siswa WHERE t_siswa.kelas = 'XII'   AND t_siswa.nis IN (       SELECT nis       FROM t_rekam_medis       WHERE t_rekam_medis.riwayat_penyakit LIKE '%asthma%'   );

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pi.paramedics_information_ambulance_number) FROM paramedics_information pi JOIN paramedic_rescue_report prr ON pi.id_paramedics_information = prr.id_paramedics_information WHERE prr.paramedic_rescue_report_status = 'active';

### Question:
For each package name that appears in at least five different task IDs, determine the total number of tasks that have been paired with it, the minimum and maximum task ID values, and the count of tasks with package names that have a specific prefix. Additionally, calculate the difference between the highest and lowest task ID values for each package name and filter the results to only include packages that have a difference greater than 1000. Sort the final output by the total number of tasks in descending order.

WITH PackageStats AS (     SELECT          package_name,         COUNT(*) AS total_tasks,         MIN(task_id) AS min_task_id,         MAX(task_id) AS max_task_id,         COUNT(CASE WHEN package_name LIKE 'prefix%' THEN 1 END) AS prefix_count     FROM TaskViewPackages     GROUP BY package_name     HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT task_id) >= 5 ) SELECT      package_name,     total_tasks,     min_task_id,     max_task_id,     max_task_id - min_task_id AS diff,     prefix_count FROM PackageStats WHERE max_task_id - min_task_id > 1000 ORDER BY total_tasks DESC;

CREATE TABLE user (   nickname Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   id Varchar NOT NULL,   password Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE user_profile (   user_id Varchar NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   bio TEXT,   avatar_url TEXT,   created_at datetime not null default (datetime('now','localtime')),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );
