### Question:
Provide the list of transaction types that have at least one transaction with a payment form registered in the last 6 months of 2022, along with the total number of such transactions, the average payment amount, and the most common state of the transaction details.

With filtered_payments AS (     SELECT         t.tipo_transaccion_id,         td.estado_transaccion_id AS estado_transaccion_detalle_id,         rtp.monto_pago     FROM         banco_datacenter_db_registro_transaccion_pago rtp     JOIN         banco_datacenter_db_transaccion t ON rtp.transaccion_id = t.id     JOIN         banco_datacenter_db_estado_transaccion_detalle td ON td.transaccion_id = t.id     WHERE         rtp.fecha_registro BETWEEN '2022-07-01' AND '2022-12-31' ), aggregated AS (     SELECT         tipo_transaccion_id,         COUNT(*) AS total_transacciones,         AVG(monto_pago) AS average_payment_amount     FROM         filtered_payments     GROUP BY         tipo_transaccion_id ), estado_comun AS (     SELECT         tipo_transaccion_id,         estado_transaccion_detalle_id,         COUNT(*) AS estado_count,         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (             PARTITION BY tipo_transaccion_id              ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC         ) AS estado_rank     FROM         filtered_payments     GROUP BY         tipo_transaccion_id, estado_transaccion_detalle_id ) SELECT     a.tipo_transaccion_id,     a.total_transacciones,     a.average_payment_amount,     e.estado_transaccion_detalle_id FROM     aggregated a JOIN     estado_comun e ON a.tipo_transaccion_id = e.tipo_transaccion_id WHERE     e.estado_rank = 1;

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE goods (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   description Text NOT NULL,   year SmallInt NOT NULL,   manufacturer Varchar NOT NULL,   manufacturer_website Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE shops (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   company Varchar NOT NULL,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   latitude Decimal NOT NULL,   longitude Decimal NOT NULL,   registered Date NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE employees (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   shop_id TEXT NOT NULL,   job Varchar NOT NULL,   first_name Varchar NOT NULL,   last_name Varchar NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   phone Varchar NOT NULL,   salary Numeric NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE users (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   first_name Varchar NOT NULL,   last_name Varchar NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   phone Varchar NOT NULL,   registered Date NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE comments (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   parent_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   date Timestamp NOT NULL,   comment Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES comments (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE reviews (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   shop_id TEXT NOT NULL,   good_id TEXT NOT NULL,   employee_id TEXT NOT NULL,   reviewer_id TEXT NOT NULL,   comment_id TEXT NOT NULL,   date Timestamp NOT NULL,   good_rating Decimal NOT NULL,   shop_rating Decimal NOT NULL,   employee_rating Decimal NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (good_id) REFERENCES goods (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employees (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (comment_id) REFERENCES comments (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE inventory (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, shop_id TEXT NOT NULL, good_id TEXT NOT NULL, quantity INTEGER NOT NULL, last_restocked DATE NOT NULL, reorder_level INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (good_id) REFERENCES goods(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE categories (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, name VARCHAR NOT NULL, description TEXT, PRIMARY KEY (id));  CREATE TABLE goods_categories (good_id TEXT NOT NULL, category_id TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (good_id) REFERENCES goods(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE suppliers (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, name VARCHAR NOT NULL, contact_email VARCHAR, website VARCHAR, PRIMARY KEY (id));  CREATE TABLE goods_suppliers (good_id TEXT NOT NULL, supplier_id TEXT NOT NULL, supply_price DECIMAL NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (good_id) REFERENCES goods(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (supplier_id) REFERENCES suppliers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE orders (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, user_id TEXT NOT NULL, good_id TEXT NOT NULL, shop_id TEXT NOT NULL, order_date DATETIME NOT NULL, quantity INTEGER NOT NULL, total_price DECIMAL NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (good_id) REFERENCES goods(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE promotions (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, shop_id TEXT NOT NULL, good_id TEXT NOT NULL, discount_percentage DECIMAL NOT NULL, start_date DATE NOT NULL, end_date DATE NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (good_id) REFERENCES goods(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE user_preferences (user_id TEXT NOT NULL, preferred_good_id TEXT, preferred_category_id TEXT, created_at DATETIME NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (preferred_good_id) REFERENCES goods(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (preferred_category_id) REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE transactions (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, order_id TEXT NOT NULL, user_id TEXT NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL NOT NULL, transaction_date DATETIME NOT NULL, payment_method VARCHAR NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE notifications (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, user_id TEXT NOT NULL, message TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME NOT NULL, is_read BOOLEAN NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE availability (shop_id TEXT NOT NULL, good_id TEXT NOT NULL, available_stock INTEGER NOT NULL, last_checked DATETIME NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (good_id) REFERENCES goods(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE shop_hours (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, shop_id TEXT NOT NULL, day_of_week VARCHAR NOT NULL, open_time TIME NOT NULL, close_time TIME NOT NULL, is_open BOOLEAN NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE return_policies (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, shop_id TEXT NOT NULL, policy_text TEXT NOT NULL, has_refund BOOLEAN NOT NULL, has_exchange BOOLEAN NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE membership_tiers (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, user_id TEXT NOT NULL, tier_name VARCHAR NOT NULL, points INTEGER NOT NULL, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE coupons (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, user_id TEXT NOT NULL, code VARCHAR NOT NULL, discount_val DECIMAL NOT NULL, valid_start DATE NOT NULL, valid_end DATE NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE product_tags (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, good_id TEXT NOT NULL, tag_name VARCHAR NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (good_id) REFERENCES goods(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE user_activity_log (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, user_id TEXT NOT NULL, activity_type VARCHAR NOT NULL, details TEXT, activity_time DATETIME NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE feature_requests (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, user_id TEXT NOT NULL, request_text TEXT NOT NULL, status VARCHAR NOT NULL, submitted_date DATETIME NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE faq_entries (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, question TEXT NOT NULL, answer TEXT NOT NULL, category VARCHAR NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME NOT NULL);  CREATE TABLE supplier_ratings (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, shop_id TEXT NOT NULL, supplier_id TEXT NOT NULL, rating DECIMAL NOT NULL, reviewed_date DATETIME NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (supplier_id) REFERENCES suppliers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE product_reviews_followups (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, review_id TEXT NOT NULL, shop_response TEXT NOT NULL, responded_at DATETIME NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (review_id) REFERENCES reviews(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);  CREATE TABLE user_location_data (id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, user_id TEXT NOT NULL, latitude DECIMAL NOT NULL, longitude DECIMAL NOT NULL, recorded_at DATETIME NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);

### Question:
How many reviews were written for goods in the 'Electronics' category by users who registered after 2022-01-01?

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_reviews FROM reviews r JOIN goods g ON r.good_id = g.id JOIN goods_categories gc ON g.id = gc.good_id JOIN categories c ON gc.category_id = c.id JOIN users u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id WHERE c.name = 'Electronics'    AND u.registered > '2022-01-01';

### Question:
List the product IDs and the number of associated return requests with a status of 'Pending', sorted by the count in descending order.
SELECT     product_id,     COUNT(*) AS pending_requests FROM     return_request WHERE     status = 'Pending' GROUP BY     product_id ORDER BY     pending_requests DESC;

expected_available_date Date,   FOREIGN KEY (b_id) REFERENCES borrower (b_id),   FOREIGN KEY (b_isbn) REFERENCES book (b_isbn),   FOREIGN KEY (library_branch) REFERENCES branch (lib_id) );  CREATE TABLE book_publisher (   b_isbn Varchar NOT NULL,   publisher_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (b_isbn, publisher_id),   FOREIGN KEY (b_isbn) REFERENCES book (b_isbn),   FOREIGN KEY (publisher_id) REFERENCES publisher (publisher_id) );  CREATE TABLE qualification (   qualification_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   title VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description VARCHAR );  CREATE TABLE equipment (   equipment_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   lib_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (lib_id) REFERENCES branch (lib_id) );  CREATE TABLE language (   language_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   name VARCHAR NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE library_event (   event_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   lib_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,   event_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (lib_id) REFERENCES branch (lib_id) );  CREATE TABLE event_participant (   event_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   b_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,   registration_date DATE NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (event_id, b_id),   FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES library_event (event_id),   FOREIGN KEY (b_id) REFERENCES borrower (b_id) );  CREATE TABLE book_in_special_collection (   b_isbn VARCHAR NOT NULL,   collection_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (b_isbn, collection_id),   FOREIGN KEY (b_isbn) REFERENCES book (b_isbn),   FOREIGN KEY (collection_id) REFERENCES special_collection (collection_id) );  CREATE TABLE book_copies_received (   inventory_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   lib_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,   b_isbn VARCHAR NOT NULL,   received_quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,   date_received DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (lib_id) REFERENCES branch (lib_id),   FOREIGN KEY (b_isbn) REFERENCES book (b_isbn) );  CREATE TABLE program_attendance (   program_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   b_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,   attended BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   PRIMARY KEY (program_id, b_id),   FOREIGN KEY (program_id) REFERENCES program_schedule (program_id),   FOREIGN KEY (b_id) REFERENCES borrower (b_id) );  CREATE TABLE book_format (   b_isbn Varchar NOT NULL,   format_type Varchar NOT NULL,   page_count Int,   PRIMARY KEY (b_isbn, format_type),   FOREIGN KEY (b_isbn) REFERENCES book (b_isbn) );  CREATE TABLE book_copy (   copy_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   b_isbn Varchar NOT NULL,   lib_id Varchar NOT NULL,   copy_number Int NOT NULL,   status Varchar NOT NULL,   date_acquired Date,   FOREIGN KEY (b_isbn) REFERENCES book (b_isbn),   FOREIGN KEY (lib_id) REFERENCES branch (lib_id) );  CREATE TABLE loan_renewal (   renewal_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   b_id Varchar NOT NULL,   b_isbn Varchar NOT NULL,   library_branch Varchar NOT NULL,   checkout_date Date NOT NULL,   renewal_date Date NOT NULL,   renewed_by Int,   FOREIGN KEY (b_id, b_isbn, library_branch, checkout_date) REFERENCES loan (b_id, b_isbn, library_branch, checkout_date),   FOREIGN KEY (renewed_by) REFERENCES staff (staff_id) );  CREATE TABLE supplier (   supplier_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   supplier_name Varchar NOT NULL,   contact_name Varchar,   contact_email Varchar,   contact_phone Varchar );  CREATE TABLE book_acquisition (   acquisition_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   b_isbn Varchar NOT NULL,   supplier_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   lib_id Varchar NOT NULL,   acquisition_date Date NOT NULL,   cost REAL,   FOREIGN KEY (b_isbn) REFERENCES book (b_isbn),   FOREIGN KEY (supplier_id) REFERENCES supplier (supplier_id),   FOREIGN KEY (lib_id) REFERENCES branch (lib_id) );  CREATE TABLE borrower_contact_preference (   b_id Varchar NOT NULL,   preference_type Varchar NOT NULL,   preference_value Varchar NOT NULL,   is_primary BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   PRIMARY KEY (b_id, preference_type),   FOREIGN KEY (b_id) REFERENCES borrower (b_id) );  CREATE TABLE borrower_access_card (   card_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   b_id Varchar NOT NULL,   card_number Varchar NOT NULL,   issue_date Date NOT NULL,   expiration_date Date,   status Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (b_id) REFERENCES borrower (b_id) );  CREATE TABLE library_partnership (   partnership_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   library1_id Varchar NOT NULL,   library2_id Varchar NOT NULL,   start_date Date NOT NULL,   end_date Date,   description Text,   FOREIGN KEY (library1_id) REFERENCES branch (lib_id),   FOREIGN KEY (library2_id) REFERENCES branch (lib_id) );  CREATE TABLE book_donation (   donation_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   donor_name Varchar NOT NULL,   donation_date Date NOT NULL,   lib_id Varchar NOT NULL,   b_isbn Varchar NOT NULL,   quantity Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (lib_id) REFERENCES branch (lib_id),   FOREIGN KEY (b_isbn) REFERENCES book (b_isbn) ); ### Question:
What is the total number of overdue fines for books that are part of a special collection and were acquired from a supplier with a contact email, and are currently in the 'Available' status at the Westside Library?

SELECT      SUM(f.amount) AS total_overdue_fines  FROM      fine f     JOIN book_acquisition ba ON f.b_isbn = ba.b_isbn     JOIN supplier s ON ba.supplier_id = s.supplier_id     JOIN book_in_special_collection bis ON f.b_isbn = bis.b_isbn     JOIN book_copy bc ON f.b_isbn = bc.b_isbn AND bc.lib_id = 'Westside Library' WHERE      s.contact_email IS NOT NULL      AND bc.status = 'Available'      AND f.library_branch = 'Westside Library'      AND f.is_paid = 0      AND DATE('now') > f.fine_due_date;

### Question:
List the IP addresses of servers that have both a disk health status of "Degraded" and at least one disk read/write speed measurement below 100 MB/s.

SELECT s.ip FROM servers s WHERE s.id IN (     SELECT dh.server_id     FROM disk_health dh     WHERE dh.health_status = 'Degraded' ) AND s.id IN (     SELECT drw.server_id     FROM disk_read_write_speeds drw     WHERE drw.read_speed < 100 OR drw.write_speed < 100 );

### Question:
List the names of all students who are enrolled in a group led by a professor specializing in "Mathematics".

SELECT DISTINCT e.nombre  FROM estudiante e JOIN estudiante_x_grupo exg ON e.id = exg.idEstudiante JOIN horario h ON exg.idGrupo = h.idGrupo JOIN reservas_aula r ON h.idAula = r.idAula JOIN profesor p ON r.idProfesor = p.id WHERE p.especialidad = 'Mathematics';

### Question:
List the names of members who have at least one note with a timestamp between '2023-01-01' and '2023-12-31', grouped by their birth month.

SELECT t1.Name, strftime('%m', t1.BirthDate) AS BornMonth FROM TABLE_1 t1 JOIN TABLE_37 t37 ON t1.MemberId = t37.RecordId WHERE t37.Timestamp BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31' GROUP BY BornMonth, t1.Name;

 CREATE TABLE PKG_PUBLIC_inventory_audit (   id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   warehouse_id Integer NOT NULL,   product_id Integer NOT NULL,   audit_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   quantity Decimal NOT NULL,   audit_notes Varchar NOT NULL,   created_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   deleted TinyInt NOT NULL,   deleted_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   modified_at Timestamp NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (id),   FOREIGN KEY (warehouse_id) REFERENCES PKG_PUBLIC_warehouse(id),   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES PKG_PUBLIC_product(id) );

### Question:
Show the total number of products per category, considering only categories created after January 1, 2020.
SELECT c.id, c.description, COUNT(p.id) AS total_products FROM PKG_PUBLIC_product p JOIN PUBLIC_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE c.created_at > '2020-01-01' GROUP BY c.id, c.description;

### Schema:
CREATE TABLE regions (   region_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   region_name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE countries (   country_id Char NOT NULL UNIQUE,   country_name TEXT NOT NULL,   region_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (region_id) REFERENCES regions (region_id) );  CREATE TABLE locations (   location_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   street_address TEXT NOT NULL,   postal_code TEXT NOT NULL,   city TEXT NOT NULL,   state_province TEXT NOT NULL,   country_id Char NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (country_id) REFERENCES countries (country_id) );  CREATE TABLE departments (   department_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   department_name TEXT NOT NULL,   manager_id TEXT NOT NULL,   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (location_id) );  CREATE TABLE jobs (   job_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   job_title TEXT NOT NULL,   min_salary TEXT NOT NULL,   max_salary TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE employees (   employee_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   first_name TEXT NOT NULL,   last_name TEXT NOT NULL,   email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   phone_number TEXT NOT NULL,   hire_date Date NOT NULL,   job_id TEXT NOT NULL,   salary TEXT NOT NULL,   commission_pct TEXT NOT NULL,   manager_id TEXT NOT NULL,   department_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES departments (department_id),   FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES jobs (job_id),   FOREIGN KEY (manager_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE job_history (   employee_id TEXT NOT NULL,   start_date Date NOT NULL,   end_date Date NOT NULL,   job_id TEXT NOT NULL,   department_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id),   FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES jobs (job_id),   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES departments (department_id) );  CREATE TABLE sick_leave (   record_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   employee_id TEXT NOT NULL,   start_date Date NOT NULL,   end_date Date NOT NULL,   reason TEXT NOT NULL,   approved INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE bound_break (   record_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   employee_id TEXT NOT NULL,   start_time DATE NOT NULL,   end_time DATE NOT NULL,   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id),   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (location_id) );  CREATE TABLE late_tardiness (   record_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   employee_id TEXT NOT NULL,   date DATE NOT NULL,   time_in DATE NOT NULL,   reason TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE early_tardiness (   record_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   employee_id TEXT NOT NULL,   date DATE NOT NULL,   time_out DATE NOT NULL,   reason TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE early_exit (   record_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   employee_id TEXT NOT NULL,   date DATE NOT NULL,   approved_by TEXT NOT NULL,   reason TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE leave_without_permission (   record_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   employee_id TEXT NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE NOT NULL,   detected_by TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE overtime (   record_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   employee_id TEXT NOT NULL,   start_time DATE NOT NULL,   end_time DATE NOT NULL,   department_id TEXT NOT NULL,   approved INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id),   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES departments (department_id) );  CREATE TABLE employee_copies (   copy_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   employee_id TEXT NOT NULL,   copy_machine_id TEXT NOT NULL,   document_page_count INTEGER NOT NULL,   copy_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id),   FOREIGN KEY (copy_machine_id) REFERENCES copy_machine (copy_machine_id) );  CREATE TABLE copy_machine (   copy_machine_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   model TEXT NOT NULL,   last_maintenance DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (location_id) );  CREATE TABLE departments_copies (   record_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   department_id TEXT NOT NULL,   copy_machine_id TEXT NOT NULL,   total_copies INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES departments (department_id),   FOREIGN KEY (copy_machine_id) REFERENCES copy_machine (copy_machine_id) );  CREATE TABLE document_file (   file_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   file_name TEXT NOT NULL,   uploaded_by TEXT NOT NULL,   upload_date DATE NOT NULL,   file_size INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (uploaded_by) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE files (   file_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   file_name TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   uploaded_by TEXT NOT NULL,   upload_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (uploaded_by) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE file_sharing (   share_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   file_id TEXT NOT NULL,   shared_with TEXT NOT NULL,   date_shared DATE NOT NULL,   access_level TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (file_id) REFERENCES document_file (file_id),   FOREIGN KEY (shared_with) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE office_equipment (   equipment_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   equipment_type TEXT NOT NULL,   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   purchase_date DATE NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (location_id) );  CREATE TABLE maintenance_checkups (   checkup_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   equipment_id TEXT NOT NULL,   technician_id TEXT NOT NULL,   checkup_date DATE NOT NULL,   notes TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (equipment_id) REFERENCES office_equipment (equipment_id),   FOREIGN KEY (technician_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE office_contracts (   contract_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   supplier_id TEXT NOT NULL,   contract_start DATE NOT NULL,   contract_end DATE NOT NULL,   contract_type TEXT NOT NULL,   assigned_to_department TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (supplier_id) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE office_activities (   activity_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   activity_type TEXT NOT NULL,   activity_date DATE NOT NULL,   location_id TEXT NOT NULL,   participants TEXT NOT NULL,   notes TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations (location_id) );  CREATE TABLE company_announcements (   announcement_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   title TEXT NOT NULL,   content TEXT NOT NULL,   issued_by TEXT NOT NULL,   issue_date DATE NOT NULL,   expiration_date DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (issued_by) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE resources (   resource_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   resource_type TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   assigned_to TEXT NOT NULL,   available_from DATE NOT NULL,   available_to DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (assigned_to) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE rules (   rule_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   rule_title TEXT NOT NULL,   content TEXT NOT NULL,   effective_date DATE NOT NULL,   enforced_by TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (enforced_by) REFERENCES employees (employee_id) );  CREATE TABLE departments_total (   department_id TEXT NOT NULL,   record_date DATE NOT NULL,   total_employees INTEGER NOT NULL,   avg_salary REAL NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES departments (department_id) );

### Question:
List the names of employees who have used office equipment located in cities that start with 'S' and have at least one maintenance checkup recorded.

SELECT DISTINCT e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS employee_name FROM employees e JOIN employee_copies ec ON e.employee_id = ec.employee_id WHERE ec.copy_machine_id IN (     SELECT cm.copy_machine_id     FROM copy_machine cm     JOIN locations l ON cm.location_id = l.location_id     JOIN office_equipment oe ON cm.copy_machine_id = oe.equipment_id     JOIN maintenance_checkups mc ON oe.equipment_id = mc.equipment_id     WHERE l.city LIKE 'S%' );

CREATE TABLE departement (   num_departement Varchar NOT NULL,   nom_departement Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nom_region Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (nom_departement),   FOREIGN KEY (nom_region) REFERENCES region (nom_region) );  CREATE TABLE fleuve (   nom_fleuve Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   longueur Int NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (nom_fleuve) );  CREATE TABLE region (   nom_region Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nb_habitants Int NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (nom_region) );  CREATE TABLE usine (   ID_usine Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   latitude Decimal NOT NULL,   longitude Decimal NOT NULL,   nom_usine Varchar NOT NULL,   secteur Varchar NOT NULL,   nom_region Varchar NOT NULL,   nom_utilisateur Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (ID_usine),   FOREIGN KEY (nom_region) REFERENCES region (nom_region),   FOREIGN KEY (nom_utilisateur) REFERENCES utilisateur (nom_utilisateur) );  CREATE TABLE utilisateur (   nom_utilisateur Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   passwd Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (nom_utilisateur) );

### Question:
What is the total number of factories in regions with a population density above 850 inhabitants per square kilometer, where each region must have at least two rivers longer than 650 kilometers and the factories are located in departments whose names contain the letter 'l' and belong to the aerospace sector?

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM usine JOIN departement ON usine.nom_region = departement.nom_region JOIN region ON usine.nom_region = region.nom_region WHERE departement.nom_departement LIKE '%l%' AND usine.secteur = 'aerospace' AND region.nb_habitants > 850 AND (     SELECT COUNT(*)      FROM fleuve     WHERE longueur > 650 ) >= 2;

CREATE TABLE user (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   ext_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   email Text NOT NULL,   username Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   firstname Text NOT NULL,   lastname Text NOT NULL,   is_suspended Boolean NOT NULL,   date_create Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_delete Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE role (   id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE store (   id Integer NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL,   description Text NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE category (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   ext_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   title Text NOT NULL,   description Text NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_deleted Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE xyo_category (   id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Text NOT NULL,   link_text Text NOT NULL,   description Text NOT NULL,   url Text NOT NULL UNIQUE,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE "order" (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   store_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   order_status TEXT NOT NULL,   total_amount REAL NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id),   FOREIGN KEY (store_id) REFERENCES store(id) );  CREATE TABLE order_item (   order_id TEXT NOT NULL,   product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,   price REAL NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (order_id, product_id),   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES "order"(id),   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id) );  CREATE TABLE payment (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   order_id TEXT NOT NULL,   amount REAL NOT NULL,   payment_method TEXT NOT NULL,   transaction_id TEXT,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES "order"(id) );  CREATE TABLE review (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   rating INTEGER NOT NULL,   comment TEXT,   is_approved BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE wishlist (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   is_public BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE wishlist_item (   wishlist_id TEXT NOT NULL,   product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,   notes TEXT,   PRIMARY KEY (wishlist_id, product_id),   FOREIGN KEY (wishlist_id) REFERENCES wishlist(id),   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id) );  CREATE TABLE campaign (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   start_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   end_date Timestamp NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   budget REAL NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE campaign_category (   campaign_id TEXT NOT NULL,   category_id TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (campaign_id, category_id),   FOREIGN KEY (campaign_id) REFERENCES campaign(id),   FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES category(id) );  CREATE TABLE campaign_user (   campaign_id TEXT NOT NULL,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (campaign_id, user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (campaign_id) REFERENCES campaign(id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE analytics_event (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   page_url TEXT NOT NULL,   event_name TEXT NOT NULL,   event_data TEXT,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE referral (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   referred_user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   is_confirmed BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id),   FOREIGN KEY (referred_user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE user_preference (   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   preference_key TEXT NOT NULL,   preference_value TEXT NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, preference_key),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE audit_log (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   action TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE wishlist_notification (   id TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id TEXT NOT NULL,   wishlist_id TEXT NOT NULL,   notified BOOLEAN NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id),   FOREIGN KEY (wishlist_id) REFERENCES wishlist(id) );  CREATE INDEX idx_order_user ON "order" (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_order_store ON "order" (store_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_orderitem_order ON order_item (order_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_payment_order ON payment (order_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_review_product ON review (product_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_review_user ON review (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_wishlist_user ON wishlist (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_wishlistitem_wishlist ON wishlist_item (wishlist_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_campaigncategory_campaign ON campaign_category (campaign_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_campaigncategory_category ON campaign_category (category_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_campaignuser_campaign ON campaign_user (campaign_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_campaignuser_user ON campaign_user (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_analyticsevent_user ON analytics_event (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_analyticsevent_date ON analytics_event (date_created);  CREATE INDEX idx_referral_user ON referral (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_referral_referreduser ON referral (referred_user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_userpreference_user ON user_preference (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_auditlog_user ON audit_log (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_auditlog_date ON audit_log (date_created);  CREATE INDEX idx_wishlistnotification_user ON wishlist_notification (user_id);  CREATE INDEX idx_wishlistnotification_wishlist ON wishlist_notification (wishlist_id);  CREATE TABLE product (   id Integer NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   name Text NOT NULL,   description Text,   price Real NOT NULL,   stock Integer NOT NULL,   category_id TEXT NOT NULL,   is_active Integer NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES category(id) );  CREATE TABLE inventory (   product_id Integer NOT NULL,   store_id Integer NOT NULL,   quantity Integer NOT NULL,   unit_cost Real NOT NULL,   date_updated Timestamp NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (product_id, store_id),   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id),   FOREIGN KEY (store_id) REFERENCES store(id) );  CREATE TABLE supplier (   id Integer NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   name Text NOT NULL,   contact_name Text NOT NULL,   email Text NOT NULL,   phone Text NOT NULL,   address Text NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE product_supplier (   product_id Integer NOT NULL,   supplier_id Integer NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (product_id, supplier_id),   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id),   FOREIGN KEY (supplier_id) REFERENCES supplier(id) );  CREATE TABLE product_review_score (   product_id Integer NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   total_ratings Integer NOT NULL,   total_score Integer NOT NULL,   average_rating Real NOT NULL,   date_updated Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id) );  CREATE TABLE user_role (   user_id Text NOT NULL,   role_id Integer NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (user_id, role_id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id),   FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES role(id) );  CREATE TABLE store_owner (   store_id Integer NOT NULL,   user_id Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (store_id, user_id),   FOREIGN KEY (store_id) REFERENCES store(id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE store_category (   store_id Integer NOT NULL,   category_id Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (store_id, category_id),   FOREIGN KEY (store_id) REFERENCES store(id),   FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES category(id) );  CREATE TABLE product_image (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   product_id Integer NOT NULL,   image_url Text NOT NULL,   is_main Image NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id) );  CREATE TABLE order_address (   order_id Text NOT NULL,   shipping_address_id Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (order_id),   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES "order"(id),   FOREIGN KEY (shipping_address_id) REFERENCES shipping_address(id) );  CREATE TABLE product_attribute (   product_id Integer NOT NULL,   attribute_name Text NOT NULL,   attribute_value Text NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (product_id, attribute_name),   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id) );  CREATE TABLE cart (   id Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id Text NOT NULL,   date_created Timestamp NOT NULL,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE cart_item (   cart_id Text NOT NULL,   product_id Integer NOT NULL,   quantity Integer NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (cart_id, product_id),   FOREIGN KEY (cart_id) REFERENCES cart(id),   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id) );  CREATE TABLE system_config (   key_name Text NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   value Text NOT NULL,   description Text,   date_modified Timestamp NOT NULL );

### Question:
What is the average quality of decals associated with blocks located in the region named "Industrial Zone"?

### Question:
List the names of people who have both a 'Python' skill at an advanced level and a 'Data Science' certification issued after 2020, along with the names of their primary schools.

SELECT p.name, s.name AS primary_school FROM person p JOIN certification c ON p.ID = c.pid JOIN skill sk ON p.ID = sk.pid JOIN enrollment e ON p.ID = e.pid JOIN school s ON e.school_id = s.ID WHERE sk.skill_name = 'Python' AND sk.level = 'advanced'   AND c.name = 'Data Science' AND c.issue_date > '2020';

CREATE TABLE HW_Train (   Id Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   Model Varchar NOT NULL,   ConstructionYear TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE CONDUCTOR (   Id Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   Name Varchar NOT NULL,   ExperienceLevel Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE ASSIGNED_TO (   TrainId Varchar NOT NULL,   ConductorId Varchar NOT NULL,   Day Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (ConductorId) REFERENCES CONDUCTOR (Id) );  CREATE TABLE MAINTENANCE_RECORD (   RecordId Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   TrainId Varchar NOT NULL,   MaintenanceDate Date NOT NULL,   Description Text NOT NULL,   Cost Decimal NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (TrainId) REFERENCES HW_Train (Id) );  CREATE TABLE CONDUCTOR_CERTIFICATION (   CertificationId Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   ConductorId Varchar NOT NULL,   CertificationType Varchar NOT NULL,   IssueDate Date NOT NULL,   ExpiryDate Date,   FOREIGN KEY (ConductorId) REFERENCES CONDUCTOR (Id) );  CREATE TABLE CONDUCTOR_RECOGNITION (   RecognitionId Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   ConductorId Varchar NOT NULL,   Award Varchar NOT NULL,   DateAwarded Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (ConductorId) REFERENCES CONDUCTOR (Id) );

### Question:
Find the top 5 conductors with the highest average cost of maintenance for the trains they've operated. Show each conductor's name, the number of different trains they've operated, their highest award received (by date), and the average annual maintenance cost per train (total cost divided by number of years since last maintenance). Only consider conductors who have operated at least 2 different trains and have at least one expired certification.

WITH TotalMaintenance AS (     SELECT          TrainId,          SUM(Cost) AS TotalCost,         MAX(MaintenanceDate) AS LastMaintenanceDate     FROM MAINTENANCE_RECORD     GROUP BY TrainId ), AvgAnnualCostPerTrain AS (     SELECT          TrainId,          TotalCost / NULLIF((strftime('%Y', CURRENT_DATE) - strftime('%Y', LastMaintenanceDate)), 0) AS AvgAnnualCost     FROM TotalMaintenance ), HighestAward AS (     SELECT          ConductorId,          Award     FROM CONDUCTOR_RECOGNITION     WHERE (ConductorId, DateAwarded) IN (         SELECT ConductorId, MAX(DateAwarded)         FROM CONDUCTOR_RECOGNITION         GROUP BY ConductorId     ) ), ConductorsWithExpiredCerts AS (     SELECT DISTINCT ConductorId     FROM CONDUCTOR_CERTIFICATION     WHERE ExpiryDate < CURRENT_DATE ) SELECT      c.Name,     COUNT(DISTINCT a.TrainId) AS NumTrains,     ha.Award AS HighestAward,      AVG(aa.AvgAnnualCost) AS AvgMaintenanceCost  FROM CONDUCTOR c JOIN ConductorsWithExpiredCerts ec ON c.Id = ec.ConductorId JOIN ASSIGNED_TO a ON c.Id = a.ConductorId JOIN TotalMaintenance tm ON a.TrainId = tm.TrainId JOIN AvgAnnualCostPerTrain aa ON a.TrainId = aa.TrainId JOIN HighestAward ha ON c.Id = ha.ConductorId GROUP BY c.Id, c.Name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.TrainId) >= 2 ORDER BY AvgMaintenanceCost DESC LIMIT 5;

 CREATE TABLE order_header (   order_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   order_date DATE NOT NULL,   customer_id TEXT NOT NULL,   order_status TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customer (customer_id) );  CREATE TABLE payment (   payment_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   order_id TEXT NOT NULL,   payment_date DATE NOT NULL,   amount REAL NOT NULL,   payment_method TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES order_header (order_id) );  CREATE TABLE shipping (   shipping_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   order_id TEXT NOT NULL,   shipping_date DATE,   delivery_date DATE,   carrier TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES order_header (order_id) );  CREATE TABLE returns (   return_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   order_id TEXT NOT NULL,   return_date DATE NOT NULL,   reason TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES order_header (order_id) );  CREATE TABLE discount (   discount_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   discount_name TEXT NOT NULL,   discount_type TEXT NOT NULL,   discount_value REAL NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE product_discount (   product_id TEXT NOT NULL,   discount_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product (product_id),   FOREIGN KEY (discount_id) REFERENCES discount (discount_id) );  CREATE TABLE customer_discount (   customer_id TEXT NOT NULL,   discount_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customer (customer_id),   FOREIGN KEY (discount_id) REFERENCES discount (discount_id) );  CREATE TABLE category (   category_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   category_name TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE product_category (   product_id TEXT NOT NULL,   category_id TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product (product_id),   FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES category (category_id) ); ### Question:
Generate a summary that includes the total purchase order quantity for each supplier who offers a payment discount of more than 2% and has an active tax rate above 5%, along with the total received quantity, the number of purchase orders processed in 2023, the average delay in delivery (in days), and the names of the purchasing employees, considering only products in the "Electronics" category and warehouses located in "New York."

SELECT      s.supplier_name,     SUM(pol.quantity_ordered) AS total_purchase_order_quantity,     SUM(pol.quantity_received) AS total_received_quantity,     COUNT(DISTINCT po.purchase_order_id) AS number_of_purchase_orders,     AVG(JULIANDAY(po.expected_delivery_date) - JULIANDAY(po.order_date)) AS average_delay_in_days,     GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.employee_name) AS purchasing_employees FROM purchase_order po JOIN supplier s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id JOIN supplier_payment_term spt ON s.supplier_id = spt.supplier_id     AND spt.discount_percent > 2 JOIN purchase_order_line pol ON po.purchase_order_id = pol.purchase_order_id JOIN product p ON pol.product_id = p.product_id JOIN product_tax pt ON p.product_id = pt.product_id JOIN tax t ON pt.tax_id = t.tax_id     AND t.active = 1     AND t.tax_rate > 5 JOIN product_category pc ON p.product_id = pc.product_id JOIN category c ON pc.category_id = c.category_id     AND c.category_name = 'Electronics' JOIN inventory_warehouse iw ON p.product_id = iw.product_id JOIN warehouse w ON iw.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id     AND w.location = 'New York' JOIN employee e ON po.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE po.order_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31' GROUP BY s.supplier_id, s.supplier_name;

### Question:
How many items are assigned to categories with a description containing the word "historical" and have at least one tag associated with them?
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) FROM item i JOIN category c ON i.idcategory = c.id JOIN item_tag it ON i.id = it.iditem WHERE c.description LIKE '%historical%';

### Question:
Identify the app(s) with the highest ratio of ERROR system logs to total system logs. Include the app_id, environment, total logs, error logs, and the ratio. Only consider apps with at least 100 total logs created before January 1, 2023.

WITH app_log_stats AS (     SELECT          sl.app_id,         ae.environment,         ae.created_at,         COUNT(*) AS total_logs,         SUM(CASE WHEN sl.level = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_logs     FROM system_log sl     JOIN app_environment ae ON sl.app_id = ae.app_id     GROUP BY sl.app_id, ae.environment, ae.created_at     HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100 ), ratio_stats AS (     SELECT          app_id,          environment,          total_logs,          error_logs,          (error_logs * 1.0 / total_logs) AS error_ratio     FROM app_log_stats     WHERE created_at < '2023-01-01' ), max_ratio AS (     SELECT MAX(error_ratio) AS max_ratio FROM ratio_stats ) SELECT      app_id,      environment,      total_logs,      error_logs,      error_ratio FROM ratio_stats WHERE error_ratio = (SELECT max_ratio FROM max_ratio);

### Question:
List all the locations recorded for devices that have logged messages in the last 24 hours and are configured for data type 'temperature'.

SELECT ld.* FROM LOCATION_DATA ld WHERE ld.imei IN (     SELECT DISTINCT dl.imei     FROM DEVICE_LOG dl     WHERE dl.log_time >= DATETIME('now', '-24 hours') ) AND ld.id IN (     SELECT sc.id     FROM SENSOR_CONFIGURATION sc     WHERE sc.data_type = 'temperature' ) ORDER BY ld.timestamp DESC;

### Question:

### Question:
Find the longest preparation time for recipes that combine 'Mediterranean' cuisine with 'one-pot' cooking methods and have at least one nutritional customization exceeding 300 calories per serving.

SELECT MAX(urp.preparation_time) FROM user_recipe_preparations urp WHERE urp.user_recipe_id IN (     SELECT DISTINCT urcm.user_recipe_id     FROM user_recipe_cooking_methods urcm     JOIN user_recipe_cuisine_types urct ON urct.user_recipe_id = urcm.user_recipe_id     JOIN user_recipe_nutrition_customizations urnc ON urnc.user_recipe_id = urcm.user_recipe_id     WHERE urct.cuisine_type = 'Mediterranean'       AND urcm.cooking_method = 'one-pot'       AND urnc.custom_calories > 300 );

### Question:
List the nodes in the portfolio "Project Alpha" along with their assigned tags.

### Question:
For each object_type in object_id, determine the number of definitions that have at least one tag with an 'approval_status' attribute of 'approved' and a 'review_date' attribute after '2023-06-01', where the definition's timestamp is within the last year and the definition is marked as the latest version.

WITH LatestDefinitions AS (     SELECT          definition_pk,         object_fk     FROM          object_definition     WHERE          object_is_latest = 1         AND object_timestamp >= datetime('now', '-1 year') ), ApprovedTags AS (     SELECT          t.definition_fk     FROM          tag t     JOIN          tag_attr a1 ON t.tag_pk = a1.tag_fk     JOIN          tag_attr a2 ON t.tag_pk = a2.tag_fk     WHERE          a1.attr_name = 'approval_status'          AND a1.attr_value_boolean = 1         AND a2.attr_name = 'review_date'         AND a2.attr_value_date > '2023-06-01'         AND t.tag_is_latest = 1 ) SELECT      oi.object_type,     COUNT(*) AS num_definitions FROM      object_id oi JOIN      LatestDefinitions ld ON oi.object_pk = ld.object_fk JOIN      ApprovedTags at ON ld.definition_pk = at.definition_fk GROUP BY      oi.object_type;

### Question:
What is the total payment amount for each role held by parties in contracts signed in the last fiscal year?

SELECT      ctp.role,      SUM(CAST(cp.amount AS REAL)) AS total_amount FROM      contract_payments cp JOIN      contract_parties ctp ON cp.contract_id = ctp.contract_id JOIN      audit_logs al ON cp.contract_id = al.contract_id WHERE      al.action = 'Contract Signed'     AND al.action_date >= '2022-04-01'     AND al.action_date <= '2023-03-31' GROUP BY      ctp.role;

### Question:
What is the average risk volatility for portfolios with a tag 'Aggressive' as of 2024-04-10?

SELECT AVG(CAST(pr.volatility AS REAL)) AS average_volatility FROM portfolio p JOIN portfolio_tag pt ON p.id = pt.portfolio_id JOIN portfolio_risk pr ON p.id = pr.portfolio_id WHERE pt.tag = 'Aggressive'   AND pr.risk_date = '2024-04-10';

CREATE TABLE department (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   dep_name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE roles (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   title Varchar NOT NULL,   salary Decimal NOT NULL,   department_id Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES department (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE employee (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   first_name Varchar NOT NULL,   last_name Varchar NOT NULL,   roles_id Int NOT NULL,   manager_id Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (roles_id) REFERENCES roles (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (manager_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE SET NULL );  CREATE TABLE EmployeeProject (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   employee_id INT NOT NULL,   project_id INT NOT NULL,   assignment_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES Project (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Task (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   task_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   project_id INT NOT NULL,   assigned_employee_id INT NOT NULL,   start_date DATE,   end_date DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES Project (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (assigned_employee_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE TimeSheet (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   employee_id INT NOT NULL,   task_id INT,   date DATE NOT NULL,   hours_worked DECIMAL NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES Task (id) ON DELETE SET NULL );  CREATE TABLE Attendance (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   employee_id INT NOT NULL,   date DATE NOT NULL,   status VARCHAR NOT NULL, 
FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE LeaveRequest (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   employee_id INT NOT NULL,   department_id INT NOT NULL,   leave_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   start_date DATE NOT NULL,   end_date DATE NOT NULL,   status VARCHAR NOT NULL, 
FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES department (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Training (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   training_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   department_id INT NOT NULL,   start_date DATE,   end_date DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES department (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE EmployeeTraining (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   employee_id INT NOT NULL,   training_id INT NOT NULL,   completion_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (training_id) REFERENCES Training (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Bonus (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   employee_id INT NOT NULL,   department_id INT,   role_id INT,   bonus_date DATE NOT NULL,   amount DECIMAL NOT NULL,   reason TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES department (id) ON DELETE SET NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES roles (id) ON DELETE SET NULL );  CREATE TABLE Promotion (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   employee_id INT NOT NULL,   from_role_id INT NOT NULL,   to_role_id INT NOT NULL,   promotion_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (from_role_id) REFERENCES roles (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (to_role_id) REFERENCES roles (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE PerformanceReview (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   employee_id INT NOT NULL,   reviewer_id INT NOT NULL,   review_date DATE NOT NULL,   score INT NOT NULL CHECK (score BETWEEN 1 AND 5),   comments TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Document (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   document_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   department_id INT NOT NULL,   file_path VARCHAR NOT NULL,   upload_date DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES department (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Meeting (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   title VARCHAR NOT NULL,   start_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   end_time DATETIME,   leader_id INT NOT NULL,   department_id INT NOT NULL,   location VARCHAR,   FOREIGN KEY (leader_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES department (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Certificate (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   employee_id INT NOT NULL,   certificate_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   issuer VARCHAR NOT NULL,   issue_date DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Dependent (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   employee_id INT NOT NULL,   full_name VARCHAR NOT NULL,   relation VARCHAR NOT NULL,   date_of_birth DATE NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Location (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   department_id INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   street VARCHAR NOT NULL,   city VARCHAR NOT NULL,   state VARCHAR NOT NULL,   zip_code VARCHAR NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES department (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE Benefits (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   benefit_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,   description TEXT,   department_id INT,   role_id INT,   FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES department (id) ON DELETE SET NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES roles (id) ON DELETE SET NULL,   CHECK (department_id IS NOT NULL OR role_id IS NOT NULL) ); CREATE TABLE user (   StaffId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   ICBCEmployeeId Varchar NOT NULL,   Email Varchar NOT NULL,   FirstName Varchar NOT NULL,   LastName Varchar NOT NULL,   Department Varchar NOT NULL,   Valid Boolean NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE workspace (   WorkspaceId Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   WorkspaceName Varchar NOT NULL,   StaffId Int NOT NULL,   FloorId Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (StaffId) REFERENCES user (StaffId),   FOREIGN KEY (FloorId) REFERENCES floor (FloorId) );  CREATE TABLE floor (   FloorId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   FloorNo Int NOT NULL,   Location Varchar NOT NULL,   City Varchar NOT NULL,   Building Varchar NOT NULL,   FloorPlanUrl Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE availability (   AvailabilityId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   StartDate Date NOT NULL,   EndDate Date NOT NULL,   WorkspaceId Varchar NOT NULL,   Comment Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (WorkspaceId) REFERENCES workspace (WorkspaceId) );  CREATE TABLE feature (   FeatureId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   FeatureName Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE booking (   Confirmed Boolean NOT NULL,   BookingId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   StartDate Date NOT NULL,   EndDate Date NOT NULL,   StaffId Int NOT NULL,   AvailabilityId Int NOT NULL,   WorkspaceId Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (StaffId) REFERENCES user (StaffId),   FOREIGN KEY (AvailabilityId) REFERENCES availability (AvailabilityId) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (WorkspaceId) REFERENCES workspace (WorkspaceId) );  CREATE TABLE archivedBooking (   ArchivedBookingId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   StartDate Date NOT NULL,   EndDate Date NOT NULL,   StaffId Int NOT NULL,   ArchivedAvailabilityId Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (StaffId) REFERENCES user (StaffId),   FOREIGN KEY (ArchivedAvailabilityId) REFERENCES archivedAvailability (ArchivedAvailabilityId) );  CREATE TABLE archivedAvailability (   ArchivedAvailabilityId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   StartDate Date NOT NULL,   EndDate Date NOT NULL,   WorkspaceId Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (WorkspaceId) REFERENCES workspace (WorkspaceId) );  CREATE TABLE role (   RoleId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   RoleName Varchar NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (RoleId) );  CREATE TABLE userRole (   StaffId Int NOT NULL,   RoleId Int NOT NULL,   isPrimary Boolean NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (StaffId) REFERENCES user (StaffId),   FOREIGN KEY (RoleId) REFERENCES role (RoleId) );  CREATE TABLE authentication (   AuthId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   StaffId Int NOT NULL,   Username Varchar NOT NULL,   PasswordHash Varchar NOT NULL,   LastLogin Date,   FOREIGN KEY (StaffId) REFERENCES user (StaffId) );  CREATE TABLE bookingEquipment (   BookingId Int NOT NULL,   EquipmentId Int NOT NULL,   QuantityReserved Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (BookingId) REFERENCES booking (BookingId),   FOREIGN KEY (EquipmentId) REFERENCES equipment (EquipmentId) );  CREATE TABLE feedback (   FeedbackId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   WorkspaceId Varchar NOT NULL,   StaffId Int NOT NULL,   Rating Int NOT NULL,   CommentText Varchar,   FOREIGN KEY (WorkspaceId) REFERENCES workspace (WorkspaceId),   FOREIGN KEY (StaffId) REFERENCES user (StaffId) );  CREATE TABLE notification (   NotificationId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   BookingId Int NOT NULL,   StaffId Int NOT NULL,   NotificationDate Date NOT NULL,   Status Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (BookingId) REFERENCES booking (BookingId),   FOREIGN KEY (StaffId) REFERENCES user (StaffId) );  CREATE TABLE auditLog (   AuditId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   BookingId Int NOT NULL,   ChangedBy Int NOT NULL,   ChangeType Varchar NOT NULL,   ChangeDescription Varchar NOT NULL,   ChangeDate Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (BookingId) REFERENCES booking (BookingId),   FOREIGN KEY (ChangedBy) REFERENCES user (StaffId) );  CREATE TABLE availabilityHistory (   HistoryId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   AvailabilityId Int NOT NULL,   OldStartDate Date NOT NULL,   OldEndDate Date NOT NULL,   NewStartDate Date NOT NULL,   NewEndDate Date NOT NULL,   ModifiedBy Int NOT NULL,   ModifiedDate Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (AvailabilityId) REFERENCES availability (AvailabilityId),   FOREIGN KEY (ModifiedBy) REFERENCES user (StaffId) );  CREATE TABLE featureTag (   TagId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   FeatureId Int NOT NULL,   TagName Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (FeatureId) REFERENCES feature (FeatureId) );  CREATE TABLE calendarEvent (   EventId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   BookingId Int NOT NULL,   CalendarProvider Varchar NOT NULL,   ExternalEventId Varchar NOT NULL,   SyncStatus Varchar NOT NULL,   SyncDate Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (BookingId) REFERENCES booking (BookingId) );  CREATE TABLE accessControl (   AccessId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   WorkspaceId Varchar NOT NULL,   RoleId Int NOT NULL,   AccessLevel Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (WorkspaceId) REFERENCES workspace (WorkspaceId),   FOREIGN KEY (RoleId) REFERENCES role (RoleId) );  CREATE TABLE resourceAllocation (   AllocationId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   WorkspaceId Varchar NOT NULL,   ResourceType Varchar NOT NULL,   AllocatedQuantity Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (WorkspaceId) REFERENCES workspace (WorkspaceId) );  CREATE TABLE emergencyContact (   ContactId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   WorkspaceId Varchar NOT NULL,   Name Varchar NOT NULL,   PhoneNumber Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (WorkspaceId) REFERENCES workspace (WorkspaceId) );  CREATE TABLE calendarSync (   SyncId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   StaffId Int NOT NULL,   CalendarType Varchar NOT NULL,   SyncToken Varchar NOT NULL,   LastSyncDate Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (StaffId) REFERENCES user (StaffId) );  CREATE TABLE waitlist (   WaitlistId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   WorkspaceId Varchar NOT NULL,   StaffId Int NOT NULL,   RequestDate Date NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (WorkspaceId) REFERENCES workspace (WorkspaceId),   FOREIGN KEY (StaffId) REFERENCES user (StaffId) );  CREATE TABLE inventory (   InventoryId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   WorkspaceId Varchar NOT NULL,   ItemName Varchar NOT NULL,   Quantity Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (WorkspaceId) REFERENCES workspace (WorkspaceId) );  CREATE TABLE emailTemplate (   TemplateId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   TemplateName Varchar NOT NULL,   EmailSubject Varchar NOT NULL,   EmailBody Text NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE approvalWorkflow (   WorkflowId Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   BookingId Int NOT NULL,   ApproverStaffId Int NOT NULL,   ApprovalStatus Varchar NOT NULL,   RequestDate Date NOT NULL,   ApprovalDate Date,   FOREIGN KEY (BookingId) REFERENCES booking (BookingId),   FOREIGN KEY (ApproverStaffId) REFERENCES user (StaffId) );

### Question:
Find the distinct staff IDs of users who have roles with the name 'manager', have booked a workspace with a confirmed booking, and have provided feedback on at least two different workspaces.

SELECT DISTINCT ur.StaffId FROM userRole ur JOIN role r ON ur.RoleId = r.RoleId JOIN booking b ON ur.StaffId = b.StaffId WHERE r.RoleName = 'manager'   AND b.Confirmed = 1   AND ur.StaffId IN (     SELECT f.StaffId     FROM feedback f     GROUP BY f.StaffId     HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT f.WorkspaceId) >= 2   );

### Question:
What is the total number of customer orders for books that have been both physically printed with high-quality paper and advertised on multiple e-commerce platforms?

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM 销售记录表 WHERE 书id IN (     SELECT 书id     FROM 图书制作信息表     JOIN 纸张规格信息表 ON 图书制作信息表.纸张id = 纸张规格信息表.id     WHERE 克重 > 80     INTERSECT     SELECT 书id     FROM 书籍广告投放表     GROUP BY 书id     HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT 广告平台id) >= 2 );

 CREATE TABLE signed_binary_references (   binary_type TEXT NOT NULL,   binary_path_hash TEXT NOT NULL,   binary_path Text NOT NULL,   blob_references TEXT NOT NULL,   timestamp Timestamp NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE hunts (   hunt_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   create_timestamp Timestamp NOT NULL,   last_update_timestamp Timestamp NOT NULL,   creator Varchar NOT NULL,   init_start_time Timestamp,   last_start_time Timestamp,   duration_micros BigInt NOT NULL,   client_rate Float NOT NULL,   client_limit TEXT NOT NULL,   num_clients_at_start_time TEXT NOT NULL,   hunt_state TEXT NOT NULL,   hunt_state_comment Text NOT NULL,   description Text NOT NULL,   hunt TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE client_labels (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   client_id TEXT NOT NULL,   label TEXT NOT NULL,   timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES clients (client_id) );  CREATE TABLE client_connections (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   client_id TEXT NOT NULL,   connection_type TEXT NOT NULL,   duration INTEGER NOT NULL,   timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES clients (client_id) );  CREATE TABLE client_history (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   client_id TEXT NOT NULL,   update_timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   field TEXT NOT NULL,   old_value TEXT NOT NULL,   new_value TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES clients (client_id) );  CREATE TABLE client_notes (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   client_id TEXT NOT NULL,   timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   added_by TEXT NOT NULL,   note TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES clients (client_id) );  CREATE TABLE artifact_uses (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   artifact_name TEXT NOT NULL,   client_id TEXT NOT NULL,   timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   context TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (artifact_name) REFERENCES artifacts (name),   FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES clients (client_id) );  CREATE TABLE hunt_results (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   hunt_id TEXT NOT NULL,   client_id TEXT NOT NULL,   timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   result_type TEXT NOT NULL,   data TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (hunt_id) REFERENCES hunts (hunt_id),   FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES clients (client_id) );  CREATE TABLE hunt_errors (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   hunt_id TEXT NOT NULL,   client_id TEXT NOT NULL,   timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   error_message TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (hunt_id) REFERENCES hunts (hunt_id),   FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES clients (client_id) );  CREATE TABLE cron_job_logs (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   job_id TEXT NOT NULL,   run_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   status TEXT NOT NULL,   details TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (job_id) REFERENCES cron_jobs (job_id) );  CREATE TABLE signed_binary_approvals (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   binary_path_hash TEXT NOT NULL,   approver TEXT NOT NULL,   approval_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   expiration_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (binary_path_hash) REFERENCES signed_binary_references (binary_path_hash) );  CREATE TABLE message_handler_logs (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   request_id TEXT NOT NULL,   handlername TEXT NOT NULL,   processing_duration INTEGER NOT NULL,   success BOOL NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (request_id) REFERENCES message_handler_requests (request_id) );  CREATE TABLE user_activity_log (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   username_hash TEXT NOT NULL,   action_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   action_type TEXT NOT NULL,   details TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (username_hash) REFERENCES grr_users (username_hash) );  CREATE TABLE foreman_actions (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   hunt_id TEXT NOT NULL,   client_id TEXT NOT NULL,   action_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   triggered_by_rule TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (hunt_id) REFERENCES hunts (hunt_id),   FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES clients (client_id) );  CREATE TABLE client_policy_evaluations (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   client_id TEXT NOT NULL,   policy TEXT NOT NULL,   evaluated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   result TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES clients (client_id) );  CREATE TABLE artifact_versions (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   artifact_name TEXT NOT NULL,   version_number INTEGER NOT NULL,   update_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   definition TEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (artifact_name) REFERENCES artifacts (name) );  CREATE TABLE approval_requests (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   request_type TEXT NOT NULL,   subject TEXT NOT NULL,   requester TEXT NOT NULL,   requested_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   expiration_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE system_alerts (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   alert_type TEXT NOT NULL,   description TEXT NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE scheduled_hunt_windows (   id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   hunt_id TEXT NOT NULL,   window_start TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   window_end TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,   window_size INTEGER NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (hunt_id) REFERENCES hunts (hunt_id) );

### Question:
List the top 5 artifacts used by clients with a last version string newer than 'v2.1.0', where the artifact was approved within the last year by at least two different approvers and the client's last ping was within the last 7 days?

WITH approved_artifacts AS (     SELECT artifact_name     FROM artifact_approvals     WHERE approval_time >= datetime('now', '-365 days')     GROUP BY artifact_name     HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT approver) >= 2 ), qualified_clients AS (     SELECT c.client_id     FROM clients c     JOIN (         SELECT client_id, new_value         FROM client_history         WHERE field = 'version'         AND update_timestamp = (             SELECT MAX(update_timestamp)             FROM client_history ch2             WHERE ch2.client_id = client_history.client_id             AND field = 'version'         )         AND new_value > 'v2.1.0'     ) AS cv ON c.client_id = cv.client_id     WHERE c.last_ping >= datetime('now', '-7 days') ) SELECT a.artifact_name, COUNT(*) AS usage_count FROM artifact_uses a JOIN approved_artifacts ap ON a.artifact_name = ap.artifact_name JOIN qualified_clients qc ON a.client_id = qc.client_id GROUP BY a.artifact_name ORDER BY usage_count DESC LIMIT 5;

### Question:
Which users have booked a table with a party size over four and also have a loyalty points balance exceeding 3000 points?
SELECT u.id, u.username FROM t_user u JOIN t_table_booking tb ON u.id = tb.user_id JOIN t_member_ship ms ON u.id = ms.user_id WHERE tb.party_size > 4   AND ms.current_score > 3000;

 CREATE TABLE Complaint (   ID Int NOT NULL,   NIC Varchar NOT NULL,   Type Varchar NOT NULL,   Description TINYTEXT NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (NIC) REFERENCES Driver (NIC) );  CREATE TABLE EmployeeDetails (   EID Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nic Varchar NOT NULL,   LastName Varchar NOT NULL,   DateOfBirth Date NOT NULL,   ContactNo Char NOT NULL,   Street Varchar NOT NULL,   City Varchar NOT NULL,   Provience Varchar NOT NULL ); ### Question:
Identify the drivers who have been assigned a complaint that is still unresolved, including their insurance company details and the number of traffic violations they have.

SELECT      d.NIC,     d.firstname,     d.lastname,     d.InsuranceName,     d.InsuranceNo,     ic.ContactNo,     ic.Email,     COALESCE(tv.CountViolations, 0) AS NumViolations FROM (     SELECT DISTINCT c.NIC     FROM Complaint c     JOIN ComplaintStatus cs ON c.ID = cs.ComplaintID     WHERE cs.Status != 'Resolved' ) uncomp JOIN Driver d ON uncomp.NIC = d.NIC JOIN InsuranceCompany ic ON d.InsuranceName = ic.Name LEFT JOIN (     SELECT NIC, COUNT(*) AS CountViolations     FROM TrafficViolation     GROUP BY NIC ) tv ON d.NIC = tv.NIC;

CREATE TABLE specialization (   code Varchar NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE course (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   specode Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (specode) REFERENCES specialization (code) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE test (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   theme Varchar NOT NULL,   courseid Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (courseid) REFERENCES course (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE question (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   qtext Text NOT NULL,   testid Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (testid) REFERENCES test (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE answer (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   atext Text NOT NULL,   correct TinyInt NOT NULL,   questid Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (questid) REFERENCES question (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE question_tag (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,   name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   description TEXT );  CREATE TABLE question_tags (   question_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   tag_id INTEGER NOT NULL,   PRIMARY KEY (question_id, tag_id),   FOREIGN KEY (question_id) REFERENCES question (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,   FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES question_tag (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE TABLE test_configuration (   test_id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   time_limit INTEGER,   attempts_allowed INTEGER,   shuffle_questions BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   FOREIGN KEY (test_id) REFERENCES test (id) ON DELETE CASCADE );  CREATE INDEX question_tags_question_id_idx ON question_tags (question_id);  CREATE INDEX question_tags_tag_id_idx ON question_tags (tag_id);

### Question:
List the names of employees who have participated in meetings scheduled in the 'West Wing Conference Room' and are enrolled in the 'Dental Insurance' benefit program, including the meeting dates and enrollment dates.

SELECT      e.first_name,      e.last_name,      m.scheduled_date,      ebe.enrollment_date FROM employee e JOIN meeting_participant mp ON e.id = mp.employee_id JOIN meeting m ON mp.meeting_id = m.id JOIN meeting_room mr ON m.room_id = mr.id JOIN employee_benefit_enrollment ebe ON e.id = ebe.employee_id JOIN benefit_program bp ON ebe.program_id = bp.id WHERE mr.name = 'West Wing Conference Room'   AND bp.name = 'Dental Insurance';

### Question:
What is the total value of products returned in completed order returns that were processed after the corresponding shipments were marked as delivered?

SELECT SUM(p.price * ri.quantity) AS total_value FROM order_returns AS ors JOIN return_items AS ri ON ors.id = ri.return_id JOIN products AS p ON ri.product_id = p.id JOIN shipments AS s ON ors.order_id = s.order_id WHERE ors.status = 'completed'   AND s.status = 'delivered'   AND ors.processed_at > s.shipment_date;

### Question:
Analyze the average salary changes for employees who have completed at least three training programs, comparing the average new salary to their old salary before training, and group the results by the department that offered the training. Filter the analysis to include only employees who have been promoted within the last two years.

WITH qualified_employees AS (     SELECT DISTINCT ph.employee_id     FROM promotion_history ph     JOIN (         SELECT employee_id         FROM employee_training         GROUP BY employee_id         HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3     ) et ON ph.employee_id = et.employee_id     WHERE ph.promotion_date >= date('now', '-2 years') ), employee_salary AS (     SELECT          ph.employee_id,         old_emprole.salary AS old_salary,         new_emprole.salary AS new_salary     FROM qualified_employees qe     JOIN promotion_history ph ON qe.employee_id = ph.employee_id     JOIN emprole old_emprole ON ph.from_role_id = old_emprole.id     JOIN emprole new_emprole ON ph.to_role_id = new_emprole.id ) SELECT      tp.department_id,     AVG(es.new_salary) AS avg_new_salary,     AVG(es.old_salary) AS avg_old_salary,     (AVG(es.new_salary) - AVG(es.old_salary)) AS average_salary_change FROM employee_salary es JOIN employee_training et ON es.employee_id = et.employee_id JOIN training_program tp ON et.training_id = tp.id GROUP BY tp.department_id;

CREATE TABLE contact (   id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   lastName Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE emailContact (   id Int NOT NULL,   email Varchar NOT NULL,   type_id Int NOT NULL,   contact_id Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE phoneContact (   id Int NOT NULL,   phone Varchar NOT NULL,   type_id Int NOT NULL,   contact_id Int NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE typeInput (   id Int NOT NULL,   name Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE organization (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   description Varchar );  CREATE TABLE customField (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   name Varchar NOT NULL,   data_type Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE contact_customField (   contact_id Int NOT NULL,   customField_id Int NOT NULL,   value Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contact(id),   FOREIGN KEY (customField_id) REFERENCES customField(id) );  CREATE TABLE logEntry (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   action Varchar NOT NULL,   action_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   user_id Int,   contact_id Int,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id),   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contact(id) );  CREATE TABLE systemSetting (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   key_name Varchar NOT NULL,   value Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE notification (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   message Varchar NOT NULL,   is_read Int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   user_id Int NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE importHistory (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   file_name Varchar NOT NULL,   import_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   user_id Int NOT NULL,   records_imported Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE auditTrail (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   action Varchar NOT NULL,   old_value Varchar,   new_value Varchar,   change_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   user_id Int NOT NULL,   contact_id Int,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id),   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contact(id) );  CREATE TABLE syncHistory (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   sync_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   status Varchar NOT NULL,   details Varchar,   contact_id Int NOT NULL,   user_id Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contact(id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE accessControl (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   resource Varchar NOT NULL,   permission Varchar NOT NULL,   role_id Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES role(id) );  CREATE TABLE userPreference (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id Int NOT NULL,   preference_key Varchar NOT NULL,   preference_value Varchar NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE geographicRegion (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   region_name Varchar NOT NULL,   country Varchar NOT NULL );  CREATE TABLE contactRegion (   contact_id Int NOT NULL,   region_id Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contact(id),   FOREIGN KEY (region_id) REFERENCES geographicRegion(id) );  CREATE TABLE reminder (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   message Varchar NOT NULL,   due_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   is_completed Int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   contact_id Int NOT NULL,   user_id Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contact(id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE task (   id Int NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   title Varchar NOT NULL,   description Varchar,   due_date DATETIME,   is_completed Int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,   contact_id Int NOT NULL,   user_id Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contact(id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE meeting (   id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   contact_id INT NOT NULL,   user_id INT NOT NULL,   start_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   end_time DATETIME,   notes TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contact(id),   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE document (   id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   name TEXT NOT NULL,   file_path TEXT NOT NULL,   upload_date DATETIME NOT NULL,   uploaded_by INT NOT NULL,   contact_id INT,   organization_id INT,   FOREIGN KEY (uploaded_by) REFERENCES user(id),   FOREIGN KEY (contact_id) REFERENCES contact(id),   FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organization(id) );  CREATE TABLE loginHistory (   id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INT NOT NULL,   login_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   logout_time DATETIME,   ip_address TEXT,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );  CREATE TABLE userActivity (   id INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,   user_id INT NOT NULL,   action TEXT NOT NULL,   action_time DATETIME NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id) );

### Question:
What is the average rating given by users for the recipes they have saved?
SELECT AVG(r.rating)  FROM user_recipe_rating r JOIN user_recipe_saved s ON r.recipe_id = s.recipe_id AND r.id = s.id;

CREATE TABLE empleados (   ci_id Int NOT NULL UNIQUE,   nombre Varchar NOT NULL,   appaterno Varchar NOT NULL,   apmaterno Varchar NOT NULL,   dtnacimiento Date NOT NULL,   salario Numeric NOT NULL,   direccion Varchar NOT NULL,   sexo Varchar NOT NULL,   dpto_id Int NOT NULL,   supervisor_id Int NOT NULL,   FOREIGN KEY (supervisor_id) REFERENCES empleados (ci_id) ); ### Question:
What is the total number of available rooms on September 1, 2025, in hotels located in cities with a population over 2 million and have 'Free Internet' as an amenity?

SELECT      COUNT(DISTINCT daily_availability.room_id)  FROM      daily_availability  JOIN      rooms ON daily_availability.hotel_id = rooms.hotel_id      AND daily_availability.section_id = rooms.section_id      AND daily_availability.room_id = rooms.room_id  JOIN      hotels ON rooms.hotel_id = hotels.hotel_id  JOIN      hotel_amenities ON hotels.hotel_id = hotel_amenities.hotel_id  WHERE      hotel_amenities.amenity_name = 'Free Internet'      AND daily_availability.date = '2025-09-01'      AND daily_availability.is_available = 1;

### Question:
How many students have an internship with a supervisor and a pending payment appraisal, but have not submitted a post-internship survey and have at least one job application in 'interview' status?

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.student_student_id) FROM internships i JOIN internship_supervisors isup ON i.internship_id = isup.internship_id JOIN student_internship_payment_appraisals sipa ON i.internship_id = sipa.internship_id WHERE NOT EXISTS (     SELECT 1     FROM administrator_reviews ar     WHERE ar.internship_id = i.internship_id     AND ar.status = 'approved' ) AND i.student_student_id NOT IN (     SELECT student_id     FROM post_internship_surveys ) AND EXISTS (     SELECT 1     FROM job_applications ja     WHERE ja.student_id = i.student_student_id     AND ja.status = 'interview' );

### Question:
Which user has the highest number of notes favorited by other users?
SELECT n.user_id FROM public_e2e_user_notes n JOIN public_e2e_note_favorites f ON n.id = f.note_id WHERE n.user_id != f.user_id GROUP BY n.user_id ORDER BY COUNT(f.id) DESC LIMIT 1;
